papers.title: Analytica: Soft Propositional Reasoning for Robust and Scalable LLM-Driven Analysis
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly tasked with complex real-world analysis (e.g., in financial forecasting, scientific discovery), yet their reasoning suffers from stochastic instability and lacks a verifiable, compositional structure. To address this, we introduce Analytica, a novel agent architecture built on the principle of Soft Propositional Reasoning (SPR). SPR reframes complex analysis as a structured process of estimating the soft truth values of different outcome propositions, allowing us to formally model and minimize the estimation error in terms of its bias and variance. Analytica operationalizes this through a parallel, divide-and-conquer framework that systematically reduces both sources of error. To reduce bias, problems are first decomposed into a tree of subpropositions, and tool-equipped LLM grounder agents are employed, including a novel Jupyter Notebook agent for data-driven analysis, that help to validate and score facts. To reduce variance, Analytica recursively synthesizes these grounded leaves using robust linear models that average out stochastic noise with superior efficiency, scalability, and enable interactive "what-if" scenario analysis. Our theoretical and empirical results on economic, financial, and political forecasting tasks show that Analytica improves 15.84% accuracy on average over diverse base models, achieving 71.06% accuracy with the lowest variance of 6.02% when working with a Deep Research grounder. Our Jupyter Notebook grounder shows strong cost-effectiveness that achieves a close 70.11% accuracy with 90.35% less cost and 52.85% less time. Analytica also exhibits highly noise-resilient and stable performance growth as the analysis depth increases, with a near-linear time complexity, as well as good adaptivity to open-weight LLMs and scientific domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于软命题推理的Analytica架构，通过分治框架降低偏差和方差，提升LLM分析任务的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在复杂分析任务中面临随机不稳定性和缺乏可验证组合结构的问题，限制了其在金融预测、科学发现等领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个鲁棒、可扩展且具有可验证组合结构的LLM分析框架，以降低推理中的偏差和方差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出LLM推理存在随机不稳定性，且缺乏可验证的组合结构。
analysis.method: 提出软命题推理（SPR）框架，将分析转化为估计命题软真值的过程；采用分治策略，先分解问题为子命题树，使用工具增强的LLM grounder（包括Jupyter Notebook agent）减少偏差，再通过鲁棒线性模型递归合成叶子节点以减少方差。
contributions: 提出软命题推理（SPR）原则，为LLM分析提供形式化的偏差-方差最小化框架。
设计Analytica架构，包含并行分治框架和Jupyter Notebook grounder，实现高效、可扩展且交互式的分析。
在经济、金融和政治预测任务上验证了方法的有效性，平均准确率提升15.84%，方差最低达6.02%。
analysis.experiments: 在经济、金融和政治预测任务上，Analytica在多种基模型上平均准确率提升15.84%，使用Deep Research grounder时准确率达71.06%，方差6.02%；Jupyter Notebook grounder以90.35%更低的成本和52.85%更少的时间达到70.11%准确率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具（如Jupyter Notebook）的可用性。
在非结构化或开放域分析任务上的泛化能力未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于软命题推理的Analytica架构，通过分治框架降低偏差和方差，提升LLM分析任务的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

papers.title: Urban Flood Observations (UFO): A hand-labeled training and validation dataset of post-flood inundation
papers.abstract: Urban flooding affects lives and infrastructure worldwide. Mapping inundation in complex urban environments from satellite imagery remains challenging due to limited spatial resolution, infrequent acquisitions, and cloud cover. We present Urban Flood Observations (UFO), a global, hand-labeled dataset of post-flood inundation in diverse urban settings. UFO comprises 215 image chips (1024 by 1024 pixels) from 14 flood events between 2017 and 2021, derived from 3 m PlanetScope imagery. Each chip is annotated with two classes: 'inundated' (all visible surface water, including floodwater and pre-existing water bodies (permanent or seasonal)) and 'non-inundated'. To demonstrate the dataset's utility, we trained a segmentation model using leave-one-event-out cross-validation, achieving a mean Intersection over Union (IoU) of 77.3. We also used UFO to evaluate two widely used surface water products, the Sentinel-1-based NASA IMPACT model and Google's 10 m Dynamic World water class, which yielded IoUs of 44.1 and 48.1, respectively. UFO is publicly available to support the development and validation of urban inundation mapping methods.

analysis.tldr: UFO 是一个全球城市洪水淹没的手工标注数据集，包含 215 张 3 米分辨率卫星图像，用于训练和验证分割模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市洪水影响广泛，但卫星图像在复杂城市环境中绘制淹没图面临空间分辨率有限、采集频率低和云层遮挡等挑战，现有数据集和方法不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏高质量、手工标注的城市洪水淹没数据集来支持模型训练和评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了包含 215 张 1024×1024 像素图像芯片的数据集，来自 2017-2021 年 14 次洪水事件的 3 米 PlanetScope 影像，标注为“淹没”和“非淹没”两类，并采用留一事件交叉验证训练分割模型。
contributions: 提供了全球首个手工标注的城市洪水淹没数据集 UFO，覆盖多样城市环境。
通过分割模型和现有产品评估展示了数据集的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 使用留一事件交叉验证训练分割模型，平均 IoU 为 77.3；评估 NASA IMPACT 和 Google Dynamic World 产品，IoU 分别为 44.1 和 48.1。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（215 张图像芯片），可能限制泛化性。
仅包含 2017-2021 年事件，时间覆盖有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UFO 是一个全球城市洪水淹没的手工标注数据集，包含 215 张 3 米分辨率卫星图像，用于训练和验证分割模型。

papers.title: C-MORAL: Controllable Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization with Reinforcement Alignment for LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show promise for molecular optimization, but aligning them with selective and competing drug-design constraints remains challenging. We propose C-Moral, a reinforcement learning post-training framework for controllable multi-objective molecular optimization. C-Moral combines group-based relative optimization, property score alignment for heterogeneous objectives, and continuous non-linear reward aggregation to improve stability across competing properties. Experiments on the C-MuMOInstruct benchmark show that C-Moral consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models across both in-domain and out-of-domain settings, achieving the best Success Optimized Rate (SOR) of 48.9% on IND tasks and 39.5% on OOD tasks, while largely preserving scaffold similarity. These results suggest that RL post-training is an effective way to align molecular language models with continuous molecular design objectives. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Rwigie/C-MORAL.

analysis.tldr: 提出C-MORAL框架，通过强化学习后训练实现可控多目标分子优化，在C-MuMOInstruct基准上取得最佳SOR。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子优化需同时满足多个竞争性药物设计约束，现有LLM难以对齐这些选择性约束。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM在分子优化中同时满足多个异质且竞争的目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合基于组的相对优化、属性分数对齐和连续非线性奖励聚合的强化学习后训练框架。
contributions: 提出C-MORAL框架，实现可控多目标分子优化。
在C-MuMOInstruct基准上取得SOTA结果，IND任务SOR 48.9%，OOD任务SOR 39.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在C-MuMOInstruct基准上评估，对比多个基线，报告了SOR和支架相似性指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定分子表示。
泛化到其他分子优化任务需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出C-MORAL框架，通过强化学习后训练实现可控多目标分子优化，在C-MuMOInstruct基准上取得最佳SOR。

papers.title: The Security Cost of Intelligence: AI Capability, Cyber Risk, and Deployment Paradox
papers.abstract: Firms are deploying more capable AI systems, but organizational controls often have not kept pace. These systems can generate greater productivity gains, but high-value uses require broader authority exposure -- data access, workflow integration, and delegated authority -- when governance controls have not yet decoupled capability from authority exposure. We develop an analytical model in which a firm jointly chooses AI deployment and cybersecurity investment under this governance-capability gap. The central result shows a deployment paradox: in high-loss environments, better AI can lead a firm to deploy less when capability is deployed through broader authority exposure under weak governance. Optimal deployment also falls below the no-risk benchmark, and this shortfall widens with breach-loss magnitude and with the authority exposure attached to more capable systems. Governance investment that reduces breach-loss magnitude shrinks the paradox region itself, while breach externalities expand the range of environments in which deployment is socially constrained. Governance maturity is therefore not merely a constraint on AI adoption. It is a condition that shapes whether capability improvements translate into productive deployment.

analysis.tldr: AI能力提升在治理薄弱时反而导致企业减少部署，形成“部署悖论”。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业部署更强大的AI系统时，组织控制往往滞后，导致高价值应用伴随更大的权限暴露和网络风险，亟需理解治理与能力之间的权衡。
analysis.problem: 在治理-能力差距下，企业如何联合选择AI部署和网络安全投资，以及AI能力提升对最优部署的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了“部署悖论”：在高损失环境中，更好的AI能力通过更广泛的权限暴露部署时，在弱治理下反而导致企业减少部署；最优部署低于无风险基准，且缺口随损失规模和权限暴露增大而扩大。
analysis.method: 构建分析模型，联合优化AI部署和网络安全投资，考虑治理-能力差距和网络风险。
contributions: 提出并形式化“部署悖论”：AI能力提升在弱治理下可能抑制部署。
分析治理投资和外部性对悖论区域的影响，强调治理成熟度是能力转化为生产力的条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型为理论分析，缺乏实证验证。
未考虑多企业竞争或动态治理调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI能力提升在治理薄弱时反而导致企业减少部署，形成“部署悖论”。

papers.title: Don't Make the LLM Read the Graph: Make the Graph Think
papers.abstract: We investigate whether explicit belief graphs improve LLM performance in cooperative multi-agent reasoning. Through 3,000+ controlled trials across four LLM families in the cooperative card game Hanabi, we establish four findings. First, integration architecture determines whether belief graphs provide value: as prompt context, graphs are decorative for strong models and beneficial only for weak models on 2nd-order Theory of Mind (80% vs 10%, p<0.0001, OR=36.0); when graphs gate action selection through ranked shortlists, they become structurally essential even for strong models (100% vs 20% on 2nd-order ToM, p<0.001). Second, we identify "Planner Defiance," a model-family-specific failure where LLMs override correct planner recommendations at partial competence (90% override, replicated N=20); Gemini models show near-zero defiance while Llama 70B shows 90%, and models distinguish factual context (deferred to) from advisory recommendations (overridden). Third, full-game evidence confirms inter-agent conventions (+128% over baseline, p=0.003) outperform all single-agent interventions, and individual belief-graph components must be combined to produce gains. Fourth, preliminary scaling analysis (N=10/cell, exploratory) suggests graph depth has diminishing returns: shallow graphs provide the best cost-benefit ratio, while deeper ToM graphs appear harmful at larger player counts (-1.5 pts at 5-player, p=0.029).

analysis.tldr: 在合作多智能体推理中，显式信念图的结构化集成方式比模型强度更关键，但存在模型家族特定的“规划者违抗”现象。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在多智能体协作中需要推理他人信念，但直接让LLM读取图结构可能效率低下，需要探索如何更有效地利用信念图。
analysis.problem: 如何设计信念图的集成架构以提升LLM在多智能体合作推理中的表现，并理解不同模型家族对图信息的处理差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现“规划者违抗”现象：Llama 70B在部分能力下90%覆盖正确规划建议，而Gemini几乎无违抗；模型能区分事实性上下文（遵从）与建议性推荐（覆盖）。
analysis.method: 在Hanabi游戏中，通过对比两种集成架构（提示上下文 vs. 排序短列表门控）和不同图深度，进行3000+控制实验。
contributions: 揭示集成架构决定信念图价值：作为提示上下文时仅对弱模型有益，作为门控时对强模型也关键。
发现并量化“规划者违抗”现象，展示模型家族特异性。
证明智能体间约定优于单智能体干预，且图组件需组合使用。
初步缩放分析表明浅层图性价比最优，深层图在大玩家数时有害。
analysis.experiments: 在Hanabi游戏中，涉及4个LLM家族（含Gemini、Llama 70B等），3000+控制试验，包含2阶心智理论测试和完整游戏验证。
limitations: 仅基于Hanabi单一游戏，泛化性待验证。
缩放分析为探索性（每条件N=10），统计效力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在合作多智能体推理中，显式信念图的结构化集成方式比模型强度更关键，但存在模型家族特定的“规划者违抗”现象。

papers.title: K-Score: Kalman Filter as a Principled Alternative to Reward Normalization in Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: We propose a simple yet effective alternative to reward normalization in policy gradient reinforcement learning by integrating a 1D Kalman filter for online reward estimation. Instead of relying on fixed heuristics, our method recursively estimates the latent reward mean, smoothing high-variance returns and adapting to non-stationary environments. This approach incurs minimal overhead and requires no modification to existing policy architectures. Experiments on \textit{LunarLander} and \textit{CartPole} demonstrate that Kalman-filtered rewards significantly accelerate convergence and reduce training variance compared to standard normalization techniques. Code is available at https://github.com/Sumxiaa/Kalman_Normalization.

analysis.tldr: 用一维卡尔曼滤波替代奖励归一化，在策略梯度强化学习中实现更快收敛和更低方差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有奖励归一化方法依赖固定启发式规则，难以适应非平稳环境和高方差回报，导致训练不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种简单、自适应且无需修改策略架构的奖励归一化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在策略梯度强化学习中集成一维卡尔曼滤波器，在线递归估计潜在奖励均值，平滑高方差回报并适应非平稳环境。
contributions: 提出将卡尔曼滤波作为奖励归一化的原则性替代方案
在LunarLander和CartPole上验证了加速收敛和降低方差的效果
analysis.experiments: 在LunarLander和CartPole环境中进行实验，与标准归一化技术对比，显示加速收敛和降低训练方差。
limitations: 仅在两个经典控制环境中验证，未在复杂任务上测试
卡尔曼滤波假设线性高斯，可能不适用于所有奖励分布
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用一维卡尔曼滤波替代奖励归一化，在策略梯度强化学习中实现更快收敛和更低方差。

papers.title: DeepImagine: Learning Biomedical Reasoning via Successive Counterfactual Imagining
papers.abstract: Predicting the outcomes of prospective clinical trials remains a major challenge for large language models. Prior work has shown that both traditional correlational predictors, such as random forests and logistic regression, and strong commercial LLMs achieve limited performance on this task. In this paper, we propose DeepImagine, a framework for teaching LLMs biomedical reasoning through successive counterfactual imagining. The central idea is to approximate hidden causal mechanisms of clinical trials by training models to infer how observed trial results would change under controlled perturbations of experimental conditions, such as dosage, outcome measures, study arms, geography, and other trial attributes. To support this objective, we construct both natural and approximate counterfactual pairs from real clinical trials with reported outcomes. For settings where strict counterfactual supervision is available, such as paired outcome measures or dose-ranging study arms within the same trial, we train models with supervised fine-tuning. For broader settings where only approximate counterfactual pairs can be retrieved, we optimize models with reinforcement learning using verifiable rewards based on downstream benchmark correctness. We further augment training with synthetic reasoning traces that provide causally plausible explanations for local counterfactual transitions. Using this pipeline, we train language models under 10B parameters, including Qwen3.5-9B, and evaluate them on clinical trial outcome prediction. We aim to show that DeepImagine consistently improves over untuned language models and traditional correlational baselines. Finally, we aim to show that the learned reasoning trajectories provide interpretable signals about how models represent trial-level mechanisms, suggesting a practical path toward more mechanistic and scientifically useful biomedical language models.

analysis.tldr: 通过反事实想象训练LLM进行生物医学推理，提升临床试验结果预测能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在预测前瞻性临床试验结果方面表现有限，传统相关预测器和商业LLM均未取得理想效果，亟需更有效的推理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM掌握生物医学推理能力，准确预测临床试验结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DeepImagine框架，通过构建自然和近似反事实对，结合监督微调与强化学习（基于下游基准正确性的可验证奖励），并加入合成推理轨迹，训练10B以下参数的语言模型（如Qwen3.5-9B）。
contributions: 提出基于反事实想象的生物医学推理框架DeepImagine。
构建自然和近似反事实对数据集，并设计监督微调与强化学习相结合的优化方法。
在临床试验结果预测任务上评估，预期优于未调优模型和传统基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在临床试验结果预测任务上评估，并预期有提升。
limitations: 反事实对构建可能依赖数据质量，近似反事实对可能引入噪声。
模型规模限制在10B以下，更大模型的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过反事实想象训练LLM进行生物医学推理，提升临床试验结果预测能力。

papers.title: A Decoupled Human-in-the-Loop System for Controlled Autonomy in Agentic Workflows
papers.abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed to execute tasks and make decisions within agentic workflows, introducing new requirements for safe and controlled autonomy. Prior work has established the importance of human oversight for ensuring transparency, accountability, and trustworthiness in such systems. However, existing implementations of Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) mechanisms are typically embedded within application logic, limiting reuse, consistency, and scalability across multi-agent environments. This paper presents a decoupled HITL system architecture that treats human oversight as an independent system component within the agent operating environment. The proposed design separates human interaction management from application workflows through explicit interfaces and a structured execution model. In addition, a design framework is introduced to formalize HITL integration along four dimensions: intervention conditions, role resolution, interaction semantics, and communication channel. This framework enables selective and context-aware human involvement while maintaining system-level consistency. The approach supports alignment with emerging agent communication protocols, allowing HITL to be implemented as a protocol-level concern. By externalizing HITL and structuring its integration, the system provides a foundation for scalable governance and progressive autonomy in agentic workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种解耦的人机协同系统架构，将人类监督作为独立组件，支持可扩展的受控自主性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有HITL机制嵌入应用逻辑，导致复用性差、一致性低，难以在多智能体环境中扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种解耦的、可复用的HITL系统，实现可扩展的受控自主性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出解耦的HITL系统架构，将人类监督作为独立组件，通过显式接口和结构化执行模型分离交互管理；并引入设计框架，从干预条件、角色解析、交互语义和通信通道四个维度形式化HITL集成。
contributions: 提出一种解耦的HITL系统架构，支持跨多智能体环境的复用和一致性。
引入四维设计框架，实现选择性、上下文感知的人类参与。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏实际部署中的性能评估。
框架的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种解耦的人机协同系统架构，将人类监督作为独立组件，支持可扩展的受控自主性。

papers.title: Liquid Neural Network Models for Natural Gas Spot Price Time-Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Natural gas is undoubtedly an essential component of the global energy system. Accurate short-term forecasting of natural gas price is challenging due to pronounced volatility driven by seasonal demand patterns, geopolitical developments, and shifting macroeconomic conditions. The nonlinear dynamics and frequent regime changes can limit the effectiveness of traditional time-series models. In this study, we explore the use of Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs) for short-horizon forecasting of the Henry Hub spot price, a primary benchmark for pricing. LNNs are designed to adapt continuously to evolving temporal patterns through dynamic internal state updates, making them well suited for nonstationary price behavior. By improving forecast accuracy in volatile market conditions, this work aims to reduce uncertainty and enhance decision support across energy trading and power market applications.

analysis.tldr: 探索液态神经网络在天然气现货价格短期预测中的应用，以应对高波动性和非平稳性挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 天然气价格受季节性需求、地缘政治和宏观经济影响波动剧烈，传统时间序列模型难以捕捉非线性动态和频繁的机制转换，导致预测精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用液态神经网络的动态适应能力，提高天然气现货价格在非平稳、高波动市场条件下的短期预测准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用液态神经网络（LNN），通过动态内部状态更新持续适应时变模式，对Henry Hub现货价格进行短期预测。
contributions: 首次将液态神经网络应用于天然气现货价格预测，验证其在非平稳时间序列上的适用性。
为能源交易和电力市场决策支持提供更准确的短期预测工具。

papers.title: BRITE: A Benchmark for Reliable and Interpretable T2V Evaluation on Implausible Scenarios
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of photorealistic Text-to-Video (T2V) generation brings in an urgent need for up-to-date evaluation methods. Existing benchmarks largely overlooked implausible scenarios and do not measure audio-visual alignment. We introduce BRITE, the first framework that unifies (1) implausible prompting, (2) fine-grained assessment of audio-visual consistency, and (3) QA-based interpretable evaluation into a comprehensive T2V benchmark. Unlike fully automated Multimodal LLM-based pipelines, which are prone to hallucination and prompt ambiguity, BRITE guarantees reliability through a rigorous human-in-the-loop protocol for benchmark creation. Evaluating five state-of-the-art models (Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Runway Gen4.5, Pixverse V5.5, and Qwen3Max), we reveal a critical performance gap: while models excel at static object composition, they exhibit significant degradation in object-action binding and audio-visual synchronization. Our framework offers the community a reliable, interpretable benchmark and evaluation framework that can detect and locate limitations in the next generation of T2V models, especially for off-manifold prompts

analysis.tldr: 提出首个统一不可靠场景提示、音视频一致性和可解释评估的T2V基准BRITE，揭示模型在对象-动作绑定和音视频同步上的显著缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2V评估基准忽略不可靠场景且缺乏音视频对齐测量，而基于多模态LLM的自动化评估存在幻觉和提示歧义问题，亟需可靠、可解释的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个覆盖不可靠场景、细粒度音视频一致性且可解释的T2V评估基准，以准确检测模型在复杂场景下的性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：模型在静态对象组合上表现优异，但在对象-动作绑定和音视频同步上显著退化，揭示了当前T2V模型在动态和跨模态对齐方面的关键失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出BRITE框架，包含三部分：(1)不可靠场景提示设计，(2)音视频一致性的细粒度评估，(3)基于QA的可解释评估；采用人工参与循环协议确保基准可靠性。
contributions: 首个统一不可靠场景、音视频一致性和可解释评估的T2V基准BRITE
揭示Sora 2等五个SOTA模型在对象-动作绑定和音视频同步上的性能差距
analysis.experiments: 在五个SOTA模型（Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Runway Gen4.5, Pixverse V5.5, Qwen3Max）上评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准覆盖的不可靠场景可能有限，需扩展更多类型
人工参与协议可能限制基准规模，可扩展性待验证

papers.title: A Systematic Approach for Large Language Models Debugging
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become central to modern AI workflows, powering applications from open-ended text generation to complex agent-based reasoning. However, debugging these models remains a persistent challenge due to their opaque and probabilistic nature and the difficulty of diagnosing errors across diverse tasks and settings. This paper introduces a systematic approach for LLM debugging that treats models as observable systems, providing structured, model-agnostic methods from issue detection to model refinement. By unifying evaluation, interpretability, and error-analysis practices, our approach enables practitioners to iteratively diagnose model weaknesses, refine prompts and model parameters, and adapt data for fine-tuning or assessment, while remaining effective in contexts where standardized benchmarks and evaluation criteria are lacking. We argue that such a structured methodology not only accelerates troubleshooting but also fosters reproducibility, transparency, and scalability in the deployment of LLM-based systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种系统化的LLM调试方法，将模型视为可观测系统，统一评估、可解释性和错误分析。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM调试因模型不透明、概率性及跨任务诊断困难而极具挑战，现有方法缺乏系统性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一种结构化、模型无关的LLM调试方法论，以覆盖从问题检测到模型优化的全流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出系统化调试框架，整合评估、可解释性和错误分析，支持迭代诊断、提示/参数优化及数据适配。
contributions: 提出首个系统化、模型无关的LLM调试方法
统一评估、可解释性和错误分析实践，提升调试效率与可复现性

papers.title: Understanding Representation Gaps Across Scales in Tropical Tree Species Classification from Drone Imagery
papers.abstract: Accurate classification of tropical tree species from unoccupied aerial vehicle (UAV) imagery remains challenging due to high species diversity and strong visual similarity among species at typical image resolutions (centimeters per pixel). In contrast, models trained on close-up citizen science photographs captured with smartphones achieve strong plant species classification performance. Recent advances in UAV data acquisition now enable the collection of close-up images that are spatially registered with top-view aerial imagery and approach the level of visual detail found in smartphone photographs, with the trade-off that such high-resolution photos cannot be acquired for many trees. In this work, we evaluate the performance of existing methods using paired top-view and close-up UAV imagery collected in a species-rich tropical forest. Through fine-tuning experiments, we quantify the performance gap between vision foundation models and in-domain generalist plant recognition models across both image types (high-resolution close-up versus coarser-resolution top-view imagery). We show that classification performance is consistently higher on close-up images than on top-view aerial imagery, and that this performance gap widens for rare species. Finally, we propose that self-supervised representation alignment across these two spatial scales offers a promising approach for integrating fine-grained visual information into canopy-level species classification models based on top-view UAV imagery. Leveraging high-resolution close-up UAV imagery to enhance canopy-level species classification could substantially improve large-scale monitoring of tropical forest biodiversity.

analysis.tldr: 利用无人机近景图像提升冠层树种分类精度，揭示分辨率与物种稀有性导致的表征差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 热带树种分类依赖无人机航拍图像，但物种多样性高、视觉相似性强，导致分类困难；而公民科学近景照片分类效果好。近期无人机可采集与航拍图像空间配准的近景图像，但无法覆盖所有树木，如何利用有限近景数据提升冠层分类是重要问题。
analysis.problem: 量化并缩小无人机航拍（粗分辨率）与近景（高分辨率）图像在热带树种分类中的性能差距，尤其是稀有物种的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 近景图像分类性能始终优于航拍图像，且该差距在稀有物种上更大。
analysis.method: 通过微调实验评估视觉基础模型与领域通用植物识别模型在两种图像类型上的性能，并提出自监督表征对齐方法以融合跨尺度信息。
contributions: 量化了航拍与近景无人机图像在热带树种分类中的性能差距，并揭示稀有物种差距更大。
提出自监督表征对齐作为整合细粒度视觉信息到冠层分类模型的有效途径。
analysis.experiments: 在物种丰富的热带森林中采集配对的航拍和近景无人机图像，进行微调实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 近景图像获取成本高，可能限制大规模应用。
自监督对齐方法的具体实现和效果未在摘要中验证。

papers.title: AmaraSpatial-10K: A Spatially and Semantically Aligned 3D Dataset for Spatial Computing and Embodied AI
papers.abstract: Web-scale 3D asset collections are abundant, but rarely deployment-ready. Assets ship with arbitrary metric scale, incorrect pivots and forward axes, brittle geometry, and textures that do not support relighting, which limits their utility for embodied AI, robotics simulation, game development, and AR/VR. We present AmaraSpatial-10K, a dataset of over 10,000 synthetic 3D assets designed for downstream use rather than volume alone. Each asset is released as a metric-scaled, semantically anchored .glb with separated PBR material maps, a convex collision hull, a paired reference image, and rich multi-sentence text metadata. The dataset spans indoor objects, vehicles, architecture, creatures, and props under a unified spatial convention. Alongside the dataset, we introduce an evaluation suite for 3D asset banks. The suite comprises a continuous Scale Plausibility Score (SPS) with an LLM-as-Judge interval protocol, an LLM Concept Density score for metadata, an anchor-error metric, and a cross-modal CLIP coherence protocol, and we use it to audit AmaraSpatial-10K alongside matched subsets from Objaverse, HSSD, ABO, and GSO. Compared with Objaverse-sourced assets, we demonstrate that AmaraSpatial-10K substantially improves text-based retrieval precision (CLIP Recall@5 of 0.612 vs 0.181, a 3.4x improvement with median rank falling from 267 to 3), and we establish that it satisfies the spatial and semantic prerequisites for physics-aware scene composition and embodied-AI asset banks, leaving those downstream evaluations to future work. AmaraSpatial-10K is publicly available on Hugging Face.

analysis.tldr: AmaraSpatial-10K 是一个包含 10,000+ 个高质量、空间语义对齐的 3D 资产数据集，显著提升了文本检索精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 Web 级 3D 资产存在尺度不一致、轴心错误、几何脆弱、纹理不支持重光照等问题，限制了其在具身 AI、机器人仿真、游戏开发和 AR/VR 中的直接使用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个可直接部署、空间和语义对齐的 3D 资产数据集，以满足下游应用对度量尺度、语义锚定和物理感知场景组合的需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了 AmaraSpatial-10K 数据集，每个资产以度量尺度、语义锚定的 .glb 格式发布，包含分离的 PBR 材质贴图、凸碰撞外壳、配对参考图像和丰富的多句文本元数据；同时引入了一个包含 Scale Plausibility Score (SPS)、LLM Concept Density 分数、锚点误差指标和跨模态 CLIP 一致性协议的评估套件。
contributions: 发布了 AmaraSpatial-10K，一个包含 10,000+ 个高质量、空间语义对齐的 3D 资产数据集，适用于空间计算和具身 AI。
提出了一个用于审计 3D 资产库的评估套件，包括 SPS、LLM Concept Density、锚点误差和 CLIP 一致性指标。
analysis.experiments: 在 AmaraSpatial-10K 与 Objaverse、HSSD、ABO、GSO 的子集上进行了评估，结果显示 AmaraSpatial-10K 在文本检索精度上显著优于 Objaverse（CLIP Recall@5 0.612 vs 0.181，中位数排名从 267 降至 3）。
limitations: 数据集仅包含合成资产，可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的多样性。
下游物理感知场景组合和具身 AI 评估留待未来工作，当前未验证实际部署效果。

papers.title: DeepSignature: Digitally Signed, Content-Encoding Watermarks for Robust and Transparent Image Authentication
papers.abstract: AI-powered generative models have significantly expanded the possibilities for editing, manipulating, and creating high-quality images. Particularly, images that falsely appear to originate from trusted sources pose a serious threat, undermining public trust in image authenticity. We propose DeepSignature, a novel approach that integrates the guarantees of digital signatures with the capabilities of deep neural networks. Neural networks are used both to generate content-encoding watermarks and to embed them imperceptibly into images while ensuring robust extraction. These watermarks are cryptographically verifiable, enabling source attribution and image integrity validation. DeepSignature is compatible with existing image formats and requires no special handling of signed images. It supports client-side verification, requiring only the signer's public key. Additionally, we introduce a novel latent-space verification approach to detect and localize tampering attempts. We evaluate DeepSignature in terms of imperceptibility, robustness to benign transformations, forgery detection, and its resilience against various attack scenarios. Our results highlight the inherent trade-offs between imperceptibility, robustness, and integrity verification. We demonstrate that DeepSignature reliably identifies significant forgery attempts -- achieving near 100\% in our experiments. Finally, we emphasize DeepSignature's modularity and tunable parameters, allowing adaptation to application-specific requirements. Code and model weights will be published.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合数字签名与深度神经网络的图像认证水印方法，实现可验证的源归属与完整性保护。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成模型使图像编辑和伪造变得容易，虚假图像冒充可信来源严重威胁公众信任，现有方法在鲁棒性、透明性和可验证性方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能嵌入内容编码水印、又能通过数字签名实现加密验证的图像认证方案，同时保持高不可感知性、鲁棒性并支持篡改定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出不可感知性、鲁棒性和完整性验证之间存在固有权衡，且实验显示该方法在检测重大伪造尝试时接近100%准确率。
analysis.method: 使用深度神经网络生成内容编码水印并不可感知地嵌入图像，水印通过数字签名加密验证；引入潜在空间验证方法检测和定位篡改。
contributions: 提出DeepSignature，将数字签名与神经网络水印结合，实现可验证的源归属和完整性验证。
引入潜在空间验证方法，支持篡改检测与定位。
评估了不可感知性、鲁棒性、伪造检测和抗攻击能力，展示了接近100%的伪造检测率。
analysis.experiments: 在不可感知性、鲁棒性（良性变换）、伪造检测和多种攻击场景下评估，伪造检测接近100%。摘要未提供具体数据集或对比方法细节。
limitations: 摘要未讨论水印容量或对图像质量的影响细节。
潜在空间验证的计算开销未提及。
未与现有水印或认证方法进行定量比较。

papers.title: On-Device Vision Training, Deployment, and Inference on a Thumb-Sized Microcontroller
papers.abstract: This paper presents a complete, end-to-end on-device vision machine learning pipeline, comprising data acquisition, two-layer CNN training with Adam optimization, and real-time inference, executing entirely on a microcontroller-class device costing $15-40 USD. Unlike cloud-based workflows that require external infrastructure and conceal the computational pipeline from the practitioner, this system implements every step of the core ML lifecycle in approximately 1,750 lines of readable C++ that compiles in under one minute using the Arduino IDE, with no external ML dependencies. Running on the Seeed Studio ESP32-S3 XIAO ML Kit (8 MB PSRAM), the firmware achieves three-class 64x64 image classification in approximately 9 minutes per training run, with real-time inference at 6.3 FPS. Key contributions include: correct batch-level gradient accumulation; pre-computed resize lookup tables for inference; dual-format weight export for SD-free baked-in deployment; a three-tier weight priority system (SD binary > baked-in header > He-initialization) resolved automatically at boot; a single-constant network reconfiguration interface; and PSRAM-aware memory management suited to microcontroller constraints. All source code and reference datasets are released under the MIT License at https://github.com/webmcu-ai/on-device-vision-ai

analysis.tldr: 在拇指大小的微控制器上实现完整的视觉机器学习流水线，包括训练、部署和推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有云端工作流依赖外部基础设施，隐藏了计算流水线，且成本高、不透明；而微控制器设备资源极度受限，难以支持完整的ML生命周期。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源极度受限的微控制器（如ESP32-S3）上实现端到端的视觉机器学习流水线（数据采集、训练、推理）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在微控制器上实现完整流水线：两层CNN + Adam优化，包含批量梯度累积、预计算缩放查找表、双格式权重导出、三级权重优先级系统、单常量网络重配置接口、PSRAM感知内存管理。
contributions: 首次在微控制器上实现完整的端到端视觉ML流水线（训练+推理），无需外部依赖。
提出多项针对微控制器约束的优化技术：批量梯度累积、预计算缩放查找表、双格式权重导出、三级权重优先级系统、单常量网络重配置接口、PSRAM感知内存管理。
analysis.experiments: 在Seeed Studio ESP32-S3 XIAO ML Kit上实现三类别64x64图像分类，训练约9分钟，推理6.3 FPS。
limitations: 仅验证了三类64x64图像分类，未测试更大规模或更复杂任务。
训练时间较长（9分钟），可能不适合实时或频繁更新场景。

papers.title: GenAssets: Generating in-the-wild 3D Assets in Latent Space
papers.abstract: High-quality 3D assets for traffic participants are critical for multi-sensor simulation, which is essential for the safe end-to-end development of autonomy. Building assets from in-the-wild data is key for diversity and realism, but existing neural-rendering based reconstruction methods are slow and generate assets that render well only from viewpoints close to the original observations, limiting their usefulness in simulation. Recent diffusion-based generative models build complete and diverse assets, but perform poorly on in-the-wild driving scenes, where observed actors are captured under sparse and limited fields of view, and are partially occluded. In this work, we propose a 3D latent diffusion model that learns on in-the-wild LiDAR and camera data captured by a sensor platform and generates high-quality 3D assets with complete geometry and appearance. Key to our method is a "reconstruct-then-generate" approach that first leverages occlusion-aware neural rendering trained over multiple scenes to build a high-quality latent space for objects, and then trains a diffusion model that operates on the latent space. We show our method outperforms existing reconstruction and generation based methods, unlocking diverse and scalable content creation for simulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种3D潜在扩散模型，从野外驾驶场景的稀疏LiDAR和相机数据中生成完整几何与外观的高质量3D资产。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量3D资产对多传感器仿真至关重要，但现有神经渲染方法重建慢且视角受限，扩散模型在野外驾驶场景中表现差。
analysis.problem: 从野外驾驶场景的稀疏、部分遮挡观测数据中生成完整且多样的3D资产。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有神经渲染方法仅能从接近原始观测的视角良好渲染，扩散模型在稀疏视角和部分遮挡下性能差。
analysis.method: 提出“重建-生成”方法：先利用跨场景的遮挡感知神经渲染构建高质量物体潜在空间，再在该潜在空间上训练扩散模型。
contributions: 提出一种3D潜在扩散模型，能从野外LiDAR和相机数据生成完整几何和外观的3D资产。
采用“重建-生成”策略，结合遮挡感知神经渲染和潜在扩散模型，优于现有重建和生成方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖多场景训练数据，单场景泛化能力未知。
潜在空间构建的计算成本可能较高。

papers.title: FormalScience: Scalable Human-in-the-Loop Autoformalisation of Science with Agentic Code Generation in Lean
papers.abstract: Formalising informal mathematical reasoning into formally verifiable code is a significant challenge for large language models. In scientific fields such as physics, domain-specific machinery (\textit{e.g.} Dirac notation, vector calculus) imposes additional formalisation challenges that modern LLMs and agentic approaches have yet to tackle. To aid autoformalisation in scientific domains, we present FormalScience; a domain-agnostic human-in-the-loop agentic pipeline that enables a single domain expert (without deep formal language experience) to produce \textit{syntactically correct} and \textit{semantically aligned} formal proofs of informal reasoning for low economic cost. Applying FormalScience to physics, we construct FormalPhysics, a dataset of 200 university-level (LaTeX) physics problems and solutions (primarily quantum mechanics and electromagnetism), along with their Lean4 formal representations. Compared to existing formal math benchmarks, FormalPhysics achieves perfect formal validity and exhibits greater statement complexity. We evaluate open-source models and proprietary systems on a statement autoformalisation task on our dataset via zero-shot prompting, self-refinement with error feedback, and a novel multi-stage agentic approach, and explore autoformalisation limitations in modern LLM-based approaches. We provide the first systematic characterisation of semantic drift in physics autoformalisation in terms of concepts such as notational collapse and abstraction elevation which reveals what formal language verifies when full semantic preservation is unattainable. We release the codebase together with an interactive UI-based FormalScience system which facilitates autoformalisation and theorem proving in scientific domains beyond physics.https://github.com/jmeadows17/formal-science

analysis.tldr: 提出一个人类在环的自动化形式化科学推理管线，并构建了物理领域Lean4形式化数据集FormalPhysics。
analysis.research_motivation: 将非正式数学推理自动形式化为可验证代码对LLM极具挑战，尤其在物理等科学领域存在领域特定符号（如狄拉克符号、矢量微积分）带来的额外困难，现有方法尚未解决。
analysis.problem: 如何让领域专家（无需深厚形式语言经验）以低成本将科学领域（如物理）的非正式推理自动转化为语法正确且语义对齐的形式化证明。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要首次系统刻画了物理自动形式化中的语义漂移现象，包括符号崩溃和抽象提升等概念，揭示了当完全语义保留不可实现时形式语言实际验证了什么。
analysis.method: 提出FormalScience，一个领域无关的人类在环智能体管线，通过多阶段智能体代码生成和交互式UI，使单个领域专家能生成语法正确且语义对齐的Lean4形式化证明。
contributions: 提出FormalScience，一个领域无关的人类在环自动形式化管线，支持低成本的科学推理形式化。
构建FormalPhysics数据集，包含200道大学物理问题（量子力学和电磁学）及其Lean4形式化表示，具有完美的形式有效性和更高的语句复杂度。
首次系统刻画物理自动形式化中的语义漂移现象，包括符号崩溃和抽象提升。
开源代码库和交互式UI系统，支持物理之外的科学领域自动形式化和定理证明。
analysis.experiments: 在FormalPhysics数据集上评估了开源模型和商业系统在语句自动形式化任务上的表现，包括零样本提示、带错误反馈的自精炼以及新型多阶段智能体方法，并探索了基于LLM的方法的自动形式化局限性。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（200题），可能限制泛化性。
人类在环流程仍需要领域专家参与，自动化程度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个人类在环的自动化形式化科学推理管线，并构建了物理领域Lean4形式化数据集FormalPhysics。

papers.title: Vision-Language-Action in Robotics: A Survey of Datasets, Benchmarks, and Data Engines
papers.abstract: Despite remarkable progress in Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models, a central bottleneck remains underexamined: the data infrastructure that underlies embodied learning. In this survey, we argue that future advances in VLA will depend less on model architecture and more on the co-design of high-fidelity data engines and structured evaluation protocols. To this end, we present a systematic, data-centric analysis of VLA research organized around three pillars: datasets, benchmarks, and data engines. For datasets, we categorize real-world and synthetic corpora along embodiment diversity, modality composition, and action space formulation, revealing a persistent fidelity-cost trade-off that fundamentally constrains large-scale collection. For benchmarks, we analyze task complexity and environment structure jointly, exposing structural gaps in compositional generalization and long-horizon reasoning evaluation that existing protocols fail to address. For data engines, we examine simulation-based, video-reconstruction, and automated task-generation paradigms, identifying their shared limitations in physical grounding and sim-to-real transfer. Synthesizing these analyses, we distill four open challenges: representation alignment, multimodal supervision, reasoning assessment, and scalable data generation. Addressing them, we argue, requires treating data infrastructure as a first-class research problem rather than a background concern.

analysis.tldr: 数据基础设施是VLA机器人学的核心瓶颈，未来进展取决于数据引擎与评估协议的协同设计。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型虽取得显著进展，但数据基础设施（数据集、基准、数据引擎）作为具身学习的基础，其重要性被低估，成为制约发展的关键瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 系统梳理并分析VLA研究中数据集、基准和数据引擎的现状与不足，揭示数据基础设施层面的核心挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：真实与合成数据集存在保真度-成本权衡；现有基准在组合泛化和长程推理评估上存在结构性缺陷；数据引擎在物理基础与仿真到现实迁移方面有共同局限性。
analysis.method: 数据驱动的系统性综述，围绕数据集、基准、数据引擎三大支柱进行分类、对比和问题提炼。
contributions: 对VLA数据集、基准和数据引擎进行了全面的分类与对比分析
揭示了保真度-成本权衡、组合泛化评估缺口、物理基础不足等关键问题
提炼出表征对齐、多模态监督、推理评估、可扩展数据生成四个开放挑战
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，未提出新方法或实验验证
可能未覆盖所有最新工作或特定领域细节
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 数据基础设施是VLA机器人学的核心瓶颈，未来进展取决于数据引擎与评估协议的协同设计。

papers.title: Toeplitz MLP Mixers are Low Complexity, Information-Rich Sequence Models
papers.abstract: Transformer-based large language models are in some respects limited by the quadratic time and space computational complexity of attention. We introduce the Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM), a transformer-like architecture that swaps attention for triangular-masked Toeplitz matrix multiplication over the sequence dimension resulting in $\mathcal{O} (dn \log n)$ time and $\mathcal O(dn)$ space complexity during training and $\mathcal O(dn)$ time and space at inference prefill. Despite the lack of sophisticated input modulation or state maintenance present in other sub-quadratic architectures, TMMs yield greater training efficiency in terms of loss achieved per compute and device memory. We demonstrate that TMMs are capable of retaining more input information resulting in improved copying ability, which we argue results from a lack of architectural biases. Consistent with higher input information retention, TMMs exhibit superior information retrieval and in-context learning benchmark accuracy compared to comparable architectures. We conclude with an analysis from the perspective of operator index theory and show that, counterintuitively, trained Toeplitz layers of causal non-invertible models are more likely to be invertible or nearly so than models that are actually invertible over their inputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，用三角掩码Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力机制，实现次二次复杂度，同时保持高信息保留和复制能力。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer的注意力机制具有二次时间和空间复杂度，限制了长序列处理效率；现有次二次架构往往牺牲输入信息保留或引入复杂调制，需要更高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 设计一种低复杂度序列模型，在保持高效训练和推理的同时，能够保留更多输入信息并提升复制、检索等能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 用三角掩码Toeplitz矩阵乘法替换注意力，形成Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，实现O(d n log n)训练时间和O(d n)空间复杂度。
contributions: 提出TMM架构，以次二次复杂度实现高效序列建模。
实验证明TMM在信息保留、复制能力、信息检索和上下文学习基准上优于可比架构。
从算子指标理论角度分析，发现训练后的因果非可逆模型的Toeplitz层更可能接近可逆。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏对长距离依赖建模的灵活性。
未在超大规模模型或多样化任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，用三角掩码Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力机制，实现次二次复杂度，同时保持高信息保留和复制能力。

papers.title: Efficient Image Annotation via Semi-Supervised Object Segmentation with Label Propagation
papers.abstract: Reliable object perception is necessary for general-purpose service robots. Open-vocabulary detectors struggle to generalize beyond a few classes and fully supervised training of object detectors requires time-intensive annotations. We present a semi-supervised label propagation approach for household object segmentation. A segment proposer generates class-agnostic masks, and an ensemble of Hopfield networks assigns labels by learning representative embeddings in complementary foundation model embedding spaces (CLIP, ViT, Theia). Our approach scales to 50 object classes with limited annotation overhead and can automatically label 60% of the data in a RoboCup@Home setting, where preparation time is severely constrained. Dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ais-bonn/label_propagation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种半监督标签传播方法，利用互补基础模型嵌入空间和Hopfield网络集成，高效标注家庭物体分割数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用服务机器人需要可靠的物体感知，但开放词汇检测器泛化能力有限，全监督训练需要大量人工标注，成本高且耗时。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限标注开销下，高效、准确地为家庭环境中的物体分割数据自动生成标签。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用类无关的段提议器生成掩码，然后通过集成Hopfield网络在互补的基础模型嵌入空间（CLIP、ViT、Theia）中学习代表性嵌入，进行标签传播。
contributions: 提出一种半监督标签传播方法，可扩展到50个物体类别且标注开销有限。
在RoboCup@Home场景中自动标注60%的数据，显著减少人工标注时间。
公开数据集和代码，促进可重复研究。
analysis.experiments: 在RoboCup@Home设置下评估，方法可自动标注60%的数据。摘要未提供具体数值比较或消融实验。
limitations: 可能依赖段提议器的质量，对复杂场景或小物体效果未知。
仅在家居场景验证，泛化到其他领域需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种半监督标签传播方法，利用互补基础模型嵌入空间和Hopfield网络集成，高效标注家庭物体分割数据。

papers.title: Hard to See, Hard to Label: Generative and Symbolic Acquisition for Subtle Visual Phenomena
papers.abstract: Subtle visual anomalies such as hairline cracks, sub-millimeter voids, and low-contrast inclusions are structurally atypical yet visually ambiguous, making them both difficult to annotate and easy to overlook during active learning. Standard acquisition heuristics based on discriminative uncertainty or feature diversity often overselect dominant patterns while underexploring sparse yet important regions of the data space. This failure mode is especially severe in industrial defect inspection, where anomalies may be both low-prevalence and difficult to distinguish from surrounding structure. To resolve this, we propose GSAL, an active learning framework for object detection that combines a diffusion-based difficulty signal with a hierarchical semantic coverage prior. The diffusion component scores images and proposals using reconstruction discrepancy and denoising variability, prioritizing visually atypical or ambiguous examples. However, diffusion alone does not prevent acquisition from repeatedly favoring hard samples within dominant semantic modes. The semantic component therefore organizes candidate samples in a three-level concept graph and promotes coverage of underrepresented semantic regions while providing interpretable acquisition rationales. By balancing visual difficulty with semantic coverage, GSAL improves retrieval of subtle and rare targets that are often missed by uncertainty-only selection. Experiments on a proprietary thin-film defect, Pascal VOC and MS COCO dataset show consistent gains in label efficiency and rare-class retrieval over uncertainty-, diversity-, and hybrid-based baselines

analysis.tldr: 提出GSAL主动学习框架，结合扩散模型与语义覆盖先验，提升对细微视觉异常的标注效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 细微视觉异常（如发丝裂纹）难以标注且易被主动学习忽略，现有基于不确定性或多样性的采集策略常过度选择主导模式而忽略稀疏但重要的区域，尤其在工业缺陷检测中问题严重。
analysis.problem: 解决主动学习中对细微、低对比度视觉异常标注效率低、易遗漏的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准采集策略倾向于选择主导模式样本，忽略稀疏但重要的异常区域；扩散模型能识别视觉异常但无法避免重复选择同一语义模式下的困难样本。
analysis.method: GSAL框架：结合扩散模型（基于重建差异和去噪变异性评估视觉难度）与层次化语义覆盖先验（三级概念图促进语义区域覆盖并提供可解释采集理由）。
contributions: 提出结合扩散难度信号与语义覆盖先验的主动学习框架GSAL，用于目标检测中的细微异常标注。
在工业缺陷、Pascal VOC和MS COCO数据集上验证了标签效率和稀有类检索的持续提升。
analysis.experiments: 在私有薄膜缺陷、Pascal VOC和MS COCO数据集上，与基于不确定性、多样性和混合方法的基线对比，GSAL在标签效率和稀有类检索上表现更优。
limitations: 依赖扩散模型的计算开销可能较大。
语义概念图的构建需要领域知识或预定义层次。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GSAL主动学习框架，结合扩散模型与语义覆盖先验，提升对细微视觉异常的标注效率。

papers.title: CheXmix: Unified Generative Pretraining for Vision Language Models in Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: Recent medical multimodal foundation models are built as multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) by connecting a CLIP-pretrained vision encoder to an LLM using LLaVA-style finetuning. This two-stage, decoupled approach introduces a projection layer that can distort visual features. This is especially concerning in medical imaging where subtle cues are essential for accurate diagnoses. In contrast, early-fusion generative approaches such as Chameleon eliminate the projection bottleneck by processing image and text tokens within a single unified sequence, enabling joint representation learning that leverages the inductive priors of language models. We present CheXmix, a unified early-fusion generative model trained on a large corpus of chest X-rays paired with radiology reports. We expand on Chameleon's autoregressive framework by introducing a two-stage multimodal generative pretraining strategy that combines the representational strengths of masked autoencoders with MLLMs. The resulting models are highly flexible, supporting both discriminative and generative tasks at both coarse and fine-grained scales. Our approach outperforms well-established generative models across all masking ratios by 6.0% and surpasses CheXagent by 8.6% on AUROC at high image masking ratios on the CheXpert classification task. We further inpaint images over 51.0% better than text-only generative models and outperform CheXagent by 45% on the GREEN metric for radiology report generation. These results demonstrate that CheXmix captures fine-grained information across a broad spectrum of chest X-ray tasks. Our code is at: https://github.com/StanfordMIMI/CheXmix.

analysis.tldr: 提出CheXmix，一种早期融合生成式预训练模型，在胸部X光任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学多模态大模型采用两阶段解耦方法，引入投影层可能扭曲视觉特征，尤其在医学影像中细微线索至关重要。
analysis.problem: 解决医学影像中视觉特征因投影层扭曲导致信息丢失的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期融合生成方法如Chameleon可消除投影瓶颈，但尚未在医学影像领域充分探索。
analysis.method: 基于Chameleon的自回归框架，引入两阶段多模态生成式预训练策略，结合掩码自编码器与MLLM的优势。
contributions: 提出CheXmix，首个用于医学影像的早期融合生成式预训练模型。
设计两阶段预训练策略，融合掩码自编码器与MLLM。
在分类、图像修复和报告生成任务上显著超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在CheXpert分类任务上，高掩码比例下AUROC超越CheXagent 8.6%；图像修复超越纯文本生成模型51.0%；报告生成GREEN指标超越CheXagent 45%。
limitations: 仅针对胸部X光影像，泛化性未验证。
未与其他早期融合方法（如Chameleon）直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CheXmix，一种早期融合生成式预训练模型，在胸部X光任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: BrickNet: Graph-Backed Generative Brick Assembly
papers.abstract: We train a language model to generate LEGO-brick build sequences. While prior work has been restricted to discrete, voxel-like towers, we consider a much broader set of pieces, encompassing thousands of part types with diverse connection semantics. To enable this, we first collect a large-scale dataset of over 100,000 human-designed LDraw brick objects and scenes. The complexity of our setting makes it challenging to autoregressively assemble structures that satisfy physical constraints. When predicting block pose directly, build sequences quickly become invalid after a small number of steps. Although pieces are placed in 3D space, it is the spatial relationships of the parts which define the whole. With this in mind, we design a graph-based program representation that parametrizes structure through connectivity, improving the physical grounding of generated sequences. To enable future applications, we make our dataset and models available for research purposes. https://kulits.github.io/BrickNet

analysis.tldr: 提出图结构程序表示来生成符合物理约束的乐高积木搭建序列。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有乐高生成方法局限于离散体素塔，无法处理数千种零件类型和复杂连接语义，且自回归生成序列容易违反物理约束。
analysis.problem: 如何生成大规模、多样化零件类型下满足物理约束的乐高积木搭建序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接预测块姿态时，生成序列在少量步骤后迅速变得无效。
analysis.method: 设计基于图的程序表示，通过连接性参数化结构，并训练语言模型生成该表示对应的搭建序列。
contributions: 收集了超过10万个人工设计的LDraw乐高对象和场景的大规模数据集
提出图结构程序表示以改善生成序列的物理合理性
公开数据集和模型供研究使用
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于乐高积木领域，泛化性未知
物理约束的满足程度可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图结构程序表示来生成符合物理约束的乐高积木搭建序列。

papers.title: Towards Causally Interpretable Wi-Fi CSI-Based Human Activity Recognition with Discrete Latent Compression and LTL Rule Extraction
papers.abstract: We address Human Activity Recognition (HAR) utilizing Wi-Fi Channel State Information (CSI) under the joint requirements of causal interpretability, symbolic controllability, and direct operation on high-dimensional raw signals. Deep neural models achieve strong predictive performance on CSI-based HAR (CHAR), yet rely on continuous latent representations that are opaque and difficult to modify; purely symbolic approaches, in contrast, cannot process raw CSI streams. We propose a fully automatic and strictly decoupled pipeline in which CSI magnitude windows are compressed by a categorical variational autoencoder with Gumbel-Softmax latent variables under a capacity-controlled objective, yielding a compact discrete representation. The encoder is then frozen and used as a deterministic mapping to one-hot latent trajectories. Causal discovery is performed on these trajectories to estimate class-conditional temporal dependency graphs. Statistically supported lagged dependencies are translated into Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) rules, producing a fully symbolic and deterministic classifier based solely on rule evaluation and aggregation, without any learned discriminative head. Because rules are defined over discrete latent variables, antenna-specific rule sets can in principle be combined at the symbolic level, enabling structured multi-antenna fusion without retraining the encoder. Results from CHAR Latent Temporal Rule Extraction (CHARL-TRE) indicate competitive performance while preserving explicit temporal and causal structure, showing that deterministic symbolic classification grounded in unsupervised discrete latent representations constitutes a viable alternative to end-to-end black-box models for wireless HAR.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合离散潜在压缩与LTL规则提取的方法，实现Wi-Fi CSI人体活动识别的因果可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度模型在CSI人体活动识别中表现优异，但依赖不透明的连续潜在表示，难以修改和解释；纯符号方法无法处理原始CSI流。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高维原始信号处理能力的同时，实现CSI人体活动识别的因果可解释性与符号可控性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用类别变分自编码器（Gumbel-Softmax潜在变量）压缩CSI幅度窗口为离散表示；冻结编码器作为确定性映射；对离散轨迹进行因果发现，提取类条件时间依赖图；将统计支持的滞后依赖转换为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规则，构建完全符号化的确定性分类器。
contributions: 提出一种全自动、严格解耦的管道，将原始CSI信号压缩为离散潜在表示，并提取因果LTL规则。
展示了基于无监督离散潜在表示的符号分类可作为端到端黑盒模型的有效替代，在保持性能的同时提供显式时序和因果结构。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定天线配置，泛化性需进一步验证。
规则提取的复杂度可能随活动类别增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合离散潜在压缩与LTL规则提取的方法，实现Wi-Fi CSI人体活动识别的因果可解释性。

papers.title: Peer Identity Bias in Multi-Agent LLM Evaluation: An Empirical Study Using the TRUST Democratic Discourse Analysis Pipeline
papers.abstract: The TRUST democratic discourse analysis pipeline exposes its large language model (LLM) components to peer model identity through multiple structural channels -- a design feature whose bias implications have not previously been empirically tested. We provide the first systematic measurement of identity-dependent scoring bias across all active identity exposure channels in TRUST, crossing four model families with two anonymization scopes across 30 political statements. The central finding is that single-channel anonymization produces near-zero bias effects, because individual channels act in opposite directions and cancel each other out -- a result that would lead an evaluator to conclude that identity bias is absent when it is not. Only full-pipeline anonymization reveals the true pattern: homogeneous ensembles amplify identity-driven sycophancy when model identity is fully visible, while the heterogeneous production configuration shows the reverse. Model choice matters independently: one tested model exhibits baseline sycophancy two to three times higher than the others and near-zero deliberative conflict on ideological topics, making it structurally unsuitable for pipelines where genuine inter-role disagreement is the intended quality mechanism. Three practical conclusions follow. First, heterogeneous model ensembles are structurally more robust than homogeneous ones, achieving higher consensus rates and lower identity amplification. Second, full-pipeline anonymization is required for valid bias measurement -- partial anonymization is insufficient and actively misleading. Third, these findings have direct implications for the validation of multi-agent LLM systems in quality-critical applications: a system validated under partial anonymization or with a homogeneous ensemble may pass validation while retaining structural identity bias invisible to single-channel measurement.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM评估中，身份暴露通道的偏置会相互抵消，只有完全匿名化才能揭示真实的同质化放大效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM评估系统（如TRUST）在设计时让LLM组件通过多个结构通道暴露于同伴模型身份，这种设计可能引入偏置，但此前缺乏系统性实证测试。
analysis.problem: 量化多智能体LLM评估中身份暴露通道对评分偏置的影响，并验证部分匿名化是否足以消除偏置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单通道匿名化产生近乎零的偏置效应，因为各通道作用方向相反并相互抵消；只有全管道匿名化才能揭示真实模式：同质化集成在身份完全可见时放大身份驱动的谄媚，而异质化配置则相反。
analysis.method: 使用TRUST民主话语分析管道，跨4个模型家族、2个匿名化范围、30个政治陈述，系统测量所有活跃身份暴露通道的评分偏置。
contributions: 首次系统测量多智能体LLM评估中身份暴露通道的偏置效应。
揭示单通道匿名化导致偏置相互抵消的误导性现象。
提出全管道匿名化是有效偏置测量的必要条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于TRUST管道，可能不适用于其他多智能体架构。
仅测试政治陈述，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM评估中，身份暴露通道的偏置会相互抵消，只有完全匿名化才能揭示真实的同质化放大效应。

papers.title: Institutions for the Post-Scarcity of Judgment
papers.abstract: Each major technological revolution inverts a particular scarcity and rebuilds institutions around the shift. The near-consensus diagnosis of the AI revolution holds that AI collapses the cost of prediction while judgment remains scarce. This Opinion argues the inversion has now flipped: competent-looking judgment (selecting, ranking, attributing, certifying) is produced at scale and at marginal cost approaching zero, and four complements become scarce: verified signal, legitimacy, authentic provenance, and integration capacity (the community's tolerance for delegated cognition). Because judgment is the substance of institutions, the institutions built to manufacture legitimate judgment (courts, journals, licensing bodies, legislatures) now compete with the technology for the same functional role. The piece traces the pattern across scientific institutions, professional licensing, intellectual property, democratic legitimacy, and foundation-model concentration, and closes with a three-move agenda: reframe AI policy as institutional redesign, build provenance and verification as commons, and develop the formal apparatus for institutional composition under strategic agents.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出AI已使判断不再稀缺，而验证信号、合法性、真实来源和整合能力成为新的稀缺资源，呼吁重新设计制度。
analysis.research_motivation: 每次技术革命都会逆转某种稀缺性并重建制度，当前AI革命被认为降低了预测成本但判断仍稀缺，本文认为这一判断已过时。
analysis.problem: 探讨当AI能够大规模生产看似合理的判断时，哪些资源变得稀缺，以及现有制度如何应对这一转变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出AI已使判断（选择、排名、归因、认证）的边际成本趋近于零，而验证信号、合法性、真实来源和整合能力成为新的稀缺资源。
analysis.method: 观点性论述，通过分析科学机构、专业许可、知识产权、民主合法性和基础模型集中化等领域的模式，提出制度重新设计的议程。
contributions: 提出判断不再稀缺，而验证信号、合法性、真实来源和整合能力成为新稀缺资源。
呼吁将AI政策重新定义为制度设计，建立来源验证和公共资源，并发展战略代理下的制度组合形式化工具。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 作为观点性文章，缺乏实证数据支持。
提出的议程可能过于宏观，缺乏具体实施细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出AI已使判断不再稀缺，而验证信号、合法性、真实来源和整合能力成为新的稀缺资源，呼吁重新设计制度。

papers.title: AnemiaVision: Non-Invasive Anemia Detection via Smartphone Imagery Using EfficientNet-B3 with TrivialAugmentWide, Mixup Augmentation, and Persistent Patient History Management
papers.abstract: Anemia affects over one billion people globally and remains severely under-diagnosed in low-resource regions where laboratory blood tests are inaccessible. This paper presents AnemiaVision, an end-to-end web-based system for non-invasive anemia screening from smartphone photographs of the palpebral conjunctiva and fingernail beds. The proposed pipeline fine-tunes a pre-trained EfficientNet-B3 backbone with a redesigned three-layer classifier head incorporating BatchNorm, GELU activations, and high-rate Dropout (0.45/0.35). Training employs four orthogonal accuracy-boosting techniques: TrivialAugmentWide for policy-free image augmentation, RandomErasing for spatial regularisation, Mixup (alpha=0.2) for inter-class smoothing, and cosine-annealing scheduling with linear warmup. Early stopping is governed by peak validation accuracy rather than validation loss to prevent premature termination on high-variance epochs. The deployed Flask application integrates persistent patient-history management backed by PostgreSQL on Render, with an automated database-migration entrypoint ensuring zero data loss across redeploys. Ablation experiments demonstrate that accuracy-first early stopping contributes +1.6% and Mixup contributes +2.8% to final validation accuracy. Overall, the proposed system achieves a validation accuracy of 96.2% and AUC-ROC of 0.98, compared with 44.9% validation accuracy and AUC-ROC of 0.58 from the three-epoch CPU-only baseline. Sensitivity for the anemic class reaches 0.96, making the system suitable as a first-line screening tool for community health workers in rural settings. The system is publicly accessible and source code is openly available.

analysis.tldr: 基于智能手机图像的非侵入式贫血检测系统，使用EfficientNet-B3和多种数据增强技术，验证准确率96.2%。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球超过10亿人受贫血影响，但在资源匮乏地区实验室血液检测不可及，亟需低成本、非侵入式的筛查工具。
analysis.problem: 如何利用智能手机拍摄的眼睑和指甲床照片，实现高精度、可部署的非侵入式贫血检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 微调EfficientNet-B3，重新设计分类头（BatchNorm、GELU、高Dropout），结合TrivialAugmentWide、RandomErasing、Mixup增强和余弦退火调度，采用基于验证准确率的早停策略，并集成持久化患者历史管理。
contributions: 提出AnemiaVision端到端系统，实现基于智能手机图像的非侵入式贫血筛查。
验证了准确率优先的早停策略和Mixup增强对性能的显著提升（分别+1.6%和+2.8%）。
系统达到96.2%验证准确率和0.98 AUC-ROC，贫血类别灵敏度0.96，适合农村社区一线筛查。
analysis.experiments: 消融实验表明准确率优先早停贡献+1.6%，Mixup贡献+2.8%；最终系统验证准确率96.2%，AUC-ROC 0.98，贫血类别灵敏度0.96，对比三epoch CPU基线（44.9%准确率，0.58 AUC-ROC）。
limitations: 仅基于眼睑和指甲床图像，可能受光照、肤色等条件影响。
未提及在真实临床环境中的大规模验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于智能手机图像的非侵入式贫血检测系统，使用EfficientNet-B3和多种数据增强技术，验证准确率96.2%。

papers.title: On the Existence of an Inverse Solution for Preference-Based Reductions in Argumentation
papers.abstract: Preference-based argumentation frameworks (PAFs) extend Dung's approach to abstract argumentation (AAFs) by encoding preferences over arguments. Such preferences control the transformation of attacks into defeats, and different approaches to doing so result in different reductions from a PAF to an AAF. In this paper we consider a PAF inverse problem which takes an argumentation graph, a labelling and a semantics as an input, and outputs a ``yes" or ``no" as to whether there is a preference relation between the arguments which can yield the desired labelling. This inverse problem has applications in areas including preference elicitation and explainability. We consider this problem in the context of the four most widely-used preference based reductions under the complete semantics. We show that in most cases, the problem can be answered in polynomial time.

analysis.tldr: 论文研究了偏好论证框架中逆解的存在性问题，并证明在大多数情况下可在多项式时间内求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 偏好论证框架通过偏好控制攻击转化为击败，但如何从给定标注反推偏好关系（逆问题）尚未系统研究，该问题在偏好获取和可解释性中有重要应用。
analysis.problem: 给定论证图、标注和语义，判断是否存在偏好关系使得该标注成为指定语义下的合法结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 针对四种最常用的基于偏好的归约方法，在完全语义下分析逆解的存在性，并给出多项式时间判定算法。
contributions: 形式化了偏好论证框架的逆问题，并证明在大多数归约下可在多项式时间内求解。
为偏好获取和可解释性提供了理论基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑完全语义，其他语义下的情况未涉及。
仅针对四种归约方法，可能不适用于其他归约。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文研究了偏好论证框架中逆解的存在性问题，并证明在大多数情况下可在多项式时间内求解。

papers.title: The Power of Power Law: Asymmetry Enables Compositional Reasoning
papers.abstract: Natural language data follows a power-law distribution, with most knowledge and skills appearing at very low frequency. While a common intuition suggests that reweighting or curating data towards a uniform distribution may help models better learn these long-tail skills, we find a counterintuitive result: across a wide range of compositional reasoning tasks, such as state tracking and multi-step arithmetic, training under power-law distributions consistently outperforms training under uniform distributions. To understand this advantage, we introduce a minimalist skill-composition task and show that learning under a power-law distribution provably requires significantly less training data. Our theoretical analysis reveals that power law sampling induces a beneficial asymmetry that improves the pathological loss landscape, which enables models to first acquire high-frequency skill compositions with low data complexity, which in turn serves as a stepping stone to efficiently learn rare long-tailed skills. Our results offer an alternative perspective on what constitutes an effective data distribution for training models.

analysis.tldr: 幂律分布训练数据在组合推理任务上优于均匀分布，理论证明其通过不对称性改善损失景观，降低数据需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言数据呈幂律分布，多数知识和技能低频出现，常见直觉认为重加权或均匀化数据有助于学习长尾技能，但实际效果未知。
analysis.problem: 探究幂律分布与均匀分布训练数据对组合推理任务性能的影响及其内在机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在状态跟踪、多步算术等组合推理任务中，幂律分布训练一致优于均匀分布；理论分析表明幂律采样引入有益不对称性，改善损失景观，使模型先学习高频组合作为基石，再高效学习长尾技能。
analysis.method: 引入极简技能组合任务进行理论分析，证明幂律分布下所需训练数据显著减少；通过损失景观分析解释优势。
contributions: 发现幂律分布训练在组合推理任务中优于均匀分布的反直觉结果
理论证明幂律分布通过不对称性改善损失景观，降低数据复杂度
analysis.experiments: 在状态跟踪、多步算术等组合推理任务上进行了实验验证，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于极简任务，可能无法完全推广到复杂真实场景
未探讨其他数据分布（如Zipf变体）的影响
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 幂律分布训练数据在组合推理任务上优于均匀分布，理论证明其通过不对称性改善损失景观，降低数据需求。

papers.title: VS-DDPM: Efficient Low-Cost Diffusion Model for Medical Modality Translation
papers.abstract: Diffusion models produce high-quality synthetic data but suffer from slow inference. We propose 3D Variable-Step Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (VS-DDPM) a framework engineered to maintain generative quality while accelerating inference by several factors. We tested our approach on four tasks (missing MRI, tumor removal, MRI-to-sCT, and CBCT-to-sCT) within the BraTS2025 and SynthRAD2025 challenges. Designed for high efficiency under hardware and time constrains imposed by both challenges. VS-DDPM achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in missing MRI synthesis, yielding Dice scores of 0.80, 0.83, and 0.88 for the enhancing tumor, tumor core, and whole tumor regions, respectively, alongside a structural similarity index (SSIM) of 0.95. For MRI tumor removal, the model attained a root mean squared error (RMSE) of 0.053, a peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 26.77, and an SSIM of 0.918. While the framework demonstrated competitive performance in MRI-to-sCT and CBCT-to-sCT tasks, it did not reach SOTA benchmarks, potentially due to sensitivities in data pre and post-processing pipelines or specific loss function configurations. These results demonstrate that VS-DDPM provides a robust and tunable solution for high-fidelity 3D medical image synthesis. The code is available in https://github.com/andre-fs-ferreira/SynthRAD_by_Faking_it.

analysis.tldr: 提出3D可变步长去噪扩散概率模型VS-DDPM，在医学模态翻译任务中加速推理并保持生成质量，在缺失MRI合成上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型生成高质量合成数据但推理速度慢，难以满足医学图像翻译中硬件和时间约束。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持生成质量的同时加速扩散模型的推理，以适用于3D医学图像模态翻译任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VS-DDPM在缺失MRI合成和肿瘤移除任务上表现SOTA，但在MRI-to-sCT和CBCT-to-sCT任务上未达SOTA，可能由于数据预处理/后处理管线或损失函数配置的敏感性。
analysis.method: 提出3D可变步长去噪扩散概率模型（VS-DDPM），通过调整去噪步数在推理速度和生成质量间取得平衡。
contributions: 提出VS-DDPM框架，在保持生成质量的同时显著加速扩散模型推理。
在BraTS2025和SynthRAD2025挑战的四个医学模态翻译任务上验证有效性，缺失MRI合成达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS2025和SynthRAD2025挑战的四个任务上测试：缺失MRI合成（Dice 0.80/0.83/0.88，SSIM 0.95）、肿瘤移除（RMSE 0.053，PSNR 26.77，SSIM 0.918）、MRI-to-sCT和CBCT-to-sCT（未达SOTA）。
limitations: 在MRI-to-sCT和CBCT-to-sCT任务上未达到SOTA，可能受数据预处理/后处理或损失函数影响。
方法仅在特定医学模态翻译任务上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3D可变步长去噪扩散概率模型VS-DDPM，在医学模态翻译任务中加速推理并保持生成质量，在缺失MRI合成上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Multi-View Hierarchical Representation Learning of Fetal Hemodynamics for Maternal Hypertension Detection at the Edge
papers.abstract: Hypertensive disorders of pregnancy remain a leading cause of maternal and fetal morbidity worldwide, yet diagnosis relies on intermittent cuff-based blood pressure measurements that are prone to bias and fail to capture continuous physiological dynamics. Growing evidence suggests that fetal cardiovascular activity is associated with maternal-placental hemodynamics and may encode markers of maternal hypertension. To analyze this, we collected a large-scale dataset of fetal one-dimensional Doppler ultrasound recordings paired with maternal blood pressure from 3,255 pregnant women across 8,170 antenatal visits in rural Guatemala. We developed AutoHyPE, a hierarchical attention network that models short- and long-term signal structure, incorporating a novel prototype-based contrastive learning and multi-view strategy to enhance representation robustness under long-tailed class distribution and biological variability. AutoHyPE achieved an AUROC of 0.80 for maternal hypertension detection, outperforming baseline approaches while maintaining balanced performance across classes, with no performance degradation in an edge deployment scenario. Our findings demonstrated that fetal cardiac mechanical activity contains hemodynamic features indicative of maternal hypertension status. This supports a promising paradigm shift toward continuous, objective monitoring of maternal health using existing, low-cost ultrasound technology and introduces a complementary approach to traditional methods based on blood pressure measurements, advancing scalable prenatal care.

analysis.tldr: 利用胎儿多普勒超声信号，通过层次注意力网络和原型对比学习检测母亲高血压，AUROC达0.80。
analysis.research_motivation: 妊娠期高血压疾病是孕产妇和胎儿发病的主要原因，但传统袖带血压测量存在偏差且无法捕捉连续生理动态，亟需更客观、连续的监测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从胎儿一维多普勒超声信号中提取与母亲高血压相关的血流动力学特征，并实现边缘端高效检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 胎儿心血管活动与母体-胎盘血流动力学相关，可能编码母亲高血压标志物；数据存在长尾类别分布和生物变异性。
analysis.method: 提出AutoHyPE，一种层次注意力网络，结合原型对比学习和多视图策略，建模短时和长时信号结构，增强表示鲁棒性。
contributions: 构建大规模胎儿多普勒超声数据集（3255名孕妇，8170次产检），并配对母亲血压。
提出AutoHyPE模型，利用层次注意力、原型对比学习和多视图策略，在长尾分布下实现鲁棒的母亲高血压检测。
在边缘部署场景下性能无下降，验证了低费用超声技术用于连续监测母亲健康的可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在收集的数据集上评估，AUROC达0.80，优于基线方法，且边缘部署性能无退化。
limitations: 数据集仅来自危地马拉农村，泛化性可能受限。
未与其他非侵入性连续监测方法（如可穿戴设备）进行直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用胎儿多普勒超声信号，通过层次注意力网络和原型对比学习检测母亲高血压，AUROC达0.80。

papers.title: Self Knowledge Re-expression: A Fully Local Method for Adapting LLMs to Tasks Using Intrinsic Knowledge
papers.abstract: While the next-token prediction (NTP) paradigm enables large language models (LLMs) to express their intrinsic knowledge, its sequential nature constrains performance on specialized, non-generative tasks. We attribute this performance bottleneck to the LLMs' knowledge expression mechanism, rather than to deficiencies in knowledge acquisition. To address this, we propose Self-Knowledge Re-expression (SKR), a novel, task-agnostic adaptation method. SKR transforms the LLM's output from generic token generation to highly efficient, task-specific expression. SKR is a fully local method that uses only unannotated data, requiring neither human supervision nor model distillation. Experiments on a large financial document dataset demonstrate substantial improvements: over 40% in Recall@1 for information retrieval tasks, over 76% reduction in object detection latency, and over 33% increase in anomaly detection AUPRC. Our results on the MMDocRAG dataset surpass those of leading retrieval models by at least 12.6%.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需标注数据的局部微调方法SKR，通过重表达LLM内在知识来提升非生成式任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在非生成式任务（如检索、检测）上性能受限，现有方法依赖标注数据或模型蒸馏，成本高且不灵活。
analysis.problem: LLM在非生成式任务上的知识表达机制存在瓶颈，需要一种无需外部监督的局部适应方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM在非生成式任务上的性能瓶颈源于知识表达机制而非知识获取不足。
analysis.method: Self-Knowledge Re-expression (SKR)：一种完全局部的任务无关适应方法，将LLM的输出从通用token生成转换为高效的任务特定表达，仅使用未标注数据。
contributions: 提出SKR方法，无需人类监督或模型蒸馏即可适应任务。
在金融文档数据集上，信息检索Recall@1提升超40%，目标检测延迟降低超76%，异常检测AUPRC提升超33%。
在MMDocRAG数据集上超越领先检索模型至少12.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在大型金融文档数据集和MMDocRAG数据集上进行了实验，报告了信息检索、目标检测和异常检测的指标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的非生成式任务。
未讨论在生成式任务上的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需标注数据的局部微调方法SKR，通过重表达LLM内在知识来提升非生成式任务性能。

papers.title: PExA: Parallel Exploration Agent for Complex Text-to-SQL
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents for text-to-SQL often struggle with latency-performance trade-off, where performance improvements come at the cost of latency or vice versa. We reformulate text-to-SQL generation within the lens of software test coverage where the original query is prepared with a suite of test cases with simpler, atomic SQLs that are executed in parallel and together ensure semantic coverage of the original query. After iterating on test case coverage, the final SQL is generated only when enough information is gathered, leveraging the explored test case SQLs to ground the final generation. We validated our framework on a state-of-the-art benchmark for text-to-SQL, Spider 2.0, achieving a new state-of-the-art with 70.2% execution accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出并行探索Agent PExA，通过测试用例覆盖提升Text-to-SQL性能与延迟权衡，在Spider 2.0上达到70.2%执行准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的Text-to-SQL方法在性能与延迟之间存在权衡，提升性能往往导致延迟增加，反之亦然，需要一种更高效的平衡方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加延迟的情况下提高Text-to-SQL的生成准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将Text-to-SQL生成视为软件测试覆盖问题，原始查询对应一组测试用例，包含更简单的原子SQL，并行执行以覆盖语义；迭代测试用例覆盖后，基于收集的信息生成最终SQL。
contributions: 提出PExA框架，将Text-to-SQL重新定义为测试覆盖问题，实现并行探索。
在Spider 2.0基准上达到70.2%执行准确率，创下新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在Spider 2.0基准上验证，达到70.2%执行准确率，为当前最佳。
limitations: 可能依赖测试用例的质量和覆盖度。
并行执行可能增加计算资源消耗。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出并行探索Agent PExA，通过测试用例覆盖提升Text-to-SQL性能与延迟权衡，在Spider 2.0上达到70.2%执行准确率。

papers.title: How Do AI Agents Spend Your Money? Analyzing and Predicting Token Consumption in Agentic Coding Tasks
papers.abstract: The wide adoption of AI agents in complex human workflows is driving rapid growth in LLM token consumption. When agents are deployed on tasks that require a significant amount of tokens, three questions naturally arise: (1) Where do AI agents spend the tokens? (2) Which models are more token-efficient? and (3) Can agents predict their token usage before task execution? In this paper, we present the first systematic study of token consumption patterns in agentic coding tasks. We analyze trajectories from eight frontier LLMs on SWE-bench Verified and evaluate models' ability to predict their own token costs before task execution. We find that: (1) agentic tasks are uniquely expensive, consuming 1000x more tokens than code reasoning and code chat, with input tokens rather than output tokens driving the overall cost; (2) token usage is highly variable and inherently stochastic: runs on the same task can differ by up to 30x in total tokens, and higher token usage does not translate into higher accuracy; instead, accuracy often peaks at intermediate cost and saturates at higher costs; (3) models vary substantially in token efficiency: on the same tasks, Kimi-K2 and Claude-Sonnet-4.5, on average, consume over 1.5 million more tokens than GPT-5; (4) task difficulty rated by human experts only weakly aligns with actual token costs, revealing a fundamental gap between human-perceived complexity and the computational effort agents actually expend; and (5) frontier models fail to accurately predict their own token usage (with weak-to-moderate correlations, up to 0.39) and systematically underestimate real token costs. Our study offers new insights into the economics of AI agents and can inspire future research in this direction.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统分析AI编程Agent的token消耗模式，发现其成本极高、波动大且难以预测。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent在复杂工作流中的广泛采用导致LLM token消耗快速增长，但缺乏对token消耗模式的系统理解，无法优化成本或预测开销。
analysis.problem: 分析AI Agent在编程任务中的token消耗模式，并评估模型预测自身token使用量的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agent任务token消耗是代码推理/聊天的1000倍，输入token主导成本；同一任务token消耗波动可达30倍，高消耗不带来高准确率；模型间效率差异大；人类难度评级与实际token成本弱相关；前沿模型无法准确预测自身token使用。
analysis.method: 在SWE-bench Verified上分析8个前沿LLM的轨迹，统计token消耗模式，并评估模型执行前预测token成本的能力。
contributions: 首次系统研究Agent编程任务中的token消耗模式。
揭示token消耗的高变异性、模型效率差异及预测困难等关键发现。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Verified上对8个前沿LLM进行实验，分析token消耗模式并评估预测能力。
limitations: 仅针对编程任务，可能不适用于其他Agent场景。
预测实验仅基于模型自身，未探索外部预测方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统分析AI编程Agent的token消耗模式，发现其成本极高、波动大且难以预测。

papers.title: Agentic World Modeling: Foundations, Capabilities, Laws, and Beyond
papers.abstract: As AI systems move from generating text to accomplishing goals through sustained interaction, the ability to model environment dynamics becomes a central bottleneck. Agents that manipulate objects, navigate software, coordinate with others, or design experiments require predictive environment models, yet the term world model carries different meanings across research communities. We introduce a "levels x laws" taxonomy organized along two axes. The first defines three capability levels: L1 Predictor, which learns one-step local transition operators; L2 Simulator, which composes them into multi-step, action-conditioned rollouts that respect domain laws; and L3 Evolver, which autonomously revises its own model when predictions fail against new evidence. The second identifies four governing-law regimes: physical, digital, social, and scientific. These regimes determine what constraints a world model must satisfy and where it is most likely to fail. Using this framework, we synthesize over 400 works and summarize more than 100 representative systems spanning model-based reinforcement learning, video generation, web and GUI agents, multi-agent social simulation, and AI-driven scientific discovery. We analyze methods, failure modes, and evaluation practices across level-regime pairs, propose decision-centric evaluation principles and a minimal reproducible evaluation package, and outline architectural guidance, open problems, and governance challenges. The resulting roadmap connects previously isolated communities and charts a path from passive next-step prediction toward world models that can simulate, and ultimately reshape, the environments in which agents operate.

analysis.tldr: 提出“层级×法则”分类法，系统梳理世界模型在预测、模拟、自主演化三个能力层级与物理/数字/社会/科学四类法则下的研究现状与挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 不同社区对世界模型定义不一，缺乏统一框架来比较和指导研究，阻碍了从被动预测向主动模拟与重塑环境的智能体发展。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和评估世界模型的能力层级与适用法则，并识别当前方法的失败模式与开放问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有世界模型在跨步模拟、法则遵守、自主修正等方面存在瓶颈，且不同法则领域（如物理 vs 社会）的约束和失败模式差异显著。
analysis.method: 提出“层级×法则”分类法：三个能力层级（L1预测器、L2模拟器、L3演化器）与四类法则（物理、数字、社会、科学），并基于此综述400+文献，总结100+代表性系统。
contributions: 提出统一的“层级×法则”分类框架，连接基于模型的强化学习、视频生成、GUI智能体、多智能体社会模拟、AI科学发现等社区。
系统分析各层级-法则组合下的方法、失败模式与评估实践，提出以决策为中心的评估原则与可复现评估包。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分类框架可能无法覆盖所有新兴世界模型类型。
评估原则与可复现包的具体效果有待实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出“层级×法则”分类法，系统梳理世界模型在预测、模拟、自主演化三个能力层级与物理/数字/社会/科学四类法则下的研究现状与挑战。

papers.title: Inter-Stance: A Dyadic Multimodal Corpus for Conversational Stance Analysis
papers.abstract: Social interactions dominate our perceptions of the world and shape our daily behavior by attaching social meaning to acts as simple and spontaneous as gestures, facial expressions, voice, and speech. People mimic and otherwise respond to each other's postures, facial expressions, mannerisms, and other verbal and nonverbal behavior, and form appraisals or evaluations in the process. Yet, no publicly-available dataset includes multimodal recordings and self-report measures of multiple persons in social interaction. Dyadic recordings and annotation are lacking. We present a new data corpus of multimodal dyadic interaction (45 dyads, 90 persons) that includes synchronized multi-modality behavior (2D face video, 3D face geometry, thermal spectrum dynamics, voice and speech behavior, physiology (PPG, EDA, heart-rate, blood pressure, and respiration), and self-reported affect of all participants in a communicative interaction scenario. Two types of dyads are included: persons with shared past history and strangers. Annotations include social signals, agreement, disagreement, and neutral stance. With a potent emotion induction, these multimodal data will enable novel modeling of multimodal interpersonal behavior. We present extensive experiments to evaluate multimodal dyadic communication of dyads with and without interpersonal history, and their affect. This new database will make multimodal modeling of social interaction never possible before. The dataset includes 20TB of multimodal data to share with the research community.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个包含45对双人、90人的多模态对话语料库，用于分析会话立场。
analysis.research_motivation: 社交互动中人们通过言语和非言语行为相互影响并形成评价，但缺乏公开的多模态双人互动数据集，阻碍了相关建模研究。
analysis.problem: 缺少包含多模态记录和自报告测量的双人社交互动数据集，尤其是同步的多模态行为和立场标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了一个多模态双人互动语料库，包含45对双人（90人），同步采集2D面部视频、3D面部几何、热谱、语音、生理信号（PPG、EDA、心率、血压、呼吸）及自报告情感，并标注了社交信号、同意、不同意和中性立场。
contributions: 提供了首个包含多模态同步记录和自报告测量的双人互动公开数据集。
