数据集包含45对双人（90人），涵盖有共同历史和无共同历史的两种类型，并进行了情感诱导。
通过大量实验评估了双人互动的多模态沟通，验证了数据集的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 进行了大量实验评估双人互动的多模态沟通，包括有无人际历史的影响及情感分析。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（45对双人），可能影响泛化性。
仅包含双人互动，未涉及多人场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个包含45对双人、90人的多模态对话语料库，用于分析会话立场。

papers.title: An Undecidability Proof for the Plan Existence Problem
papers.abstract: The plan existence problem asks, given a goal in the form of a formula in modal logic, an initial epistemic state (a pointed Kripke model), and a set of epistemic actions, whether there exists a sequence of actions that can be applied to reach the goal. We prove that even in the case where the preconditions of the epistemic actions have modal depth at most 1, and there are no postconditions, the plan existence problem is undecidable. The (un)decidability of this problem was previously unknown.

analysis.tldr: 证明即使在极简条件下，认知逻辑中的计划存在性问题是不可判定的。
analysis.research_motivation: 计划存在性问题是认知逻辑和自动规划领域的核心问题，其可判定性边界长期未知，尤其对于受限的认知动作模型。
analysis.problem: 确定在认知动作前提的模态深度至多为1且无后置条件时，计划存在性问题是否可判定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过归约到已知不可判定问题（如图灵机停机问题）来证明不可判定性。
contributions: 证明了在极简条件下（前提模态深度≤1，无后置条件）计划存在性问题的不可判定性。
解决了该问题此前未知的可判定性状态。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果仅适用于特定的认知逻辑框架，可能不直接推广到其他规划形式。
未提供任何可判定的子类或近似方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明即使在极简条件下，认知逻辑中的计划存在性问题是不可判定的。

papers.title: Aligning Dense Retrievers with LLM Utility via DistillationAligning Dense Retrievers with LLM Utility via Distillation
papers.abstract: Dense vector retrieval is the practical backbone of Retrieval- Augmented Generation (RAG), but similarity search can suffer from precision limitations. Conversely, utility-based approaches leveraging LLM re-ranking often achieve superior performance but are computationally prohibitive and prone to noise inherent in perplexity estimation. We propose Utility-Aligned Embeddings (UAE), a framework designed to merge these advantages into a practical, high-performance retrieval method. We formulate retrieval as a distribution matching problem, training a bi-encoder to imitate a utility distribution derived from perplexity reduction using a Utility-Modulated InfoNCE objective. This approach injects graded utility signals directly into the embedding space without requiring test-time LLM inference. On the QASPER benchmark, UAE improves retrieval Recall@1 by 30.59%, MAP by 30.16% and Token F1 by 17.3% over the strong semantic baseline BGE-Base. Crucially, UAE is over 180x faster than the efficient LLM re-ranking methods preserving competitive performance, demonstrating that aligning retrieval with generative utility yields reliable contexts at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出Utility-Aligned Embeddings (UAE)，通过蒸馏LLM效用信号训练稠密检索器，在QASPER上Recall@1提升30.59%，速度比LLM重排序快180倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 稠密向量检索是RAG的实用支柱，但相似性搜索精度有限；基于LLM效用的重排序性能好但计算昂贵且受困惑度噪声影响。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲效率的前提下，将LLM的效用信号融入稠密检索的嵌入空间，提升检索精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将检索建模为分布匹配问题，使用Utility-Modulated InfoNCE目标训练双编码器，使其模仿由困惑度降低导出的效用分布，无需测试时LLM推理。
contributions: 提出UAE框架，通过蒸馏LLM效用信号对齐稠密检索器与生成效用。
在QASPER基准上显著提升检索指标（Recall@1 +30.59%，MAP +30.16%），同时保持180倍以上的速度优势。
analysis.experiments: 在QASPER基准上评估，对比强语义基线BGE-Base和高效LLM重排序方法，报告了Recall@1、MAP和Token F1指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM的困惑度信号，泛化性需验证。
未讨论在更大规模或不同领域数据集上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Utility-Aligned Embeddings (UAE)，通过蒸馏LLM效用信号训练稠密检索器，在QASPER上Recall@1提升30.59%，速度比LLM重排序快180倍。

papers.title: Long-tail Internet photo reconstruction
papers.abstract: Internet photo collections exhibit an extremely long-tailed distribution: a few famous landmarks are densely photographed and easily reconstructed in 3D, while most real-world sites are represented with sparse, noisy, uneven imagery beyond the capabilities of both classical and learned 3D methods. We believe that tackling this long-tail regime represents one of the next frontiers for 3D foundation models. Although reliable ground-truth 3D supervision from sparse scenes is challenging to acquire, we observe that it can be effectively simulated by sampling sparse subsets from well-reconstructed Internet landmarks. To this end, we introduce MegaDepth-X, a large dataset of 3D reconstructions with clean, dense depth, together with a strategy for sampling sets of training images that mimic camera distributions in long-tail scenes. Finetuning 3D foundation models with these components yields robust reconstructions under extreme sparsity, and also enables more reliable reconstruction in symmetric and repetitive scenes, while preserving generalization to standard, dense 3D benchmark datasets.

analysis.tldr: 通过模拟长尾场景的稀疏相机分布，微调3D基础模型以提升互联网照片中稀疏、不均匀图像的重建鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 互联网照片集呈现极端长尾分布：少数地标密集拍摄且易于3D重建，而大多数真实场景图像稀疏、有噪声且不均匀，超出经典和学习的3D方法能力。解决这一长尾问题是3D基础模型的下一个前沿。
analysis.problem: 如何使3D重建方法在稀疏、不均匀的长尾场景中仍能鲁棒工作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到从重建良好的地标中采样稀疏子集可以有效模拟长尾场景的相机分布，从而提供可靠的3D监督。
analysis.method: 构建MegaDepth-X数据集（包含干净密集深度的3D重建），并设计训练图像采样策略以模拟长尾场景的相机分布，然后微调3D基础模型。
contributions: 提出MegaDepth-X数据集，包含大量具有干净密集深度的3D重建。
设计采样策略模拟长尾场景的相机分布，用于微调3D基础模型。
在极端稀疏、对称和重复场景中实现鲁棒重建，同时保持对标准密集3D基准的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖模拟数据，可能无法完全覆盖真实长尾场景的噪声和复杂性。
微调可能对特定基础模型架构敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过模拟长尾场景的稀疏相机分布，微调3D基础模型以提升互联网照片中稀疏、不均匀图像的重建鲁棒性。

papers.title: CT-Guided Spatially-varying Regularization for Voxel-Wise Deformable Whole-Body PET Registration
papers.abstract: Whole-body Positron Emission Tomography (PET) registration is essential for multi-parametric tumor characterization and assessment of metastatic disease progression. In deep learning-based deformable registration, the dense displacement field (DDF) regularizer is crucial for stabilizing optimization and preventing unrealistic deformations in large 3D volumes. A key challenge in whole-body deformable registration is anatomical heterogeneity, rigid structures (e.g., bones) should undergo stronger regularization, whereas soft tissues require more flexible deformation and weaker constraints. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective CT-guided spatially-varying regularization strategy for whole-body cross-tracer deformable PET registration. The key idea is to use the paired CT volume from the PET/CT acquisition to construct a voxel-wise regularization map for the DDF, replacing the conventional single global regularization weight. This yields anatomy-adaptive regularization strength across rigid and soft tissues. The proposed method is evaluated on a real clinical cross-tracer PET/CT dataset of 296 patients involving 18F-PSMA and 18F-FDG, showing that the proposed method achieves statistically significant improvements over weakly-supervised registration baseline in both whole-body registration performance and organ-wise alignment.

analysis.tldr: 利用CT图像构建体素级正则化图，实现全身PET变形配准中刚性与软组织区域的自适应约束。
analysis.research_motivation: 全身PET配准中解剖结构异质性大（骨骼需强正则化，软组织需弱约束），传统单一全局正则化权重无法适应这种差异，导致配准效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何为全身PET变形配准设计一种能根据解剖结构自适应调整正则化强度的策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用PET/CT中配对的CT图像构建体素级正则化图，替代传统单一全局正则化权重，实现刚性与软组织区域的自适应正则化强度。
contributions: 提出一种CT引导的空间变化正则化策略，实现解剖自适应正则化。
在296例患者的真实临床PET/CT数据集上验证了方法在全身配准和器官对齐上的显著改进。
analysis.experiments: 在296例患者的18F-PSMA和18F-FDG双示踪剂PET/CT数据集上评估，与弱监督配准基线相比，在全身配准性能和器官对齐方面取得统计显著提升。
limitations: 依赖CT图像，不适用于无CT模态的配准任务。
正则化图的构建方式可能需针对不同解剖结构进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用CT图像构建体素级正则化图，实现全身PET变形配准中刚性与软组织区域的自适应约束。

papers.title: Generative Modeling of Neurodegenerative Brain Anatomy with 4D Longitudinal Diffusion Model
papers.abstract: Understanding and predicting the progression of neurodegenerative diseases remains a major challenge in medical AI, with significant implications for early diagnosis, disease monitoring, and treatment planning. However, most available longitudinal neuroimaging datasets are temporally sparse with a few follow-up scans per subject. This scarcity of temporal data limits our ability to model and accurately capture the continuous anatomical changes related to disease progression in individual subjects. To address this problem, we propose a novel 4D (3DxT) diffusion-based generative framework that effectively models and synthesizes longitudinal brain anatomy over time, conditioned on available clinical variables such as health status, age, sex, and other relevant factors. Moreover, while most current approaches focus on manipulating image intensity or texture, our method explicitly learns the data distribution of topology-preserving spatiotemporal deformations to effectively capture the geometric changes of brain structures over time. This design enables the realistic generation of future anatomical states and the reconstruction of anatomically consistent disease trajectories, providing a more faithful representation of longitudinal brain changes. We validate our model through both synthetic sequence generation and downstream longitudinal disease classification, as well as brain segmentation. Experiments on two large-scale longitudinal neuroimage datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in generating anatomically accurate, temporally consistent, and clinically meaningful brain trajectories. Our code is available on Github.

analysis.tldr: 提出4D扩散模型生成纵向脑解剖变化，优于现有基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经退行性疾病进展建模对早期诊断和治疗规划至关重要，但纵向神经影像数据稀疏，难以捕捉连续解剖变化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用稀疏纵向数据生成连续、解剖一致的大脑结构变化轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出4D扩散模型，学习拓扑保持的时空变形分布，生成纵向脑解剖序列，并利用临床变量（健康状况、年龄、性别等）作为条件。
contributions: 提出4D扩散生成框架，建模纵向脑解剖变化。
学习拓扑保持的时空变形，生成解剖一致的变化轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在两个大规模纵向神经影像数据集上验证，通过合成序列生成、下游疾病分类和脑分割任务评估，优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖临床变量的完整性和准确性。
计算资源需求可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出4D扩散模型生成纵向脑解剖变化，优于现有基线。

papers.title: CRAFT: Clustered Regression for Adaptive Filtering of Training data
papers.abstract: Selecting a small, high-quality subset from a large corpus for fine-tuning is increasingly important as corpora grow to tens of millions of datapoints, making full fine-tuning expensive and often unnecessary. We propose CRAFT (Clustered Regression for Adaptive Filtering of Training data), a vectorization-agnostic selection method for training sequence-to-sequence models. CRAFT decomposes the joint source-target distribution and performs a two-stage selection: (i) match the validation source distribution through proportional budget allocation across k-means clusters, and (ii) within each source cluster, select training pairs whose target embeddings minimize a conditional expected distance derived from the validation target distribution. We prove that proportional cluster allocation bounds the continuous KL divergence between selected and validation distributions, with the residual controlled by cluster diameters. We evaluate CRAFT on English-Hindi translation by selecting training data from 33 million NLLB sentence pairs and fine-tuning mBART via LoRA. CRAFT achieves 43.34 BLEU, outperforming TSDS (41.21) by 2.13 points on the same candidate pool and encoder while completing selection over 40 times faster. With TF-IDF vectorization, the entire pipeline completes in under one minute on CPU. TAROT achieves 45.61 BLEU, but CRAFT completes selection in 26.86 seconds versus TAROT's 75.6 seconds, a 2.8 time speedup.

analysis.tldr: 提出CRAFT方法，通过聚类回归自适应过滤训练数据，在英印翻译中实现高效高BLEU值。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模语料库（如数千万数据点）进行全量微调成本高昂且不必要，需要高效选择高质量子集的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从大规模平行语料中快速选择高质量子集用于序列到序列模型的微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CRAFT方法：先通过k-means聚类匹配验证集源分布，按比例分配预算；再在每个源簇内基于目标嵌入最小化条件期望距离选择训练对。
contributions: 提出一种向量化无关的训练数据选择方法CRAFT，适用于序列到序列模型。
理论证明比例簇分配能界连续KL散度，残差由簇直径控制。
在英印翻译任务上，CRAFT比TSDS BLEU高2.13点，选择速度快40倍；比TAROT速度快2.8倍。
analysis.experiments: 在英印翻译任务上，从3300万NLLB句子对中选择数据，微调mBART（LoRA），CRAFT达到43.34 BLEU，优于TSDS（41.21），选择时间26.86秒（CPU）。
limitations: 仅在一个翻译任务上评估，泛化性未知。
依赖验证集分布，可能对验证集质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CRAFT方法，通过聚类回归自适应过滤训练数据，在英印翻译中实现高效高BLEU值。

papers.title: SS3D: End2End Self-Supervised 3D from Web Videos
papers.abstract: We present SS3D, a web-scale SfM-based self-supervision pretraining pipeline for feed-forward 3D estimation from monocular video. Our model jointly predicts depth, ego-motion, and intrinsics in a single forward pass and is trained/evaluated as a coherent end-to-end 3D estimator. To stabilize joint learning, we use an intrinsics-first two-stage schedule and a unified single-checkpoint evaluation protocol. Scaling SfM self-supervision to unconstrained web video is challenging due to weak multi-view observability and strong corpus heterogeneity; we address these with a multi-view signal proxy (MVS) used for filtering and curriculum sampling, and with expert training distilled into a single student. Pretraining on YouTube-8M (~100M frames after filtering) yields strong cross-domain zero-shot transfer and improved fine-tuning performance over prior self-supervised baselines. We release the pretrained checkpoint and code.

analysis.tldr: 提出SS3D，一种基于SfM的自监督预训练流程，从网络视频中学习单目3D估计，在YouTube-8M上预训练后实现跨域零样本迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督3D方法多依赖受限数据集或复杂多阶段训练，难以扩展到大规模无约束网络视频，且缺乏端到端联合训练的统一评估协议。
analysis.problem: 如何从大规模无约束网络视频中通过自监督方式学习单目深度、自运动和相机内参的端到端联合估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出网络视频存在弱多视角可观测性和强语料异质性，导致SfM自监督训练困难；通过多视图信号代理过滤和课程采样可缓解。
analysis.method: 基于SfM的自监督预训练流程，包括内参优先的两阶段训练、统一单检查点评估协议、多视图信号代理过滤与课程采样、专家蒸馏到单一学生模型。
contributions: 提出SS3D，首个在YouTube-8M规模上实现端到端自监督3D估计的流程
设计内参优先两阶段训练和统一评估协议，稳定联合学习
通过多视图信号代理和课程采样解决网络视频的弱观测和异质性挑战
预训练模型在多个下游任务上实现强跨域零样本迁移和微调性能提升
analysis.experiments: 在YouTube-8M上预训练（过滤后约1亿帧），评估跨域零样本迁移和微调性能，优于先前自监督基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖SfM预处理，可能受限于视频质量
仅评估单目视频，未涉及多视角或动态场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SS3D，一种基于SfM的自监督预训练流程，从网络视频中学习单目3D估计，在YouTube-8M上预训练后实现跨域零样本迁移。

papers.title: How Supply Chain Dependencies Complicate Bias Measurement and Accountability Attribution in AI Hiring Applications
papers.abstract: The increasing adoption of AI systems in hiring has raised concerns about algorithmic bias and accountability, prompting regulatory responses including the EU AI Act, NYC Local Law 144, and Colorado's AI Act. While existing research examines bias through technical or regulatory lenses, both perspectives overlook a fundamental challenge: modern AI hiring systems operate within complex supply chains where responsibility fragments across data vendors, model developers, platform providers, and deploying organizations. This paper investigates how these dependency chains complicate bias evaluation and accountability attribution. Drawing on literature review and regulatory analysis, we demonstrate that fragmented responsibilities create two critical problems. First, bias emerges from component interactions rather than isolated elements, yet proprietary configurations prevent integrated evaluation. A resume parser may function without bias independently but contribute to discrimination when integrated with specific ranking algorithms and filtering thresholds. Second, information asymmetries mean deploying organizations bear legal responsibility without technical visibility into vendor-supplied algorithms, while vendors control implementations without meaningful disclosure requirements. Each stakeholder may believe they are compliant; nevertheless, the integrated system may produce biased outcomes. Analysis of implementation ambiguities reveals these challenges in practice. We propose multi-layered interventions including system-level audits, vendor guidelines, continuous monitoring mechanisms, and documentation across dependency chains. Our findings reveal that effective governance requires coordinated action across technical, organizational, and regulatory domains to establish meaningful accountability in distributed development environments.

analysis.tldr: AI招聘系统供应链中的责任碎片化导致偏差评估和问责困难，需多层干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究从技术或监管角度分析AI招聘偏差，但忽略了现代AI系统在复杂供应链中运行，责任分散在数据供应商、模型开发者、平台提供商和部署组织之间，导致偏差评估和问责面临根本性挑战。
analysis.problem: AI招聘系统供应链中，责任碎片化如何阻碍偏差评估和问责归因，以及如何解决。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键问题：1) 偏差源于组件交互而非孤立元素，但专有配置阻止集成评估；2) 信息不对称导致部署组织承担法律责任却无法技术可见供应商算法，而供应商控制实现却无披露要求。
analysis.method: 通过文献综述和监管分析，提出多层干预措施，包括系统级审计、供应商指南、持续监控机制和跨依赖链文档。
contributions: 揭示了AI招聘供应链中责任碎片化导致偏差评估和问责困难的两个关键问题。
提出了系统级审计、供应商指南、持续监控和跨依赖链文档等多层干预措施。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证数据或案例研究验证所提干预措施的有效性。
可能未考虑不同司法管辖区监管差异的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI招聘系统供应链中的责任碎片化导致偏差评估和问责困难，需多层干预。

papers.title: Rethinking XAI Evaluation: A Human-Centered Audit of Shapley Benchmarks in High-Stakes Settings
papers.abstract: Shapley values are a cornerstone of explainable AI, yet their proliferation into competing formulations has created a fragmented landscape with little consensus on practical deployment. While theoretical differences are well-documented, evaluation remains reliant on quantitative proxies whose alignment with human utility is unverified. In this work, we use a unified amortized framework to isolate semantic differences between eight Shapley variants under the low-latency constraints of operational risk workflows. We conduct a large-scale empirical evaluation across four risk datasets and a realistic fraud-detection environment involving professional analysts and 3,735 case reviews. Our results reveal a fundamental misalignment: standard quantitative metrics, such as sparsity and faithfulness, are decoupled from human-perceived clarity and decision utility. Furthermore, while no formulation improved objective analyst performance, explanations consistently increased decision confidence, signaling a critical risk of automation bias in high-stakes settings. These findings suggest that current evaluation proxies are insufficient for predicting downstream human impact, and we provide evidence-based guidance for selecting formulations and metrics in operational decision systems.

analysis.tldr: Shapley值变体的评估指标与人类实际效用脱节，在高压场景中可能引发自动化偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: Shapley值作为可解释AI的核心方法，存在多种竞争性变体，但缺乏统一的实践部署共识。现有评估依赖定量代理指标，其与人类效用的对齐性未经验证，尤其在高压风险场景中可能导致误导。
analysis.problem: 解决Shapley值变体在低延迟风险工作流中的评估问题，验证定量指标与人类感知及决策效用的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准定量指标（如稀疏性、忠实度）与人类感知的清晰度和决策效用脱节；没有变体提升分析师客观表现，但解释增加了决策信心，暗示自动化偏见风险。
analysis.method: 使用统一摊销框架隔离八种Shapley变体的语义差异，在四个风险数据集和真实欺诈检测环境中进行大规模实证评估，涉及专业分析师和3,735次案例审查。
contributions: 揭示标准定量指标与人类效用之间的根本性错位
提供基于证据的Shapley变体选择指导，并指出自动化偏见风险
analysis.experiments: 在四个风险数据集和真实欺诈检测环境中进行大规模实证评估，涉及专业分析师和3,735次案例审查。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有Shapley变体或应用场景
自动化偏见风险的具体缓解策略未深入探讨
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Shapley值变体的评估指标与人类实际效用脱节，在高压场景中可能引发自动化偏见。

papers.title: PASR: Pose-Aware 3D Shape Retrieval from Occluded Single Views
papers.abstract: Single-view 3D shape retrieval is a fundamental yet challenging task that is increasingly important with the growth of available 3D data. Existing approaches largely fall into two categories: those using contrastive learning to map point cloud features into existing vision-language spaces and those that learn a common embedding space for 2D images and 3D shapes. However, these feed-forward, holistic alignments are often difficult to interpret, which in turn limits their robustness and generalization to real-world applications. To address this problem, we propose Pose-Aware 3D Shape Retrieval (PASR), a framework that formulates retrieval as a feature-level analysis-by-synthesis problem by distilling knowledge from a 2D foundation model (DINOv3) into a 3D encoder. By aligning pose-conditioned 3D projections with 2D feature maps, our method bridges the gap between real-world images and synthetic meshes. During inference, PASR performs a test-time optimization via analysis-by-synthesis, jointly searching for the shape and pose that best reconstruct the patch-level feature map of the input image. This synthesis-based optimization is inherently robust to partial occlusion and sensitive to fine-grained geometric details. PASR substantially outperforms existing methods on both clean and occluded 3D shape retrieval datasets by a wide margin. Additionally, PASR demonstrates strong multi-task capabilities, achieving robust shape retrieval, competitive pose estimation, and accurate category classification within a single framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出PASR框架，通过分析-合成和姿态感知对齐，从遮挡单视图实现鲁棒的3D形状检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单视图3D形状检索方法依赖前馈式整体对齐，可解释性差，对遮挡和真实场景泛化不足。
analysis.problem: 从遮挡单视图进行3D形状检索，同时提升对部分遮挡的鲁棒性和细粒度几何细节的敏感性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将检索建模为特征级分析-合成问题，利用2D基础模型DINOv3蒸馏到3D编码器，通过姿态条件3D投影与2D特征图对齐，推理时进行测试时优化联合搜索形状和姿态。
contributions: 提出PASR框架，将单视图3D形状检索转化为分析-合成优化问题。
利用2D基础模型知识蒸馏实现姿态感知的跨模态对齐。
在干净和遮挡数据集上显著超越现有方法，并具备多任务能力。
analysis.experiments: 在干净和遮挡的3D形状检索数据集上，PASR大幅优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖2D基础模型DINOv3，可能受其局限性影响。
测试时优化可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PASR框架，通过分析-合成和姿态感知对齐，从遮挡单视图实现鲁棒的3D形状检索。

papers.title: A Non-Invasive Alternative to RFID: Self-Sufficient 3D Identification of Group-Housed Livestock
papers.abstract: Accurate identification of individual farm animals in group-housed environments is a cornerstone of precision livestock management. However, current industry standards rely heavily on Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) ear tags, which are invasive, prone to loss, and restricted by the spatial limitations of antenna fields. In this paper, we propose a non-intrusive, vision-based identification system leveraging 3D point cloud data captured within a commercial electronic feeding station (EFS). Departing from traditional supervised frame-level inference, we introduce the Temporal Adaptive Recognition Architecture (TARA), a self-sufficient, semi-supervised framework designed to maintain identity consistency over time. TARA employs a dynamic recalibration mechanism that updates individual identity profiles to account for morphological changes in the livestock. To facilitate training in label-scarce environments, we utilize a visit-level majority voting strategy to generate high-fidelity pseudo-labels from raw temporal sequences. Experimental results on a group housed sow dataset collected from an operational commercial barn demonstrate that our approach achieves 100% identification accuracy at the visit level. These results suggest that vision-based 3D point cloud analysis offers a robust, superior alternative to RFID-based systems, paving the way for fully autonomous individual animal monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于3D点云的TARA框架，实现群养牲畜非侵入式身份识别，访问级准确率达100%。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前畜牧业依赖RFID耳标进行个体识别，但该方法具有侵入性、易丢失且受天线场空间限制，亟需非侵入式替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在群养环境中实现非侵入式、高精度的个体身份识别，并应对标签稀缺和牲畜形态变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TARA（时间自适应识别架构），一种半监督框架，利用3D点云数据，通过动态重校准机制更新个体身份档案以适应形态变化，并采用访问级多数投票策略生成高保真伪标签。
contributions: 提出非侵入式、基于3D点云的牲畜识别系统，替代RFID。
设计TARA半监督框架，实现标签稀缺环境下的身份一致性维护。
analysis.experiments: 在商业猪舍的群养母猪数据集上，访问级识别准确率达100%。
limitations: 可能仅在特定场景（电子饲喂站）验证，泛化性未知。
未提及对遮挡或光照变化的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于3D点云的TARA框架，实现群养牲畜非侵入式身份识别，访问级准确率达100%。

papers.title: Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network for Hepatobiliary Phase Liver MRI Synthesis
papers.abstract: Gadoxetate disodium-enhanced MRI is essential for the detection and characterization of hepatocellular carcinoma. However, acquisition of the hepatobiliary phase (HBP) requires a prolonged post-contrast delay, which reduces workflow efficiency and increases the risk of motion artifacts. In this study, we propose a Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network (TriPF-Net) to synthesize HBP images by leveraging the sequential information from pre-HBP sequences: while T1-weighted imaging serves as the indispensable baseline, the model adaptively integrates arterial-phase (AP) and venous-phase (VP) features when available. By modeling the tissue-specific contrast uptake and excretion dynamics across these three phases, TriPF-Net ensures robust HBP synthesis even under the stochastic absence of one or both dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences. The framework comprises an Enhanced Region-Guided Encoder and a Dynamic Feature Unification Module, optimized with a Region-Guided Sequential Fusion Loss to maintain physiological consistency. In addition, clinical variables, including age, sex, total bilirubin, and albumin, are incorporated to enhance physiological consistency. Compared with conventional methods, TriPF-Net achieved superior performance on datasets from two centers. On the internal dataset, the model achieved an MAE of 10.65, a PSNR of 23.27, and an SSIM of 0.76. On the external validation dataset, the corresponding values were 12.41, 23.11, and 0.78, respectively. This flexible solution enhances clinical workflow and lesion depiction, potentially eliminating the need for delayed HBP acquisition in HCC imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出TriPF-Net，利用多期相顺序信息合成肝胆期MRI，减少造影剂延迟等待时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 肝胆期MRI获取需要长时间延迟，降低工作效率并增加运动伪影风险，现有方法未充分利用多期相顺序信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用造影前序列（T1、动脉期、静脉期）的时序信息，在部分序列缺失时仍能鲁棒合成肝胆期图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network，包含增强区域引导编码器和动态特征统一模块，使用区域引导顺序融合损失，并融入临床变量（年龄、性别、胆红素、白蛋白）。
contributions: 提出TriPF-Net，利用多期相顺序信息合成HBP图像，支持部分序列缺失。
引入临床变量增强生理一致性，在两个中心数据集上取得优于传统方法的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在两个中心数据集上评估，内部数据集MAE=10.65, PSNR=23.27, SSIM=0.76；外部验证集MAE=12.41, PSNR=23.11, SSIM=0.78。
limitations: 可能依赖特定造影剂（钆塞酸二钠）的动力学特性，泛化性需验证。
临床变量的选择可能不全面，未提及肝功能其他指标的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TriPF-Net，利用多期相顺序信息合成肝胆期MRI，减少造影剂延迟等待时间。

papers.title: Structure-Guided Diffusion Model for EEG-Based Visual Cognition Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Objective: Decoding visual information from electroencephalography (EEG) is an important problem in neuroscience and brain-computer interface (BCI) research. Existing methods are largely restricted to natural images and categorical representations, with limited capacity to capture structural features and to differentiate objective perception from subjective cognition. We propose a Structure-Guided Diffusion Model (SGDM) that incorporates explicit structural information for EEG-based visual reconstruction. Approach: SGDM is evaluated on the Kilogram abstract visual object dataset and the THINGS natural image dataset using a two-stage generative mechanism. The framework combines a structurally supervised variational autoencoder with a spatiotemporal EEG encoder aligned to a visual embedding space via contrastive learning. Structural information is integrated into a diffusion model through ControlNet to guide image generation from EEG features. Results: SGDM outperforms existing methods on both abstract and natural image datasets. Reconstructed images achieve higher fidelity in low-level visual features and semantic representations, indicating improved decoding accuracy and strong generalization across diverse visual domains. Spatiotemporal analysis of EEG signals further reveals hierarchical structural encoding patterns, consistent with the neural dynamics of visual cognition. Significance: These findings validate the effectiveness of SGDM in capturing explicit structural geometry and generating images with high fidelity to individual cognitive representations. By enabling decoding of complex visual content from EEG signals, the framework extends neural decoding beyond low-dimensional or categorical outputs. This supports BCIs with increased degrees of freedom for intention decoding and more flexible brain-to-machine communication.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构引导扩散模型(SGDM)，通过显式结构信息提升EEG视觉重建的保真度和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EEG视觉解码方法局限于自然图像和类别表征，难以捕捉结构特征并区分客观感知与主观认知，限制了脑机接口的灵活性和自由度。
analysis.problem: 如何从EEG信号中重建具有高保真结构特征的视觉图像，并实现跨域泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合结构监督变分自编码器、时空EEG编码器（通过对比学习对齐视觉嵌入空间）以及ControlNet引导的扩散模型，将显式结构信息集成到生成过程中。
contributions: 提出SGDM框架，首次在EEG视觉重建中显式引入结构引导。
在抽象和自然图像数据集上均取得优于现有方法的性能，验证了跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Kilogram抽象视觉对象数据集和THINGS自然图像数据集上评估，SGDM在低层视觉特征和语义表示上均实现更高保真度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集的结构标注，泛化到无结构标注场景需进一步验证。
EEG信号时空分析仅初步揭示层次结构编码模式，机制解释深度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构引导扩散模型(SGDM)，通过显式结构信息提升EEG视觉重建的保真度和泛化能力。

papers.title: Cloud to Edge: Benchmarking LLM Inference On Hardware-Accelerated Single-Board Computers
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are becoming increasingly capable at small parameter scales. At the same time, conventional cloud-centric deployment introduces challenges around data privacy, latency, and cost that are acute in operational technology and defence environments. Advances in model distillation, quantisation, and affordable edge accelerators now make local LLM inference on single-board computers feasible, but the high dimensionality of the configuration space makes identifying optimal deployments difficult without structured evaluation. Existing LLM-specific edge benchmarking efforts rely on CPU-only inference, poor coverage of genuine single-board computers, and generic evaluation tasks that lack multi-dimensional assessment of hardware effectiveness. This paper proposes a multi-dimensional benchmarking methodology that jointly evaluates inference performance and hardware efficiency across four IoT-suitable edge platform configurations testing single-board computers with the latest available hardware accelerators. Our results reveal the benefits of using hardware accelerators such as NPUs and GPUs, along with multi-dimensional evaluations quantifying the trade-offs between power efficiency, physical device size and token throughput; offering practical guidance for deploying generative AI in privacy-sensitive and connectivity-limited environments such as unmanned vehicles and portable, ruggedised operations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多维基准测试方法，评估硬件加速单板计算机上的LLM推理性能与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 云中心部署LLM存在数据隐私、延迟和成本问题，而边缘设备上的LLM推理缺乏系统性的多维评估方法。
analysis.problem: 现有边缘LLM基准测试依赖CPU、覆盖不全、任务单一，无法有效评估硬件加速单板计算机的推理性能与效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多维基准测试方法，联合评估推理性能与硬件效率，覆盖四种IoT适用边缘平台配置，测试最新硬件加速器（NPU、GPU）。
contributions: 提出针对硬件加速单板计算机的LLM推理多维基准测试方法
揭示NPU和GPU等硬件加速器的优势，量化功耗、设备尺寸与吞吐量之间的权衡
analysis.experiments: 在四种边缘平台配置上测试，评估推理性能与硬件效率，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖特定硬件和模型，泛化性有限
未提及基准测试任务的多样性和代表性
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多维基准测试方法，评估硬件加速单板计算机上的LLM推理性能与效率。

papers.title: On the Complementarity of Quantum and Classical Features: Adaptive Hybrid Quantum-Classical Feature Fusion for Breast Cancer Classification
papers.abstract: The integration of quantum machine learning with classical deep learning offers promising avenues for medical image analysis by mapping data into high-dimensional Hilbert spaces. However, effectively unifying these distinct paradigms remains challenging due to common optimization asymmetries. In this paper, a novel hybrid quantum-classical architecture for breast cancer diagnosis based on a dual-branch feature-extraction pipeline is proposed. Our framework extracts and unifies complementary representations from classical models and quantum circuits, exploring both trainable and deterministic (non-trainable) quantum paradigms. To integrate these embeddings, three progressive feature fusion strategies are introduced: Static Hybrid Fusion (SHF) for offline extraction, Dynamic Hybrid Fusion (DHF) for end-to-end co-adaptation, and a novel Temperature-Scaled Hybrid Fusion (TSHF). The TSHF strategy incorporates a learnable scalar, inspired by multimodal learning, that dynamically balances hybrid gradient dynamics and resolves optimization bottlenecks. Empirical validation on the BreastMNIST dataset confirms our hypothesis that unifying diverse feature representations creates a richer data context. The TSHF strategy, specifically when pairing a ResNet backbone with a trainable quantum circuit, achieved a peak accuracy of 87.82%, F1-score of 91.77%, and an AUC-ROC of 89.08%, outperforming purely classical baselines. These results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid framework improves classification accuracy and threshold reliability, providing a stable, high-performance architecture for the clinical deployment of quantum-enhanced diagnostic tools.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应混合量子-经典特征融合框架，在乳腺癌分类中优于纯经典基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子机器学习与经典深度学习融合在医学图像分析中潜力巨大，但两者优化不对称导致难以有效统一。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合量子与经典特征表示，解决优化瓶颈，提升乳腺癌分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双分支特征提取管道，包含经典模型和量子电路，并设计三种渐进式融合策略：静态混合融合(SHF)、动态混合融合(DHF)和温度缩放混合融合(TSHF)，其中TSHF引入可学习标量动态平衡混合梯度。
contributions: 提出自适应混合量子-经典特征融合框架，包含三种融合策略。
在BreastMNIST数据集上验证了统一异构特征表示的有效性，TSHF策略达到最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在BreastMNIST数据集上实验，TSHF策略（ResNet骨干+可训练量子电路）达到87.82%准确率、91.77% F1分数和89.08% AUC-ROC，优于纯经典基线。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集（BreastMNIST）上验证，泛化性未知。
量子电路规模较小，可能无法充分体现量子优势。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应混合量子-经典特征融合框架，在乳腺癌分类中优于纯经典基线。

papers.title: From Natural Language to Verified Code: Toward AI Assisted Problem-to-Code Generation with Dafny-Based Formal Verification
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise in automated software engineering, yet their guarantee of correctness is frequently undermined by erroneous or hallucinated code. To enforce model honesty, formal verification requires LLMs to synthesize implementation logic alongside formal specifications that are subsequently proven correct by a mathematical verifier. However, the transition from informal natural language to precise formal specification remains an arduous task. Our work addresses this by providing the NaturalLanguage2VerifiedCode (NL2VC)-60 dataset: a collection of 60 complex algorithmic problems. We evaluate 11 randomly selected problem sets across seven open-weight LLMs using a tiered prompting strategy: contextless prompts, signature prompts providing structural anchors, and self-healing prompts utilizing iterative feedback from the Dafny verifier. To address vacuous verification, where models satisfy verifiers with trivial specifications, we integrate the uDebug platform to ensure functional validation. Our results show that while contextless prompting leads to near-universal failure, structural signatures and iterative self-healing facilitate a dramatic performance turnaround. Specifically, Gemma 4-31B achieved a 90.91\% verification success rate, while GPT-OSS 120B rose from zero to 81.82\% success with signature-guided feedback. These findings indicate that formal verification is now attainable for open-weight LLMs, which serve as effective apprentices for synthesizing complex annotations and facilitating high-assurance software development.

analysis.tldr: 提出NL2VC-60数据集和分层提示策略，使开源LLM能通过Dafny形式验证生成正确代码。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的代码常出现错误或幻觉，形式验证可强制模型生成可数学验证的代码，但从自然语言到形式规范的转换仍很困难。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM从自然语言问题描述生成经过Dafny形式验证的正确代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无上下文提示导致几乎完全失败，而结构签名和迭代自愈提示可显著提升验证成功率。
analysis.method: 构建NL2VC-60数据集（60个复杂算法问题），采用分层提示策略：无上下文提示、签名提示（提供结构锚点）、自愈提示（利用Dafny验证器迭代反馈），并集成uDebug平台防止空洞验证。
contributions: 提出NL2VC-60数据集，包含60个复杂算法问题及其形式规范。
实验证明分层提示策略（签名和自愈）能大幅提升开源LLM的Dafny验证成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在7个开源LLM上评估11个随机问题集，Gemma 4-31B达到90.91%验证成功率，GPT-OSS 120B从0提升至81.82%。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（60个问题），可能限制泛化性。
仅针对Dafny验证器，未探索其他形式验证工具。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NL2VC-60数据集和分层提示策略，使开源LLM能通过Dafny形式验证生成正确代码。

papers.title: Rethinking Math Reasoning Evaluation: A Robust LLM-as-a-Judge Framework Beyond Symbolic Rigidity
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in large language models have led to significant improvements across various tasks, including mathematical reasoning, which is used to assess models' intelligence in logical reasoning and problem-solving. Models are evaluated on mathematical reasoning benchmarks by verifying the correctness of the final answer against a ground truth answer. A common approach for this verification is based on symbolic mathematics comparison, which fails to generalize across diverse mathematical representations and solution formats. In this work, we offer a robust and flexible alternative to rule-based symbolic mathematics comparison. We propose an LLM-based evaluation framework for evaluating model-generated answers, enabling accurate evaluation across diverse mathematical representations and answer formats. We present failure cases of symbolic evaluation in two popular frameworks, Lighteval and SimpleRL, and compare them to our approach, demonstrating clear improvements over commonly used methods. Our framework enables more reliable evaluation and benchmarking, leading to more accurate performance monitoring, which is important for advancing mathematical problem-solving and intelligent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LLM的数学推理评估框架，克服符号比较的僵化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数学推理评估依赖符号数学比较，无法处理多样化的数学表示和答案格式，导致评估不准确。
analysis.problem: 解决符号数学比较在数学推理评估中的泛化性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 符号评估在Lighteval和SimpleRL框架中存在失败案例，无法适应多样化的数学表示和答案格式。
analysis.method: 提出基于LLM的评估框架，利用大语言模型判断模型生成答案的正确性。
contributions: 提出一种鲁棒且灵活的LLM评估框架，替代规则式符号数学比较。
在Lighteval和SimpleRL框架中展示符号评估的失败案例，并证明所提方法的改进。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖LLM可能引入额外计算成本。
LLM评估的可靠性可能受限于模型自身能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于LLM的数学推理评估框架，克服符号比较的僵化问题。

papers.title: EV-CLIP: Efficient Visual Prompt Adaptation for CLIP in Few-shot Action Recognition under Visual Challenges
papers.abstract: CLIP has demonstrated strong generalization in visual domains through natural language supervision, even for video action recognition. However, most existing approaches that adapt CLIP for action recognition have primarily focused on temporal modeling, often overlooking spatial perception. In real-world scenarios, visual challenges such as low-light environments or egocentric viewpoints can severely impair spatial understanding, an essential precursor for effective temporal reasoning. To address this limitation, we propose Efficient Visual Prompting for CLIP (EV-CLIP), an efficient adaptation framework designed for few-shot video action recognition across diverse scenes and viewpoints. EV-CLIP introduces two visual prompts: mask prompts, which guide the model's attention to action-relevant regions by reweighting pixels, and context prompts, which perform lightweight temporal modeling by compressing frame-wise features into a compact representation. For a comprehensive evaluation, we curate five benchmark datasets and analyze domain shifts to quantify the influence of diverse visual and semantic factors on action recognition. Experimental results demonstrate that EV-CLIP outperforms existing parameter-efficient methods in overall performance. Moreover, its efficiency remains independent of the backbone scale, making it well-suited for deployment in real-world, resource-constrained scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/AI-CV-Lab/EV-CLIP.

analysis.tldr: EV-CLIP通过视觉提示高效适应CLIP，解决少样本动作识别中的空间感知问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CLIP适配动作识别的方法主要关注时序建模，忽略了空间感知，在低光照或自我中心视角等视觉挑战下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在少样本视频动作识别中高效提升CLIP的空间感知能力，以应对多样场景和视角的视觉挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视觉挑战（如低光照、自我中心视角）会严重损害空间理解，而空间理解是时序推理的前提。
analysis.method: 提出EV-CLIP，引入两种视觉提示：掩码提示（通过像素重加权引导模型关注动作相关区域）和上下文提示（通过压缩帧特征进行轻量时序建模）。
contributions: 提出EV-CLIP框架，通过视觉提示高效适配CLIP用于少样本动作识别。
构建五个基准数据集并分析域偏移，量化视觉和语义因素对动作识别的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准数据集上评估，EV-CLIP在整体性能上优于现有参数高效方法，且效率与骨干网络规模无关。
limitations: 可能仅在少样本场景下验证，未提及大规模数据下的表现。
视觉提示的设计可能对特定域偏移敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EV-CLIP通过视觉提示高效适应CLIP，解决少样本动作识别中的空间感知问题。

papers.title: FlowAnchor: Stabilizing the Editing Signal for Inversion-Free Video Editing
papers.abstract: We propose FlowAnchor, a training-free framework for stable and efficient inversion-free, flow-based video editing. Inversion-free editing methods have recently shown impressive efficiency and structure preservation in images by directly steering the sampling trajectory with an editing signal. However, extending this paradigm to videos remains challenging, often failing in multi-object scenes or with increased frame counts. We identify the root cause as the instability of the editing signal in high-dimensional video latent spaces, which arises from imprecise spatial localization and length-induced magnitude attenuation. To overcome this challenge, FlowAnchor explicitly anchors both where to edit and how strongly to edit. It introduces Spatial-aware Attention Refinement, which enforces consistent alignment between textual guidance and spatial regions, and Adaptive Magnitude Modulation, which adaptively preserves sufficient editing strength. Together, these mechanisms stabilize the editing signal and guide the flow-based evolution toward the desired target distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FlowAnchor achieves more faithful, temporally coherent, and computationally efficient video editing across challenging multi-object and fast-motion scenarios. The project page is available at https://cuc-mipg.github.io/FlowAnchor.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: FlowAnchor 通过空间感知注意力精炼和自适应幅度调制，稳定了无反转视频编辑中的编辑信号，实现了高效、连贯的视频编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 无反转编辑方法在图像编辑中展现了高效性和结构保持能力，但直接扩展到视频编辑时，在多目标场景或帧数增加时容易失败，原因是高维视频潜在空间中编辑信号不稳定。
analysis.problem: 解决无反转、基于流的视频编辑中编辑信号不稳定的问题，具体表现为空间定位不精确和长度引起的幅度衰减。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出编辑信号不稳定的根源在于高维视频潜在空间中不精确的空间定位和长度引起的幅度衰减。
analysis.method: FlowAnchor 框架包含两个关键机制：空间感知注意力精炼（Spatial-aware Attention Refinement）确保文本引导与空间区域的一致对齐，以及自适应幅度调制（Adaptive Magnitude Modulation）自适应地保持足够的编辑强度，从而稳定编辑信号并引导基于流的演化。
contributions: 提出 FlowAnchor，一种无需训练、稳定且高效的基于流的视频编辑框架。
识别并解决了无反转视频编辑中编辑信号不稳定的根本原因。
引入空间感知注意力精炼和自适应幅度调制两种机制，有效稳定编辑信号。
在多个挑战性场景中实现了更忠实、时间连贯且计算高效的视频编辑。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多个多目标和快速运动场景中进行了大量实验，展示了更忠实、时间连贯且计算高效的视频编辑，但未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂的场景或长视频序列仍存在挑战。
未讨论与其他视频编辑方法的定量比较细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowAnchor 通过空间感知注意力精炼和自适应幅度调制，稳定了无反转视频编辑中的编辑信号，实现了高效、连贯的视频编辑。

papers.title: Useful nonrobust features are ubiquitous in biomedical images
papers.abstract: We study whether deep networks for medical imaging learn useful nonrobust features - predictive input patterns that are not human interpretable and highly susceptible to small adversarial perturbations - and how these features impact test performance. We show that models trained only on nonrobust features achieve well above chance accuracy across five MedMNIST classification tasks, confirming their predictive value in-distribution. Conversely, adversarially trained models that primarily rely on robust features sacrifice in-distribution accuracy but yield markedly better performance under controlled distribution shifts (MedMNIST-C). Overall, nonrobust features boost standard accuracy yet degrade out-of-distribution performance, revealing a practical robustness-accuracy trade-off in medical imaging classification tasks that should be tailored to the requirements of the deployment setting.

analysis.tldr: 医学图像中普遍存在有用的非鲁棒特征，它们提升分布内精度但损害分布外性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度网络在医学图像中可能学习到人类不可解释且易受对抗扰动影响的非鲁棒特征，但这些特征对测试性能的影响尚不明确，理解这一权衡对实际部署至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究医学图像中非鲁棒特征的存在性及其对分布内和分布外性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非鲁棒特征在分布内具有预测价值，但依赖鲁棒特征的对抗训练会牺牲分布内精度以换取分布外性能提升，揭示了鲁棒性与准确率之间的权衡。
analysis.method: 通过仅训练非鲁棒特征和对抗训练两种方式，在五个MedMNIST分类任务上比较模型性能。
contributions: 证明医学图像中普遍存在有用的非鲁棒特征，且仅用这些特征即可达到高于随机水平的准确率。
揭示非鲁棒特征提升分布内精度但降低分布外性能的鲁棒性-准确率权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在五个MedMNIST分类任务上进行实验，并使用MedMNIST-C评估分布偏移下的性能。
limitations: 仅基于MedMNIST数据集，可能无法完全代表真实临床场景的复杂性。
未深入探讨非鲁棒特征的具体语义或临床相关性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 医学图像中普遍存在有用的非鲁棒特征，它们提升分布内精度但损害分布外性能。

papers.title: QuantClaw: Precision Where It Matters for OpenClaw
papers.abstract: Autonomous agent systems such as OpenClaw introduce significant efficiency challenges due to long-context inputs and multi-turn reasoning. This results in prohibitively high computational and monetary costs in real-world development. While quantization is a standard approach for reducing cost and latency, its impact on agent performance in realistic scenarios remains unclear. In this work, we analyze quantization sensitivity across diverse complex workflows over OpenClaw, and show that precision requirements are highly task-dependent. Based on this observation, we propose QuantClaw, a plug-and-play precision routing plugin that dynamically assigns precision according to task characteristics. QuantClaw routes lightweight tasks to lower-cost configurations while preserving higher precision for demanding workloads, saving cost and accelerating inference without increasing user complexity. Experiments show that our QuantClaw maintains or improves task performance while reducing both latency and computational cost. Across a range of agent tasks, it achieves up to 21.4% cost savings and 15.7% latency reduction on GLM-5 (FP8 baseline). These results highlight the benefit of treating precision as a dynamic resource in agent systems.

analysis.tldr: QuantClaw 通过动态精度路由，在 OpenClaw 智能体系统中实现成本与延迟的显著降低，同时保持或提升任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主智能体系统（如 OpenClaw）因长上下文和多轮推理导致计算和货币成本过高，量化虽能降低成本但对其在真实场景中性能影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持智能体任务性能的前提下，通过动态精度分配降低推理成本和延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 精度需求高度依赖于任务类型，简单任务可容忍低精度，复杂任务需要高精度。
analysis.method: QuantClaw 是一种即插即用的精度路由插件，根据任务特征动态分配精度：轻量任务使用低成本配置，高负载任务保留高精度。
contributions: 首次系统分析 OpenClaw 中不同任务对量化精度的敏感性，揭示精度需求的任务依赖性。
提出 QuantClaw 动态精度路由方法，在降低成本和延迟的同时保持或提升任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 GLM-5（FP8 基线）上，QuantClaw 实现高达 21.4% 的成本节省和 15.7% 的延迟降低，且任务性能保持或提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定智能体框架（如 OpenClaw），泛化性未验证。
动态路由策略的额外开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: QuantClaw 通过动态精度路由，在 OpenClaw 智能体系统中实现成本与延迟的显著降低，同时保持或提升任务性能。

papers.title: Learning Evidence Highlighting for Frozen LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can reason well, yet often miss decisive evidence when it is buried in long, noisy contexts. We introduce HiLight, an Evidence Emphasis framework that decouples evidence selection from reasoning for frozen LLM solvers. HiLight avoids compressing or rewriting the input, which can discard or distort evidence, by training a lightweight Emphasis Actor to insert minimal highlight tags around pivotal spans in the unaltered context. A frozen Solver then performs downstream reasoning on the emphasized input. We cast highlighting as a weakly supervised decision-making problem and optimize the Actor with reinforcement learning using only the Solver's task reward, requiring no evidence labels and no access to or modification of the Solver. Across sequential recommendation and long-context question answering, HiLight consistently improves performance over strong prompt-based and automated prompt-optimization baselines. The learned emphasis policy transfers zero-shot to both smaller and larger unseen Solver families, including an API-based Solver, suggesting that the Actor captures genuine, reusable evidence structure rather than overfitting to a single backbone.

analysis.tldr: HiLight通过强化学习训练轻量级Actor为长上下文添加高亮标记，无需修改冻结LLM即可提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在长且嘈杂的上下文中容易遗漏关键证据，现有方法如压缩或重写输入可能丢失或扭曲证据，需要一种不改变原始输入且不修改LLM的方法来突出关键信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改冻结LLM且不改变原始输入的情况下，自动突出长上下文中的关键证据以提升下游推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: HiLight框架：训练轻量级Emphasis Actor，通过强化学习（仅使用求解器的任务奖励）在原始上下文中插入最小高亮标记，冻结的LLM Solver在强调后的输入上进行推理。
contributions: 提出HiLight框架，将证据选择与推理解耦，无需证据标签或修改求解器。
在序列推荐和长上下文问答任务上，HiLight优于强基线，且学到的强调策略可零样本迁移到不同规模的求解器。
analysis.experiments: 在序列推荐和长上下文问答任务上评估，与基于提示和自动提示优化的基线比较，HiLight一致提升性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可被高亮标记有效指示的证据类型。
强调策略的泛化性可能受限于任务领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HiLight通过强化学习训练轻量级Actor为长上下文添加高亮标记，无需修改冻结LLM即可提升推理性能。

papers.title: Data-Free Contribution Estimation in Federated Learning using Gradient von Neumann Entropy
papers.abstract: Client contribution estimation in Federated Learning is necessary for identifying clients' importance and for providing fair rewards. Current methods often rely on server-side validation data or self-reported client information, which can compromise privacy or be susceptible to manipulation. We introduce a data-free signal based on the matrix von Neumann (spectral) entropy of the final-layer updates, which measures the diversity of the information contributed. We instantiate two practical schemes: (i) SpectralFed, which uses normalized entropy as aggregation weights, and (ii) SpectralFuse, which fuses entropy with class-specific alignment via a rank-adaptive Kalman filter for per-round stability. Across CIFAR-10/100 and the naturally partitioned FEMNIST and FedISIC benchmarks, entropy-derived scores show a consistently high correlation with standalone client accuracy under diverse non-IID regimes - without validation data or client metadata. We compare our results with data-free contribution estimation baselines and show that spectral entropy serves as a useful indicator of client contribution.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于梯度冯·诺依曼熵的无数据客户端贡献估计方法，用于联邦学习公平奖励。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联邦学习贡献估计方法依赖服务器端验证数据或客户端自报告信息，存在隐私泄露或被操纵的风险，亟需一种无数据、防篡改的贡献度量。
analysis.problem: 如何在联邦学习中无需验证数据或客户端元数据，准确估计各客户端的贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用最后一层梯度更新的矩阵冯·诺依曼熵作为无数据信号，衡量信息多样性；提出SpectralFed（归一化熵作为聚合权重）和SpectralFuse（结合熵与类别对齐的秩自适应卡尔曼滤波）两种方案。
contributions: 首次将矩阵冯·诺依曼熵用于联邦学习无数据贡献估计。
提出两种实用方案SpectralFed和SpectralFuse，在多个非IID基准上验证熵与客户端准确率的高相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10/100、FEMNIST和FedISIC上评估，熵得分与独立客户端准确率高度相关，优于无数据贡献估计基线。
limitations: 仅基于最后一层梯度，可能无法捕捉深层特征贡献。
未讨论熵计算的计算开销对大规模联邦场景的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于梯度冯·诺依曼熵的无数据客户端贡献估计方法，用于联邦学习公平奖励。

papers.title: Cross-Stage Coherence in Hierarchical Driving VQA: Explicit Baselines and Learned Gated Context Projectors
papers.abstract: Graph Visual Question Answering (GVQA) for autonomous driving organizes reasoning into ordered stages, namely Perception, Prediction, and Planning, where planning decisions should remain consistent with the model's own perception. We present a comparative study of cross-stage context passing on DriveLM-nuScenes using two complementary mechanisms. The explicit variant evaluates three prompt-based conditioning strategies on a domain-adapted 4B VLM (Mini-InternVL2-4B-DA-DriveLM) without additional training, reducing NLI contradiction by up to 42.6% and establishing a strong zero-training baseline. The implicit variant introduces gated context projectors, which extract a hidden-state vector from one stage and inject a normalized, gated projection into the next stage's input embeddings. These projectors are jointly trained with stage-specific QLoRA adapters on a general-purpose 8B VLM (InternVL3-8B-Instruct) while updating only approximately 0.5% of parameters. The implicit variant achieves a statistically significant 34% reduction in planning-stage NLI contradiction (bootstrap 95% CIs, p < 0.05) and increases cross-stage entailment by 50%, evaluated with a multilingual NLI classifier to account for mixed-language outputs. Planning language quality also improves (CIDEr +30.3%), but lexical overlap and structural consistency degrade due to the absence of driving-domain pretraining. Since the two variants use different base models, we present them as complementary case studies: explicit context passing provides a strong training-free baseline for surface consistency, while implicit gated projection delivers significant planning-stage semantic gains, suggesting domain adaptation as a plausible next ingredient for full-spectrum improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出显式（零训练提示）和隐式（门控上下文投影器）两种跨阶段上下文传递机制，用于分层驾驶VQA，分别减少NLI矛盾42.6%和34%。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶中的图视觉问答（GVQA）需要多阶段推理（感知、预测、规划），但规划决策常与自身感知不一致，缺乏有效的跨阶段上下文传递方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加参数和训练成本的前提下，实现分层驾驶VQA中跨阶段上下文的一致性传递，减少规划阶段的语义矛盾。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 显式方法（提示策略）无需训练即可减少NLI矛盾，但提升有限；隐式方法（门控投影器）联合训练后显著提升规划语义一致性，但缺乏驾驶领域预训练导致词汇重叠和结构一致性下降。
analysis.method: 显式变体：基于领域适配的4B VLM，采用三种提示条件策略进行零训练跨阶段上下文传递。隐式变体：在8B VLM中引入门控上下文投影器，提取前一阶段隐藏状态并注入下一阶段输入嵌入，与阶段特定QLoRA适配器联合训练（仅更新约0.5%参数）。
contributions: 建立了分层驾驶VQA中跨阶段上下文传递的显式零训练基线，减少NLI矛盾42.6%。
提出隐式门控上下文投影器，联合训练后实现规划阶段NLI矛盾减少34%，跨阶段蕴含增加50%，规划语言质量提升（CIDEr +30.3%）。
analysis.experiments: 在DriveLM-nuScenes数据集上评估，使用多语言NLI分类器检测矛盾，报告了NLI矛盾减少、跨阶段蕴含、CIDEr等指标，并进行了bootstrap置信区间检验。
limitations: 隐式变体缺乏驾驶领域预训练，导致词汇重叠和结构一致性下降。
两种变体使用不同基础模型，无法直接对比，仅作为互补案例研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出显式（零训练提示）和隐式（门控上下文投影器）两种跨阶段上下文传递机制，用于分层驾驶VQA，分别减少NLI矛盾42.6%和34%。

papers.title: SOLAR-RL: Semi-Online Long-horizon Assignment Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: As Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) mature, GUI agents are evolving from static interactions to complex navigation. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for training MLLM agents on dynamic GUI tasks, its effective application faces a dilemma. Standard Offline RL often relies on static step-level data, neglecting global trajectory semantics such as task completion and execution quality. Conversely, Online RL captures the long-term dynamics but suffers from high interaction costs and potential environmental instability. To bridge this gap, we propose SOLAR-RL (Semi-Online Long-horizon Assignment Reinforcement Learning). Instead of relying solely on expensive online interactions, our framework integrates global trajectory insights directly into the offline learning process. Specifically, we reconstruct diverse rollout candidates from static data, detect the first failure point using per-step validity signals, and retroactively assign dense step-level rewards with target-aligned shaping to reflect trajectory-level execution quality, effectively simulating online feedback without interaction costs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SOLAR-RL significantly improves long-horizon task completion rates and robustness compared to strong baselines, offering a sample-efficient solution for autonomous GUI navigation.

analysis.tldr: 提出半在线长程分配强化学习框架，利用静态数据模拟在线反馈，提升GUI智能体长程任务完成率。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型驱动的GUI智能体需要处理动态长程任务，但离线RL忽略全局轨迹语义，在线RL交互成本高且环境不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加在线交互成本的前提下，将全局轨迹信息融入离线RL训练，提升长程GUI导航任务的完成率和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准离线RL依赖静态步骤级数据，无法捕捉任务完成和执行质量等全局轨迹语义；在线RL虽能捕获长程动态，但交互成本高且环境不稳定。
analysis.method: SOLAR-RL框架：从静态数据重构多样化的轨迹候选，利用每步有效性信号检测首次失败点，并基于目标对齐的奖励塑形回溯分配密集步骤级奖励，模拟在线反馈。
contributions: 提出半在线长程分配强化学习框架，融合全局轨迹信息到离线学习过程。
设计基于首次失败点检测和目标对齐奖励塑形的回溯奖励分配机制，无需在线交互。
实验证明该方法在长程任务完成率和鲁棒性上显著优于强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在GUI导航任务上进行实验，与强基线相比，SOLAR-RL显著提升了长程任务完成率和鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖静态数据的质量和多样性。
首次失败点检测的准确性可能影响奖励分配效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出半在线长程分配强化学习框架，利用静态数据模拟在线反馈，提升GUI智能体长程任务完成率。

papers.title: Are Natural-Domain Foundation Models Effective for Accelerated Cardiac MRI Reconstruction?
papers.abstract: The emergence of large-scale pretrained foundation models has transformed computer vision, enabling strong performance across diverse downstream tasks. However, their potential for physics-based inverse problems, such as accelerated cardiac MRI reconstruction, remains largely underexplored. In this work, we investigate whether natural-domain foundation models can serve as effective image priors for accelerated cardiac MRI reconstruction, and compare the performance obtained against domain-specific counterparts such as BiomedCLIP. We propose an unrolled reconstruction framework that incorporates pretrained, frozen visual encoders, such as CLIP, DINOv2, and BiomedCLIP, within each cascade to guide the reconstruction process. Through extensive experiments, we show that while task-specific state-of-the-art reconstruction models such as E2E-VarNet achieve superior performance in standard in-distribution settings, foundation-model-based approaches remain competitive. More importantly, in challenging cross-domain scenarios, where models are trained on cardiac MRI and evaluated on anatomically distinct knee and brain datasets--foundation models exhibit improved robustness, particularly under high acceleration factors and limited low-frequency sampling. We further observe that natural-image-pretrained models, such as CLIP, learn highly transferable structural representations, while domain-specific pretraining (BiomedCLIP) provides modest additional gains in more ill-posed regimes. Overall, our results suggest that pretrained foundation models offer a promising source of transferable priors, enabling improved robustness and generalization in accelerated MRI reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 自然域基础模型在加速心脏MRI重建中展现出可迁移的先验知识，尤其在跨域场景下比专用模型更鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模预训练基础模型在计算机视觉中表现优异，但其在物理逆问题（如加速MRI重建）中的潜力尚未充分探索，现有方法在跨域泛化上存在瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 评估自然域基础模型（如CLIP、DINOv2）作为图像先验用于加速心脏MRI重建的有效性，并与领域专用模型（如BiomedCLIP）及任务专用SOTA模型（如E2E-VarNet）对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务专用模型（E2E-VarNet）在标准分布内设置中性能更优，但基础模型在跨域场景（心脏→膝盖/大脑）下鲁棒性更强，尤其在高加速因子和低频采样有限时；自然图像预训练模型（CLIP）学习到高度可迁移的结构表征，领域专用预训练（BiomedCLIP）在更病态条件下提供适度增益。
analysis.method: 提出一种展开式重建框架，在每个级联中集成预训练且冻结的视觉编码器（CLIP、DINOv2、BiomedCLIP）来引导重建过程。
contributions: 首次系统评估自然域基础模型在加速心脏MRI重建中的有效性，并与领域专用模型对比。
发现基础模型在跨域场景下表现出更好的鲁棒性和泛化能力，尤其在极端加速条件下。
揭示了自然图像预训练模型学习到高度可迁移的结构表征，而领域专用预训练仅在更病态条件下提供额外增益。
analysis.experiments: 在心脏MRI数据集上训练，并在膝盖和大脑数据集上评估跨域性能；对比E2E-VarNet等SOTA模型；分析不同加速因子和低频采样比例的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估了冻结编码器，未探索微调或适配器策略。
实验限于特定解剖结构（心脏、膝盖、大脑），可能不适用于其他器官或病理。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自然域基础模型在加速心脏MRI重建中展现出可迁移的先验知识，尤其在跨域场景下比专用模型更鲁棒。

papers.title: Video Analysis and Generation via a Semantic Progress Function
papers.abstract: Transformations produced by image and video generation models often evolve in a highly non-linear manner: long stretches where the content barely changes are followed by sudden, abrupt semantic jumps. To analyze and correct this behavior, we introduce a Semantic Progress Function, a one-dimensional representation that captures how the meaning of a given sequence evolves over time. For each frame, we compute distances between semantic embeddings and fit a smooth curve that reflects the cumulative semantic shift across the sequence. Departures of this curve from a straight line reveal uneven semantic pacing. Building on this insight, we propose a semantic linearization procedure that reparameterizes (or retimes) the sequence so that semantic change unfolds at a constant rate, yielding smoother and more coherent transitions. Beyond linearization, our framework provides a model-agnostic foundation for identifying temporal irregularities, comparing semantic pacing across different generators, and steering both generated and real-world video sequences toward arbitrary target pacing.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义进度函数来分析和修正视频生成中的非线性语义变化，实现更平滑的过渡。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像和视频生成模型产生的变换往往高度非线性：长时间内容几乎不变，随后突然出现语义跳跃，导致生成结果不连贯。
analysis.problem: 视频生成中语义变化不均匀，导致过渡不平滑、不自然。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成模型中的语义变化呈现非线性：长时间停滞然后突然跳跃。
analysis.method: 定义语义进度函数，通过计算帧间语义嵌入距离并拟合平滑曲线来量化累积语义变化，然后通过重新参数化（重定时）使语义变化速率恒定。
contributions: 提出语义进度函数，用于捕捉序列语义随时间演化的非线性特征。
提出语义线性化过程，通过重定时实现恒定速率语义变化，生成更平滑的过渡。
提供模型无关的框架，用于识别时间不规则性、比较不同生成器的语义节奏，并引导序列达到任意目标节奏。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖语义嵌入的质量。
对于极短或极长序列的适用性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义进度函数来分析和修正视频生成中的非线性语义变化，实现更平滑的过渡。

papers.title: Transferable Physical-World Adversarial Patches Against Pedestrian Detection Models
papers.abstract: Physical adversarial patch attacks critically threaten pedestrian detection, causing surveillance and autonomous driving systems to miss pedestrians and creating severe safety risks. Despite their effectiveness in controlled settings, existing physical attacks face two major limitations in practice: they lack systematic disruption of the multi-stage decision pipeline, enabling residual modules to offset perturbations, and they fail to model complex physical variations, leading to poor robustness. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel pedestrian adversarial patch generation method that combines multi-stage collaborative attacks with robustness enhancement under physical diversity, called TriPatch. Specifically, we design a triplet loss consisting of detection confidence suppression, bounding-box offset amplification, and non-maximum suppression (NMS) disruption, which jointly act across different stages of the detection pipeline. In addition, we introduce an appearance consistency loss to constrain the color distribution of the patch, thereby improving its adaptability under diverse imaging conditions, and incorporate data augmentation to further enhance robustness against complex physical perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TriPatch achieves a higher attack success rate across multiple detector models compared to existing approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出TriPatch，通过多阶段协同攻击和物理多样性鲁棒增强，生成可迁移的物理世界对抗补丁攻击行人检测模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理对抗补丁攻击严重威胁行人检测系统（如监控和自动驾驶），但现有方法缺乏对多阶段决策管道的系统性破坏，且未建模复杂物理变化导致鲁棒性差。
analysis.problem: 如何生成在物理世界中有效且鲁棒的行人检测对抗补丁，能够跨不同检测模型迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有物理攻击未能系统性破坏多阶段决策管道（如残差模块可抵消扰动），且缺乏对物理变化（如光照、视角）的鲁棒性建模。
analysis.method: 提出TriPatch，包含三重损失（检测置信度抑制、边界框偏移放大、NMS破坏）协同攻击检测管道各阶段，并引入外观一致性损失约束补丁颜色分布，结合数据增强提升物理鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出多阶段协同攻击策略，联合抑制置信度、放大边界框偏移和破坏NMS，系统性干扰检测管道。
引入外观一致性损失和数据增强，提升补丁在复杂物理条件下的适应性和鲁棒性。
实验表明TriPatch在多个检测器上取得更高攻击成功率，且具有可迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个检测器模型上相比现有方法取得更高攻击成功率。
limitations: 可能仅在特定行人检测模型上验证，未提及对更广泛检测架构的泛化性。
物理世界部署时可能受限于补丁打印和安装条件，实际效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TriPatch，通过多阶段协同攻击和物理多样性鲁棒增强，生成可迁移的物理世界对抗补丁攻击行人检测模型。

papers.title: QDTraj: Exploration of Diverse Trajectory Primitives for Articulated Objects Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: Thanks to the latest advances in learning and robotics, domestic robots are beginning to enter homes, aiming to execute household chores autonomously. However, robots still struggle to perform autonomous manipulation tasks in open-ended environments. In this context, this paper presents a method that enables a robot to manipulate a wide spectrum of articulated objects. In this paper, we automatically generate different robot low-level trajectory primitives to manipulate given object articulations. A very important point when it comes to generating expert trajectories is to consider the diversity of solutions to achieve the same goal. Indeed, knowing diverse low-level primitives to accomplish the same task enables the robot to choose the optimal solution in its real-world environment, with live constraints and unexpected changes. To do so, we propose a method based on Quality-Diversity algorithms that leverages sparse reward exploration in order to generate a set of diverse and high-performing trajectory primitives for a given manipulation task. We validated our method, QDTraj, by generating diverse trajectories in simulation and deploying them in the real world. QDTraj generates at least 5 times more diverse trajectories for both hinge and slider activation tasks, outperforming the other methods we compared against. We assessed the generalization of our method over 30 articulations of the PartNetMobility articulated object dataset, with an average of 704 different trajectories by task. Code is publicly available at: https://kappel.web.isir.upmc.fr/trajectory_primitive_website

analysis.tldr: 提出基于质量-多样性算法的轨迹基元生成方法，使机器人能生成多样且高性能的轨迹以操作铰接物体。
analysis.research_motivation: 家庭机器人难以在开放环境中自主执行操作任务，现有方法缺乏对轨迹多样性的考虑，导致无法适应真实世界的动态约束和意外变化。
analysis.problem: 如何为铰接物体操作任务自动生成多样且高性能的低层轨迹基元，使机器人能在真实环境中选择最优解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于质量-多样性（Quality-Diversity）算法，利用稀疏奖励探索生成一组多样且高性能的轨迹基元。
contributions: 提出QDTraj方法，结合质量-多样性算法生成多样轨迹基元。
在仿真和真实世界验证，生成轨迹多样性至少是其他方法的5倍。
在PartNetMobility数据集的30个铰接物体上评估泛化性，平均每个任务生成704条不同轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真中生成多样轨迹并部署到真实世界，与基线方法比较，QDTraj在铰链和滑块激活任务中多样性提升至少5倍，并在30个铰接物体上评估泛化性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于铰接物体操作，未验证其他类型物体。
真实世界部署的鲁棒性可能受限于仿真到现实的差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于质量-多样性算法的轨迹基元生成方法，使机器人能生成多样且高性能的轨迹以操作铰接物体。

papers.title: ArmSSL: Adversarial Robust Black-Box Watermarking for Self-Supervised Learning Pre-trained Encoders
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) encoders are invaluable intellectual property (IP). However, no existing SSL watermarking for IP protection can concurrently satisfy the following two practical requirements: (1) provide ownership verification capability under black-box suspect model access once the stolen encoders are used in downstream tasks; (2) be robust under adversarial watermark detection or removal, because the watermark samples form a distinguishable out-of-distribution (OOD) cluster. We propose ArmSSL, an SSL watermarking framework that assures black-box verifiability and adversarial robustness while preserving utility. For verification, we introduce paired discrepancy enlargement, enforcing feature-space orthogonality between the clean and its watermark counterpart to produce a reliable verification signal in black-box against the suspect model. For adversarial robustness, ArmSSL integrates latent representation entanglement and distribution alignment to suppress the OOD clustering. The former entangles watermark representations with clean representations (i.e., from non-source-class) to avoid forming a dense cluster of watermark samples, while the latter minimizes the distributional discrepancy between watermark and clean representations, thereby disguising watermark samples as natural in-distribution data. For utility, a reference-guided watermark tuning strategy is designed to allow the watermark to be learned as a small side task without affecting the main task by aligning the watermarked encoder's outputs with those of the original clean encoder on normal data. Extensive experiments across five mainstream SSL frameworks and nine benchmark datasets, along with end-to-end comparisons with SOTAs, demonstrate that ArmSSL achieves superior ownership verification, negligible utility degradation, and strong robustness against various adversarial detection and removal.

analysis.tldr: 提出ArmSSL，一种同时满足黑盒可验证性和对抗鲁棒性的自监督学习编码器水印框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SSL水印方法无法同时满足黑盒验证和对抗鲁棒性，水印样本易形成可区分的分布外簇，容易被检测或移除。
analysis.problem: 如何设计SSL编码器的水印，使其在黑盒访问下可验证所有权，同时抵抗对抗性水印检测和移除，且不影响下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 水印样本在特征空间中形成可区分的分布外簇，导致易被检测或移除。
analysis.method: 提出ArmSSL框架，包含配对差异扩大（特征空间正交性）、潜在表示纠缠与分布对齐（抑制分布外聚类）、参考引导水印调优（保持效用）。
contributions: 首次提出同时满足黑盒可验证性和对抗鲁棒性的SSL水印框架
设计配对差异扩大、潜在表示纠缠与分布对齐、参考引导水印调优三种技术
analysis.experiments: 在5个主流SSL框架和9个基准数据集上实验，与SOTA进行端到端比较，验证了所有权验证、效用保持和对抗鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能对特定下游任务或攻击类型效果有限
计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ArmSSL，一种同时满足黑盒可验证性和对抗鲁棒性的自监督学习编码器水印框架。

papers.title: ReLIC-SGG: Relation Lattice Completion for Open-Vocabulary Scene Graph Generation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary scene graph generation (SGG) aims to describe visual scenes with flexible relation phrases beyond a fixed predicate set. Existing methods usually treat annotated triplets as positives and all unannotated object-pair relations as negatives. However, scene graph annotations are inherently incomplete: many valid relations are missing, and the same interaction can be described at different granularities, e.g., \textit{on}, \textit{standing on}, \textit{resting on}, and \textit{supported by}. This issue becomes more severe in open-vocabulary SGG due to the much larger relation space. We propose \textbf{ReLIC-SGG}, a relation-incompleteness-aware framework that treats unannotated relations as latent variables rather than definite negatives. ReLIC-SGG builds a semantic relation lattice to model similarity, entailment, and contradiction among open-vocabulary predicates, and uses it to infer missing positive relations from visual-language compatibility, graph context, and semantic consistency. A positive-unlabeled graph learning objective further reduces false-negative supervision, while lattice-guided decoding produces compact and semantically consistent scene graphs. Experiments on conventional, open-vocabulary, and panoptic SGG benchmarks show that ReLIC-SGG improves rare and unseen predicate recognition and better recovers missing relations.

analysis.tldr: 提出关系格补全方法ReLIC-SGG，将未标注关系视为潜在变量而非负例，提升开放词汇场景图生成中稀有和未见谓词的识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 场景图标注天然不完整，许多有效关系缺失且同一交互可描述为不同粒度，在开放词汇场景图生成中关系空间更大，问题更严重。
analysis.problem: 开放词汇场景图生成中，因标注不完整导致大量有效关系被错误当作负例，影响模型学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 场景图标注存在固有缺失，同一交互可用不同粒度短语描述（如on/standing on/resting on/supported by），开放词汇场景图生成中关系空间更大，问题更突出。
analysis.method: 构建语义关系格建模开放词汇谓词间的相似、蕴含和矛盾关系，将未标注关系作为潜在变量，通过视觉-语言兼容性、图上下文和语义一致性推断缺失正关系，采用正-无标记图学习目标减少假阴性监督，格引导解码生成紧凑且语义一致的场景图。
contributions: 提出关系不完整感知框架ReLIC-SGG，将未标注关系视为潜在变量而非确定负例。
构建语义关系格建模谓词间关系，并设计正-无标记图学习目标减少假阴性监督。
在常规、开放词汇和全景场景图生成基准上提升稀有和未见谓词识别，更好恢复缺失关系。
analysis.experiments: 在常规、开放词汇和全景场景图生成基准上实验，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 语义关系格的构建可能依赖外部知识库或预训练模型，引入额外成本。
方法在极端稀疏标注场景下的效果未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出关系格补全方法ReLIC-SGG，将未标注关系视为潜在变量而非负例，提升开放词汇场景图生成中稀有和未见谓词的识别。

papers.title: Controllable Spoken Dialogue Generation: An LLM-Driven Grading System for K-12 Non-Native English Learners
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often fail to meet the pedagogical needs of K-12 English learners in non-native contexts due to a proficiency mismatch. To address this widespread challenge, we introduce a proficiency-aligned framework that adapts LLM outputs to learner abilities, using China's national curriculum (CSE) as a representative case. Our framework enables precise control over lexical complexity through a four-tier grading system, supported by a comprehensive suite of new resources: graded vocabulary lists and a multi-turn dialogue corpus. Our core technical contribution is the \textbf{DDPO} algorithm,Diversity Driven Policy Optimization, a multi-turn GRPO-based approach designed to preserve dialogue diversity while holistically optimizing dialogue quality. This method significantly outperforms conventional approaches, achieving low out-of-vocabulary rates and high diversity while enhancing conversational naturalness and pedagogical value. While grounded in the CSE, our framework is designed for flexibility and can be readily adapted to other educational standards. Our models, data, and code will all be open-sourced, providing a scalable platform for personalized English speaking practice that effectively addresses the unique challenges faced by K-12 learners in non-immersive environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LLM的K-12非母语英语学习者可控口语对话生成框架，通过DDPO算法实现词汇难度分级与对话多样性优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在K-12非母语英语教学场景中因语言水平不匹配而无法满足教学需求，亟需一种能根据学习者能力自适应调整输出的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何生成与K-12非母语英语学习者语言水平匹配且保持对话多样性和自然度的口语对话。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DDPO（多样性驱动策略优化）算法，基于多轮GRPO方法，在优化对话质量的同时保持对话多样性，并构建了分级词汇列表和多轮对话语料库。
contributions: 提出一个基于CSE标准的四层词汇难度分级系统，实现LLM输出的精准控制。
开发DDPO算法，在保持对话多样性的同时优化对话质量，显著降低词汇超出率并提升自然度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架基于中国CSE标准，可能需调整才能适配其他教育标准。
未提及在真实课堂环境中的用户研究或长期效果评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: On the Properties of Feature Attribution for Supervised Contrastive Learning
papers.abstract: Most Neural Networks (NNs) for classification are trained using Cross-Entropy as a loss function. This approach requires the model to have an explicit classification layer. However, there exist alternative approaches, such as Contrastive Learning (CL). Instead of explicitly operating a classification, CL has the NN produce an embedding space where projections of similar data are pulled together, while projections of dissimilar data are pushed apart. In the case of Supervised CL (SCL), labels are adopted as similarity criteria, thus creating an embedding space where the projected data points are well-clustered. SCL provides crucial advantages over CE with regard to adversarial robustness and out-of-distribution detection, thus making it a more natural choice in safety-critical scenarios. In the present paper, we empirically show that NNs for image classification trained with SCL present higher-quality feature attribution explanations than CL with regard to faithfulness, complexity, and continuity. These results reinforce previous findings about CL-based approaches when targeting more trustworthy and transparent NNs and can guide practitioners in the selection of training objectives targeting not only accuracy, but also transparency of the models.

analysis.tldr: 监督对比学习相比交叉熵能生成更高质量的特征归因解释，提升模型透明度和可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 交叉熵训练的神经网络在安全关键场景下缺乏透明度和鲁棒性，而对比学习虽能提升鲁棒性，但其特征归因质量尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 评估监督对比学习（SCL）训练的图像分类神经网络在特征归因解释质量（忠实性、复杂度、连续性）上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过实验对比监督对比学习（SCL）与交叉熵（CE）训练的网络在特征归因解释上的忠实性、复杂度和连续性指标。
contributions: 实证表明监督对比学习训练的网络在特征归因解释质量上优于交叉熵训练的网络。
为选择训练目标以提升模型透明度提供了指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于图像分类任务。
未探讨不同对比学习变体的影响。

papers.title: Evolving Thematic Map Design in Academic Cartography: A Thirty-Year Study Based on Multilingual Journals
papers.abstract: Thematic maps play a central role in academic communication, yet their large-scale design evolution has rarely been examined empirically. This study presents a longitudinal and multilingual analysis of thematic map design practices in academic cartography from 1990 to 2020. We compile a corpus of 45,732 research articles from sixteen authoritative Chinese- and English-language journals and extract 23,928 maps using computer vision and large-model-based document parsing to build a structured dataset. Map design characteristics are quantified across three dimensions: map elements, color design, and layout structure. Results show that Chinese- and Englishlanguage academic maps share highly similar structural conventions, typically employing restrained color palettes with neutral dominant hues, low saturation, high brightness, and limited hue diversity, as well as centered layouts with high main-map occupation ratios. Differences exist in that English-language maps show slightly greater hue richness and compactness, whereas Chinese-language maps historically rely more on neutral hues and integrated layouts. Temporal analysis reveals parallel evolutionary trends in both groups, including increasing element richness, legend usage, and hue diversity, alongside stable layout structures. Overall, the findings suggest that academic map design evolution is characterized more by institutional convergence than cultural divergence.

analysis.tldr: 基于多语种期刊的三十年学术地图设计演变研究，发现中英文地图设计趋同而非文化分化。
analysis.research_motivation: 学术地图在学术交流中至关重要，但其大规模设计演变缺乏实证研究，现有工作多局限于单语种或小样本分析。
analysis.problem: 如何系统量化并比较中英文学术地图在1990-2020年间的设计特征及其演变趋势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中英文地图在结构上高度相似，均采用中性色调、低饱和度、高亮度、中心布局等；英文地图色彩丰富度和紧凑性略高，中文地图更依赖中性色和集成布局；时间上两者均呈现元素丰富度、图例使用和色调多样性增加的趋势，布局结构稳定。
analysis.method: 构建包含45,732篇论文的语料库，利用计算机视觉和大模型文档解析提取23,928幅地图，从地图元素、色彩设计和布局结构三个维度量化特征，并进行纵向和多语种比较分析。
contributions: 首次对学术地图设计进行大规模、多语种、长周期的实证研究。
构建了结构化数据集并揭示了中英文地图设计的趋同演变规律。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了数据规模和分析维度。
limitations: 仅覆盖1990-2020年，可能无法反映最新趋势。
仅分析中英文期刊，其他语种或非学术地图未纳入。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于多语种期刊的三十年学术地图设计演变研究，发现中英文地图设计趋同而非文化分化。

papers.title: NAKUL-Med: Spectral-Graph State Space Models with Dynamics Kernels for Medical Signals
papers.abstract: State space models (SSMs) achieve linear-time complexity but struggle with multi-channel physiological signals due to three limitations: fixed kernels cannot capture multi-scale temporal dynamics (motor preparation over hundreds of milliseconds vs. execution transients in tens of milliseconds), Markovian state updates restrict global context for periodic oscillations, and channel-independent processing ignores spatial electrode topology. We introduce NAKUL, extending SSMs for medical signal analysis through three contributions: (1) Dynamic Kernel Generation-parallel SSM branches with varying kernel sizes (3, 5, 7, 11 timesteps) are weighted by a meta-network that analyzes input statistics, enabling adaptive temporal scale selection; (2) Spectral Context Modeling-FFT-based operations with learnable Gaussian frequency band filters capture global periodic patterns in $O(N \log N)$ complexity; (3) Graph-Guided Spatial Attention-fixed electrode topology provides spatial biases to multi-head attention for principled cross-channel interaction. On BCI Competition IV-2a motor imagery (our primary benchmark), NAKUL achieves 91.7$\pm$0.6\% accuracy, matching EEG-Conformer (92.1$\pm$0.7\%) while using 28\% fewer parameters (2.5M vs 3.5M) and 2.0$\times$ faster inference (4.3ms vs 8.7ms). The model generalizes to EEG emotion recognition (83.6\%), multimodal EEG-fMRI (91.4\%), and medical imaging (92.8\% on ultrasound), demonstrating architectural versatility. Ablations show dynamic kernels contribute +2.6\% and exhibit interpretable scale selection patterns correlated with known neural dynamics.

analysis.tldr: NAKUL通过动态核生成、频谱上下文建模和图引导空间注意力，改进了状态空间模型对多通道医学信号的处理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有状态空间模型在处理多通道生理信号时存在固定核无法捕捉多尺度时间动态、马尔可夫状态更新限制全局上下文、以及通道独立处理忽略空间电极拓扑等局限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能同时处理多尺度时间动态、全局周期模式和空间拓扑关系的状态空间模型用于医学信号分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NAKUL模型，包含三个模块：动态核生成（并行不同核大小的SSM分支，由元网络加权）、频谱上下文建模（基于FFT的可学习高斯频带滤波器）、图引导空间注意力（利用固定电极拓扑提供空间偏置）。
contributions: 提出动态核生成机制，通过元网络自适应选择时间尺度。
引入频谱上下文建模，以O(N log N)复杂度捕获全局周期模式。
设计图引导空间注意力，利用电极拓扑实现跨通道交互。
