analysis.experiments: 在BCI Competition IV-2a运动想象基准上，NAKUL达到91.7%准确率，与EEG-Conformer（92.1%）相当，但参数减少28%，推理速度提升2.0倍。在EEG情感识别（83.6%）、多模态EEG-fMRI（91.4%）和医学图像（超声92.8%）上验证了泛化性。消融实验显示动态核贡献+2.6%准确率。
limitations: 可能对电极拓扑的依赖性较强，不适用于无固定拓扑的场景。
频谱建模的复杂度仍为O(N log N)，对于极长序列可能仍有瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NAKUL通过动态核生成、频谱上下文建模和图引导空间注意力，改进了状态空间模型对多通道医学信号的处理。

papers.title: Text-Guided Multimodal Unified Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Industrial anomaly detection based on RGB-3D multimodal data has emerged as a mainstream paradigm for intelligent quality inspection. However, existing unsupervised methods suffer from two critical limitations: ambiguous cross-modal alignment caused by the lack of high-level semantic guidance and insufficient geometric modeling for RGB-to-3D feature mapping. To address these issues, we propose a unified multimodal industrial anomaly detection framework guided by text semantics. The framework consists of two core modules: a Geometry-Aware Cross-Modal Mapper to preserve geometric structure during modality conversion, and an Object-Conditioned Textual Feature Adaptor to align multimodal features with semantic priors. Furthermore, we establish a unified learning paradigm for multimodal industrial anomaly detection, which breaks the one-model-one-class constraint and enables accurate anomaly detection across diverse classes using a single model. Extensive experiments on the MVTec 3D-AD and Eyecandies datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in classification and localization under unsupervised settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出文本引导的多模态统一工业异常检测框架，利用几何感知跨模态映射和对象条件文本特征适配器，实现单模型多类检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RGB-3D多模态工业异常检测方法缺乏高层语义引导，导致跨模态对齐模糊，且RGB到3D特征映射的几何建模不足，限制了检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现统一的多模态工业异常检测，解决跨模态对齐模糊和几何建模不足的问题，并突破单模型单类别的限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架，包含几何感知跨模态映射器（保持几何结构）和对象条件文本特征适配器（对齐语义先验），实现单模型多类异常检测。
contributions: 提出文本引导的统一多模态工业异常检测框架，解决跨模态对齐和几何建模问题。
建立统一学习范式，突破单模型单类别限制，实现多类异常检测。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTec 3D-AD和Eyecandies数据集上，无监督设置下分类和定位达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本描述，实际工业场景中文本获取成本高。
框架复杂度较高，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本引导的多模态统一工业异常检测框架，利用几何感知跨模态映射和对象条件文本特征适配器，实现单模型多类检测。

papers.title: FeatEHR-LLM: Leveraging Large Language Models for Feature Engineering in Electronic Health Records
papers.abstract: Feature engineering for Electronic Health Records (EHR) is complicated by irregular observation intervals, variable measurement frequencies, and structural sparsity inherent to clinical time series. Existing automated methods either lack clinical domain awareness or assume clean, regularly sampled inputs, limiting their applicability to real-world EHR data. We present \textbf{FeatEHR-LLM}, a framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate clinically meaningful tabular features from irregularly sampled EHR time series. To limit patient privacy exposure, the LLM operates exclusively on dataset schemas and task descriptions rather than raw patient records. A tool-augmented generation mechanism equips the LLM with specialized routines for querying irregular temporal data, enabling it to produce executable feature-extraction code that explicitly handles uneven observation patterns and informative sparsity. FeatEHR-LLM supports both univariate and multivariate feature generation through an iterative, validation-in-the-loop pipeline. Evaluated on eight clinical prediction tasks across four ICU datasets, our framework achieves the highest mean AUROC on 7 out of 8 tasks, with improvements of up to 6 percentage points over strong baselines. Code is available at github.com/hojjatkarami/FeatEHR-LLM.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM从非规则采样的EHR时间序列中自动生成临床有意义的表格特征，提升预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: EHR特征工程面临观测间隔不规则、测量频率多变和结构稀疏性等挑战，现有自动化方法缺乏临床领域意识或假设数据规则采样，难以应用于真实EHR数据。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM从非规则采样的EHR时间序列中生成临床有意义的表格特征，同时保护患者隐私并处理不规则观测模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FeatEHR-LLM框架，LLM仅基于数据集模式和任务描述（而非原始患者记录）生成特征提取代码；通过工具增强生成机制，使LLM能调用专门例程查询不规则时序数据；采用迭代、验证在环的流程支持单变量和多变量特征生成。
contributions: 提出首个利用LLM进行EHR特征工程的框架，能处理不规则采样和结构稀疏性。
设计隐私保护机制，LLM仅访问模式信息而非原始记录。
在8个临床预测任务上取得7个最高平均AUROC，最高提升6个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在四个ICU数据集上的八项临床预测任务中评估，框架在7/8任务上取得最高平均AUROC，最高提升6个百分点。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM对临床模式的先验知识，泛化到罕见疾病时效果未知。
工具增强生成机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM从非规则采样的EHR时间序列中自动生成临床有意义的表格特征，提升预测性能。

papers.title: Reconstructive Authority Model: Runtime Execution Validity Under Partial Observability
papers.abstract: Autonomous systems increasingly operate under partial observability where execution-relevant state is never fully accessible. Existing governance mechanisms -- trusted execution environments, oracle-signed state proofs, cryptographic attestation -- enforce the integrity of computation and state projections. We show this is structurally insufficient: an authenticated projection of state is necessary but never sufficient for execution validity. We introduce the Reconstructive Authority Model (RAM), which separates integrity from coverage. RAM defines a reconstruction gate that reasons over an explicit coverage envelope -- comprising proven state, declared assumptions, and an acknowledged unobservable residual -- and permits execution only when coverage is adequate for the action class. When coverage is insufficient, RAM narrows privileges dynamically or fails closed. Attestation proves trust in measurement; RAM proves adequacy of what is measured. We formalize RAM, prove necessity via two theorems (attestation insufficiency and RAM necessity) and three corollaries, and present a hybrid RAM+Attestation architecture with privilege-narrowing. Synthetic experiments (N=100,000, seed=42) show RAM achieves zero invalid execution rates at all coverage levels. Attestation-based systems exhibit IER=0.423 at low coverage and IER=0.233 even at full coverage, the latter arising from undefined-state handling failures undetectable by integrity checks alone. This reframes execution validity as a coverage reconstruction problem, distinct from and complementary to integrity guarantees provided by attestation.

analysis.tldr: 提出重构权威模型（RAM），通过显式覆盖包络和重构门控解决部分可观测下执行有效性问题，证明仅靠完整性认证不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主系统在部分可观测环境下运行，现有治理机制（如可信执行环境、密码学认证）仅保证计算和状态投影的完整性，但无法确保执行有效性，因为状态投影的认证是必要但不充分的。
analysis.problem: 解决部分可观测下执行有效性问题，即如何在不完全可访问状态的情况下，确保系统执行的动作是有效的。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过定理和实验表明，仅依赖完整性认证的系统在低覆盖度下无效执行率（IER）为0.423，即使在完全覆盖下也有0.233的IER，源于完整性检查无法检测的未定义状态处理失败。
analysis.method: 提出重构权威模型（RAM），包含重构门控，该门控基于显式覆盖包络（包括已证明状态、声明假设和已知不可观测残差）进行推理，仅当覆盖度对动作类足够时才允许执行；覆盖不足时动态缩小权限或安全关闭。
contributions: 形式化定义了重构权威模型（RAM），将完整性（integrity）与覆盖度（coverage）分离。
通过两个定理（认证不足定理和RAM必要性定理）和三个推论证明RAM的必要性。
提出混合RAM+认证架构，具备权限缩小机制。
通过合成实验（N=100,000）证明RAM在所有覆盖度下实现零无效执行率，而认证系统存在高无效执行率。
analysis.experiments: 合成实验，N=100,000，种子=42，比较RAM与认证系统在不同覆盖度下的无效执行率（IER）。RAM在所有覆盖度下IER=0；认证系统在低覆盖度下IER=0.423，完全覆盖下IER=0.233。
limitations: 实验基于合成数据，未在真实自主系统中验证。
覆盖包络的构建和假设声明可能依赖领域知识，自动化程度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出重构权威模型（RAM），通过显式覆盖包络和重构门控解决部分可观测下执行有效性问题，证明仅靠完整性认证不足。

papers.title: Distilling Vision Transformers for Distortion-Robust Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning has achieved remarkable success in learning visual representations from clean data, yet remains challenging when clean observations are sparse or not available at all. In this paper, we demonstrate that pretrained vision models can be leveraged to learn distortion-robust representations, which can then be effectively applied to downstream tasks operating on distorted observations. In particular, we propose an asymmetric knowledge distillation framework in which both teacher and student are initialized from the same pretrained Vision Transformer but receive different views of each image: the teacher processes clean images, while the student sees their distorted versions. We introduce multi-level distillation that aligns global embeddings, patch-level features, and attention maps and show that the student is able to approximate clean-image representations despite never directly accessing clean data. We evaluate our approach on image classification tasks across several datasets and under various distortions, consistently outperforming existing alternatives for the same amount of human supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称知识蒸馏框架，让学生模型仅从失真图像中学习到接近干净图像的表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督学习在干净数据上表现优异，但实际场景中干净观测数据稀疏或不可得，需要从失真数据中学习鲁棒表征。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练视觉模型，在仅访问失真图像的情况下学习到与干净图像表征接近的鲁棒表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 非对称知识蒸馏框架：教师和学生初始化自同一预训练ViT，教师处理干净图像，学生处理失真版本；通过多级蒸馏对齐全局嵌入、patch级特征和注意力图。
contributions: 提出一种非对称知识蒸馏方法，使学生模型能从失真图像中学习干净图像表征。
引入多级蒸馏对齐策略，包括全局、局部和注意力图层面。
在多个数据集和多种失真类型上验证了方法优于现有替代方案。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和多种失真类型上进行图像分类评估，一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖预训练ViT的初始化，可能对教师模型质量敏感。
仅评估了图像分类任务，其他下游任务（如检测、分割）未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非对称知识蒸馏框架，让学生模型仅从失真图像中学习到接近干净图像的表征。

papers.title: Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus for Prohibitively Large Datasets
papers.abstract: We introduce NONSAC (Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus), a general framework for robust and scalable model estimation from arbitrarily large datasets contaminated with noise and outliers. NONSAC repeatedly samples non-minimal subsets of data and generates model hypotheses using a robust estimator, producing multiple candidate models. The final model is selected based on a predefined scoring rule that evaluates hypothesis quality. Our framework is estimator-agnostic and can be integrated with existing geometric fitting algorithms such as RANSAC to improve both scalability and robustness to outliers. We propose and evaluate various scoring rules for NONSAC on relative camera pose estimation, Perspective-n-Point, and point cloud registration. Furthermore, we showcase the applicability of NONSAC to correspondence-free point cloud registration by hypothesizing all-to-all correspondences.

analysis.tldr: 提出NONSAC框架，通过非最小子集采样和鲁棒估计器实现大规模数据集的鲁棒模型估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RANSAC等方法在处理大规模数据集时计算开销大，且对离群点鲁棒性不足，需要可扩展且鲁棒的模型估计方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从含有噪声和离群点的大规模数据集中高效且鲁棒地估计模型参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: NONSAC框架：重复采样非最小子集，使用鲁棒估计器生成多个候选模型，基于预定义评分规则选择最终模型。
contributions: 提出NONSAC框架，可集成现有几何拟合算法（如RANSAC）提升可扩展性和鲁棒性。
在相对相机位姿估计、PnP和点云配准任务上评估多种评分规则，并展示在无对应点云配准中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 在相对相机位姿估计、Perspective-n-Point和点云配准任务上评估了多种评分规则。
limitations: 评分规则的选择可能影响最终模型质量，需进一步研究自适应规则。
框架在极端离群点比例下的性能未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NONSAC框架，通过非最小子集采样和鲁棒估计器实现大规模数据集的鲁棒模型估计。

papers.title: Different Strokes for Different Folks: Writer Identification for Historical Arabic Manuscripts
papers.abstract: Handwritten Arabic manuscripts preserve the Arab world's intellectual and cultural heritage, and writer identification supports provenance, authenticity verification, and historical analysis. Using the Muharaf dataset of historical Arabic manuscripts, we evaluate writer identification from individual line images and, to the best of our knowledge, provide the first baselines reported under both line-level and page-disjoint evaluation protocols. Since the dataset is only partially labeled for writer identification, we manually verified and expanded writer labels in the public portion from 6,858 (28.00%) to 21,249 lines (86.75%) out of 24,495 line images, correcting inconsistencies and removing non-handwritten text. After further filtering, we retained 18,987 lines (77.51%). We propose a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based model with attention mechanisms for closed-set writer identification, including rare two-writer lines modeled as composite writer-pair classes. We benchmark fourteen configurations and conduct ablations across different feature extractors and training regimes. To assess generalization to unseen pages, the page-disjoint protocol assigns all lines from each page to a single split. Under the line-level protocol, a fine-tuned DenseNet201 with attention achieves 99.05% Top-1 accuracy, 99.73% Top-5 accuracy, and 97.44% F1-score. Under the more challenging page-disjoint protocol, the best observed results are 78.61% Top-1 accuracy, 87.79% Top-5 accuracy, and 66.55% F1-score, thus quantifying the impact of page-level cues. By expanding the Muharaf dataset's labeled subset and reporting both protocols, we provide a clearer benchmark and a practical resource for historians and linguists engaged with culturally and historically significant documents. The code and implementation details are available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 针对历史阿拉伯语手稿，提出基于CNN+注意力的书写者识别方法，扩展Muharaf数据集标签，并在行级和页面分离协议下建立基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 历史阿拉伯语手稿承载文化遗产，书写者识别有助于溯源和真伪验证，但现有数据集标签不足且缺乏统一评估协议。
analysis.problem: 历史阿拉伯语手稿的书写者识别任务，特别是行级图像识别和页面级泛化评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 页面分离协议下性能显著下降（Top-1从99.05%降至78.61%），表明模型依赖页面级线索，泛化能力有限。
analysis.method: 基于CNN（DenseNet201等）结合注意力机制的封闭集书写者识别模型，并针对罕见双书写者行建模为复合书写者对类别。
contributions: 手动扩展Muharaf数据集书写者标签，从28.00%提升至86.75%，并过滤非手写文本。
首次在行级和页面分离两种协议下报告基线，量化页面级线索的影响。
提出CNN+注意力模型，在行级协议下达到99.05% Top-1准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在Muharaf数据集上评估，行级协议下DenseNet201+注意力达99.05% Top-1准确率；页面分离协议下最佳78.61% Top-1准确率。
limitations: 仅针对封闭集识别，未考虑开放集场景。
页面分离协议下性能较低，泛化能力有待提升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对历史阿拉伯语手稿，提出基于CNN+注意力的书写者识别方法，扩展Muharaf数据集标签，并在行级和页面分离协议下建立基线。

papers.title: Railway Artificial Intelligence Learning Benchmark (RAIL-BENCH): A Benchmark Suite for Perception in the Railway Domain
papers.abstract: Automated train operation on existing railway infrastructure requires robust camera-based perception, yet the railway domain lacks public benchmark suites with standardized evaluation protocols that would enable reproducible comparison of approaches. We present RAIL-BENCH, the first perception benchmark suite for the railway domain. It comprises five challenges - rail track detection, object detection, vegetation segmentation, multi-object tracking, and monocular visual odometry - each tailored to the specific characteristics of railway environments. RAIL-BENCH provides curated training and test datasets drawn from diverse real-world scenarios, evaluation metrics, and public scoreboards (https://www.mrt.kit.edu/railbench). For the rail track detection challenge we introduce LineAP, a novel segment-based average precision metric that evaluates the geometric accuracy of polyline predictions independently of instance-level grouping, addressing key limitations of existing line detection metrics.

analysis.tldr: 首个铁路领域感知基准套件，包含五项挑战和新提出的LineAP指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 铁路自动化运行依赖鲁棒的相机感知，但该领域缺乏公开的标准化评测基准，导致方法难以可重复比较。
analysis.problem: 解决铁路领域缺乏统一、公开的感知基准套件和标准化评估协议的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有线检测指标在评估几何精度时存在局限性，无法独立于实例级分组进行评价。
analysis.method: 构建包含五项挑战（轨道检测、目标检测、植被分割、多目标跟踪、单目视觉里程计）的基准套件，并提出基于段的平均精度指标LineAP。
contributions: 首个面向铁路领域的感知基准套件RAIL-BENCH，包含五项挑战和标准化评估协议。
提出LineAP指标，用于评估折线预测的几何精度，克服现有线检测指标的局限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖铁路领域，可能不适用于其他交通场景。
LineAP指标可能对特定类型的折线预测任务有偏好。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个铁路领域感知基准套件，包含五项挑战和新提出的LineAP指标。

papers.title: ICPR 2026 Competition on Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition
papers.abstract: Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition (LRLPR) remains a challenging problem in real-world surveillance scenarios, where long capture distances, compression artifacts, and adverse imaging conditions can severely degrade license plate legibility. To promote progress in this area, we organized the ICPR 2026 Competition on Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition, the first competition specifically dedicated to LRLPR using real low-quality data collected under operationally relevant conditions. The competition was based on the LRLPR-26 dataset, which comprises 20,000 training tracks and 3,000 test tracks; each training track contains five low-resolution and five high-resolution images of the same license plate. Notably, a total of 269 teams from 41 countries registered for the competition, and 99 teams submitted valid entries in the Blind Test Phase. The winning team achieved a Recognition Rate of 82.13%, and four teams surpassed the 80% mark, highlighting both the high level of competition at the top of the leaderboard and the continued difficulty of the task. In addition to presenting the competition design, evaluation protocol, and main results, this paper summarizes the methods adopted by the top-5 teams and discusses current trends and promising directions for future research on LRLPR. The competition webpage is available at https://icpr26lrlpr.github.io/

analysis.tldr: 首个针对低分辨率车牌识别的竞赛，基于真实低质量数据，269支队伍参赛，最佳识别率82.13%。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实监控场景中，远距离、压缩伪影和不良成像条件导致车牌图像分辨率低，现有方法在低分辨率下性能不足，亟需专门的数据集和竞赛推动研究。
analysis.problem: 低分辨率车牌识别（LRLPR）在真实监控场景中的挑战，包括图像退化严重、识别率低。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织竞赛，基于LRLPR-26数据集（含20,000训练轨迹和3,000测试轨迹，每个轨迹包含5张低分辨率和5张高分辨率图像），采用盲测评估，并总结前5名团队的方法。
contributions: 首次举办专门针对低分辨率车牌识别的竞赛，使用真实低质量数据。
构建了LRLPR-26数据集，包含配对的高低分辨率图像。
总结了前5名团队的方法，分析了当前趋势和未来研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 竞赛结果：269支队伍注册，99支提交有效结果，最佳识别率82.13%，4支队伍超过80%。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（20,000训练轨迹），可能不足以覆盖所有场景。
竞赛仅关注识别率，未涉及其他指标如推理速度或鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对低分辨率车牌识别的竞赛，基于真实低质量数据，269支队伍参赛，最佳识别率82.13%。

papers.title: CGC: Compositional Grounded Contrast for Fine-Grained Multi-Image Understanding
papers.abstract: Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced rapidly, they still face notable challenges in fine-grained multi-image understanding, often exhibiting spatial hallucination, attention leakage, and failures in object constancy. In addition, existing approaches typically rely on expensive human annotations or large-scale chain-of-thought (CoT) data generation. We propose Compositional Grounded Contrast (abbr. CGC), a low-cost full framework for boosting fine-grained multi-image understanding of MLLMs. Built on existing single-image grounding annotations, CGC constructs compositional multi-image training instances through Inter-Image Contrast and Intra-Image Contrast, which introduce semantically decoupled distractor contexts for cross-image discrimination and correlated cross-view samples for object constancy, respectively. CGC further introduces a Rule-Based Spatial Reward within the GRPO framework to improve source-image attribution, spatial alignment, and structured output validity under a Think-before-Grounding paradigm. Experiments show that CGC achieves state-of-the-art results on fine-grained multi-image benchmarks, including MIG-Bench and VLM2-Bench. The learned multi-image understanding capability also transfers to broader multimodal understanding and reasoning tasks, yielding consistent gains over the Qwen3-VL-8B base model on MathVista (+2.90), MuirBench (+2.88), MMStar (+1.93), MMMU (+1.77), and BLINK (+1.69).

analysis.tldr: 提出CGC框架，通过组合式对比学习和基于规则的GRPO奖励，低成本提升MLLM细粒度多图像理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在细粒度多图像理解中面临空间幻觉、注意力泄漏和物体恒常性失败等挑战，且现有方法依赖昂贵的人工标注或大规模思维链数据生成。
analysis.problem: 如何低成本地提升MLLM在细粒度多图像理解任务中的表现，解决空间幻觉、注意力泄漏和物体恒常性失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出MLLM在细粒度多图像理解中常出现空间幻觉、注意力泄漏和物体恒常性失败。
analysis.method: 基于现有单图像接地标注，通过图像间对比和图像内对比构建组合式多图像训练实例，并引入基于规则的GRPO空间奖励，采用先思考后接地范式。
contributions: 提出CGC框架，利用低成本组合式对比学习提升细粒度多图像理解。
引入基于规则的GRPO空间奖励，改善源图像归因、空间对齐和结构化输出有效性。
在MIG-Bench和VLM2-Bench上取得SOTA结果，并泛化到多种多模态任务。
analysis.experiments: 在MIG-Bench和VLM2-Bench上取得SOTA，并在MathVista、MuirBench、MMStar、MMMU、BLINK上相对于Qwen3-VL-8B有稳定提升。
limitations: 依赖现有单图像接地标注，可能限制泛化性。
GRPO奖励设计可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CGC框架，通过组合式对比学习和基于规则的GRPO奖励，低成本提升MLLM细粒度多图像理解能力。

papers.title: MTT-Bench: Predicting Social Dominance in Mice via Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Understanding social dominance in animal behavior is critical for neuroscience and behavioral studies. In this work, we explore the capability of Multimodal Large Language Models(MLLMs) to analyze raw behavioral video of mice and predict their dominance hierarchy. We introduce MTT-Bench, a novel benchmark comprising annotated videos of pairwise mouse interactions for Mouse Tube Test analysis. Building on existing MLLM architectures, we fine-tune these models to perform zero-shot inference on unseen behavioral sequences, predicting social dominance without explicit labels during testing. Our framework demonstrates promising results, showing high agreement with tube test rankings. This work opens a new direction for applying foundation models to ethology and social behavior analysis, without the need to design domain-specific models.

analysis.tldr: 提出MTT-Bench基准，微调多模态大语言模型预测小鼠社会支配等级。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解动物社会支配行为对神经科学和行为研究至关重要，但传统方法依赖人工标注或领域专用模型，效率低且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态大语言模型从原始行为视频中零样本预测小鼠社会支配等级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建MTT-Bench基准（含标注的小鼠配对交互视频），基于现有MLLM架构微调，实现零样本推理。
contributions: 提出MTT-Bench基准，用于小鼠管测试分析的社会支配预测。
展示MLLM在动物行为分析中的零样本预测能力，无需领域专用模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对小鼠管测试，可能不适用于其他物种或行为范式。
零样本性能依赖预训练MLLM质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MTT-Bench基准，微调多模态大语言模型预测小鼠社会支配等级。

papers.title: Citation-Driven Multi-View Training for Patent Embeddings: QaECTER and Sophia-Bench
papers.abstract: Patent retrieval underpins critical decisions in innovation, examination, and IP strategy, yet progress has been hampered by the absence of benchmarks that reflect the diversity of real world search scenarios. We address this gap with two contributions. First, we introduce Sophiabench, a large-scale patent retrieval benchmark comprising 10,000 queries and 75,000 corpus documents stratified across ten years, eight IPC technology sections, and twelve filing jurisdictions. Unlike prior benchmarks, Sophia-bench tests retrieval using 12 different query types-from structured patent fields to AI-generated summaries-and evaluates results against citation-based ground truth enhanced with a novel domain-relevance metric (InScope). Together, these enable systematic measurement of how well models perform across query types, technology domains, and jurisdictions. Second, we introduce QaECTER, a 344M-parameter embedding model trained on patent citation graphs and multi-view self-alignment. Despite its compact size, QaECTER establishes a new state of the art for patent retrieval. It outperforms the \#1 model on the English retrieval text embedding benchmark (RTEB), a model 23x larger, as well as all existing patent specific models across every query type, IPC section, and jurisdiction on Sophia-bench, with gains of up to 7.2% average NDCG@10 over the next-best model. These results are confirmed on an independent external benchmark, where QaECTER surpasses all prior models without requiring task-specific instruction prompts. Both the benchmark and the model are designed for practical deployment in large-scale patent search systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出专利检索基准Sophia-Bench和紧凑模型QaECTER，在多种查询类型上超越大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 专利检索对创新、审查和知识产权策略至关重要，但缺乏反映真实搜索场景多样性的基准，阻碍了进展。
analysis.problem: 现有专利检索基准和模型无法覆盖多样化的查询类型、技术领域和司法管辖区，且模型规模过大。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含10,000查询和75,000文档的专利检索基准Sophia-Bench，涵盖12种查询类型；提出344M参数的嵌入模型QaECTER，基于专利引用图和多视图自对齐训练。
contributions: 提出Sophia-Bench，大规模专利检索基准，覆盖多种查询类型、技术领域和司法管辖区，并引入领域相关性指标InScope。
提出QaECTER，紧凑型专利嵌入模型，在多个基准上达到最先进性能，超越23倍大的模型。
analysis.experiments: 在Sophia-Bench和外部独立基准上评估，QaECTER在所有查询类型、IPC部分和司法管辖区上平均NDCG@10提升高达7.2%，且无需任务特定指令。
limitations: 模型仅344M参数，可能在大规模语料上泛化能力有限。
基准依赖引用作为真实标签，可能忽略非引用但相关的专利。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出专利检索基准Sophia-Bench和紧凑模型QaECTER，在多种查询类型上超越大模型。

papers.title: Holo360D: A Large-Scale Real-World Dataset with Continuous Trajectories for Advancing Panoramic 3D Reconstruction and Beyond
papers.abstract: While feed-forward 3D reconstruction models have advanced rapidly, they still exhibit degraded performance on panoramas due to spherical distortions. Moreover, existing panoramic 3D datasets are predominantly collected with 360 cameras fixed at discrete locations, resulting in discontinuous trajectories. These limitations critically hinder the development of panoramic feed-forward 3D reconstruction, especially for the multi-view setting. In this paper, we present Holo360D, a comprehensive dataset containing 109,495 panoramas paired with registered point clouds, meshes, and aligned camera poses. To our knowledge, Holo360D is the first large-scale dataset that provides continuous panoramic sequences with accurately aligned high-completeness depth maps. The raw data are initially collected using a 3D laser scanner coupled with a 360 camera. Subsequently, the raw data are processed with both online and offline SLAM systems. Furthermore, to enhance the 3D data quality, a post-processing pipeline tailored for the 360 dataset is proposed, including geometry denoising, mesh hole filling, and region-specific remeshing. Finally, we establish a new benchmark by fine-tuning 3D reconstruction models on Holo360D, providing key insights into effective fine-tuning strategies. Our results demonstrate that Holo360D delivers superior training signals and provides a comprehensive benchmark for advancing panoramic 3D reconstruction models. Datasets and Code will be made publicly available.

analysis.tldr: Holo360D 是首个大规模连续轨迹全景 3D 数据集，含 109,495 张全景图及配准点云、网格和相机位姿，用于推进全景 3D 重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈 3D 重建模型在全景图上因球面畸变性能下降，且现有全景 3D 数据集多为离散位置采集，缺乏连续轨迹，限制了多视角全景 3D 重建的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、连续轨迹、高质量的全景 3D 数据集，导致全景前馈 3D 重建模型训练和评估困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用 3D 激光扫描仪和 360 相机采集原始数据，经在线和离线 SLAM 系统处理，再通过后处理流水线（几何去噪、网格孔洞填充、区域特定重网格化）提升数据质量，最后在数据集上微调 3D 重建模型建立基准。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模连续轨迹全景 3D 数据集 Holo360D，含 109,495 张全景图及配准点云、网格和相机位姿。
提出了针对 360 数据集的后处理流水线，包括几何去噪、网格孔洞填充和区域特定重网格化。
建立了全景 3D 重建基准，通过微调现有模型提供有效微调策略的见解。
analysis.experiments: 在 Holo360D 上微调 3D 重建模型，评估训练信号质量和基准性能，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 数据集可能局限于特定采集设备（3D 激光扫描仪和 360 相机），泛化性待验证。
后处理流水线可能引入额外误差或计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Holo360D 是首个大规模连续轨迹全景 3D 数据集，含 109,495 张全景图及配准点云、网格和相机位姿，用于推进全景 3D 重建。

papers.title: Improving Driver Drowsiness Detection via Personalized EAR/MAR Thresholds and CNN-Based Classification
papers.abstract: Driver drowsiness is a major cause of traffic accidents worldwide, posing a serious threat to public safety. Vision-based driver monitoring systems often rely on fixed Eye Aspect Ratio (EAR) and Mouth Aspect Ratio (MAR) thresholds; however, such fixed values frequently fail to generalize across individuals due to variations in facial structure, illumination, and driving conditions. This paper proposes a personalized driver drowsiness detection system that monitors eyelid movements, head position, and yawning behavior in real time and provides warnings when signs of fatigue are detected. The system employs driver-specific EAR and MAR thresholds, calibrated before driving, to improve classical metric-based detection. In addition, deep learning-based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models are integrated to enhance accuracy in challenging scenarios. The system is evaluated using publicly available datasets as well as a custom dataset collected under diverse lighting conditions, head poses, and user characteristics. Experimental results show that personalized thresholding improves detection accuracy by 2-3% compared to fixed thresholds, while CNN-based classification achieves 99.1% accuracy for eye state detection and 98.8% for yawning detection, demonstrating the effectiveness of combining classical metrics with deep learning for robust real-time driver monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 通过个性化EAR/MAR阈值和CNN分类提升驾驶员瞌睡检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 驾驶员瞌睡是交通事故的主要原因，现有基于固定EAR/MAR阈值的视觉监测系统因个体面部结构、光照等差异而泛化性差，亟需个性化方案。
analysis.problem: 解决固定阈值在驾驶员瞌睡检测中因个体差异导致的准确率低和泛化不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定EAR/MAR阈值在不同驾驶员间表现不稳定，而个性化校准可提升2-3%准确率；CNN在复杂场景下进一步提升了眼部和哈欠检测精度。
analysis.method: 提出个性化驾驶员瞌睡检测系统：驾驶前校准个体EAR/MAR阈值，结合CNN模型进行眼部和哈欠状态分类，实现实时监测与预警。
contributions: 提出基于个性化EAR/MAR阈值的驾驶员瞌睡检测方法，提升跨个体泛化能力。
集成CNN模型实现高精度眼部和哈欠检测（99.1%和98.8%），验证了经典指标与深度学习结合的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集和自建多样化光照、头部姿态数据集上评估，个性化阈值提升2-3%准确率，CNN眼部和哈欠检测准确率分别达99.1%和98.8%。
limitations: 个性化校准需驾驶前操作，可能增加使用门槛。
实验未提及在极端光照或遮挡条件下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过个性化EAR/MAR阈值和CNN分类提升驾驶员瞌睡检测的准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Contrastive Semantic Projection: Faithful Neuron Labeling with Contrastive Examples
papers.abstract: Neuron labeling assigns textual descriptions to internal units of deep networks. Existing approaches typically rely on highly activating examples, often yielding broad or misleading labels by focusing on dominant but incidental visual factors. Prior work such as FALCON introduced contrastive examples -- inputs that are semantically similar to activating examples but elicit low activations -- to sharpen explanations, but it primarily addresses subspace-level interpretability rather than scalable neuron-level labeling. We revisit contrastive explanations for neuron-level labeling in two stages: (1) candidate label generation with vision language models (VLMs) and (2) label assignment with CLIP-like encoders. First, we show that providing contrastive image sets to VLMs yields candidate labels that are more specific and more faithful. Second, we introduce Contrastive Semantic Projection (CSP), an extension of SemanticLens that incorporates contrastive examples directly into its CLIP-based scoring and selection pipeline. Across extensive experiments and a case study on melanoma detection, contrastive labeling improves both faithfulness and semantic granularity over state-of-the-art baselines. Our results demonstrate that contrastive examples are a simple yet powerful and currently underutilized component of neuron labeling and analysis pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 通过对比示例提升神经元标签的忠实性和语义粒度
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经元标注方法依赖高激活示例，常产生宽泛或误导性标签，忽略了对比示例的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用对比示例实现更忠实、更细粒度的神经元级标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：1) 使用VLM从对比图像集生成候选标签；2) 引入对比语义投影(CSP)扩展SemanticLens，将对比示例融入CLIP评分和选择流程。
contributions: 提出对比示例能提升VLM生成标签的特定性和忠实性
引入CSP方法，在CLIP评分中直接利用对比示例，改善标签分配
analysis.experiments: 在广泛实验和黑色素瘤检测案例研究中，对比标注在忠实性和语义粒度上优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的对比示例生成
未讨论跨不同网络架构的泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对比示例提升神经元标签的忠实性和语义粒度

papers.title: All Eyes on the Workflow: Automated and Efficient Event Discovery from Video Streams
authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
papers.abstract: Disciplines such as business process management and process mining aid organizations by discovering insights about processes on the basis of recorded event data. However, an obstacle to process analysis is data multi-modality: for instance, data in video form are not directly interpretable as events. In this work, we present SnapLog, an approach to extract event data from videos by converting frames to feature vectors using image embeddings and performing temporal segmentation through frame-wise similarity matrices. A generalized few-shot classification is then used to assign labels to the video segments, yielding labeled, timestamped sub-sequences of frames that are interpretable as events. Conventional process mining techniques can be used to analyze the resulting data. We show that our approach produces logs that accurately reflect the process in the videos.

analysis.tldr: 提出SnapLog方法，利用图像嵌入和时序分割从视频流中自动提取事件日志，支持流程挖掘。
analysis.research_motivation: 流程分析面临数据多模态障碍，视频数据无法直接解释为事件，现有方法缺乏从视频中高效发现事件的手段。
analysis.problem: 如何从视频流中自动提取带标签和时间戳的事件序列，以支持流程挖掘分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SnapLog：使用图像嵌入将视频帧转换为特征向量，通过帧间相似性矩阵进行时序分割，再采用广义少样本分类为片段分配标签，生成事件日志。
contributions: 提出SnapLog方法，实现从视频到事件日志的自动化转换。
结合图像嵌入、时序分割和少样本分类，使视频数据可被流程挖掘技术分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖视频质量和帧率。
少样本分类的泛化能力可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SnapLog方法，利用图像嵌入和时序分割从视频流中自动提取事件日志，支持流程挖掘。

papers.title: An Algorithm for On-Sensor Agnostic Detection of Changes in Human Activity for Ultra-Low-Power Applications
papers.abstract: Wearable devices running Human Activity Recognition(HAR) on Inertial Measurement Units~(IMUs) waste energy by performing continuous classification for each window, even during long periods of unchanged activity. We address this with a lightweight change-detection gate: a non-parametric algorithm based on dynamic template matching that runs continuously at only approximately 16kFLOPs per step, requires no offline training, and does not need prior definition of target activity classes. The gate invokes the full HAR network only when it detects an activity change, reducing the computational load by over 67% in realistic monitoring settings. The algorithm is evaluated on smart glasses, smartwatch, and smartphone data, requiring only a brief device-specific calibration phase. The gate achieves 98% sensitivity on UCA-EHAR, ensuring no genuine activity transition is missed, while 75% specificity keeps unnecessary HAR invocations low. Results on WISDM are 97% sensitivity and 76% specificity, demonstrating robustness and flexibility to various settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级非参数变化检测门控算法，用于可穿戴设备中减少HAR计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 可穿戴设备持续运行HAR分类消耗大量能量，尤其在长时间活动不变时造成浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需离线训练、无监督、低计算量的活动变化检测门控，以降低HAR系统能耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于动态模板匹配的非参数变化检测门控算法，运行仅需约16kFLOPs/步，无需离线训练和预定义活动类别。
contributions: 提出一种超低功耗、无需训练的活动变化检测门控算法。
在多个设备（智能眼镜、手表、手机）上验证，灵敏度达97-98%，计算负载降低超67%。
analysis.experiments: 在UCA-EHAR和WISDM数据集上评估，灵敏度分别为98%和97%，特异性分别为75%和76%。
limitations: 特异性较低（75-76%），可能仍有部分不必要的HAR调用。
需要设备特定的简短校准阶段。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级非参数变化检测门控算法，用于可穿戴设备中减少HAR计算开销。

papers.title: On the Hybrid Nature of ABPMS Process Frames and its Implications on Automated Process Discovery
papers.abstract: A core component of any AI-Augmented Business Process Management System (ABPMS) is the process frame, which gives the system process-awareness and defines the boundaries in which the system must operate. Compared to traditional process models, the process frame should, in principle, provide a somewhat more permissive representation of the managed processes, such that the (semi) autonomous behavior of an ABPMS, referred to as framed autonomy, could emerge. At the same time, it is not limited to a single linguistic or symbolic formalism and may incorporate heterogeneous knowledge ranging from predefined procedures to commonsense rules and best practices. In this paper, we conceptualize the notion of an ABPMS process frame as a hybrid business process representation, consisting of semi-concurrently executed procedural and declarative process models. We rely on our earlier works to outline the execution semantics of this type of process frame, arguing in favor of adopting the open-world assumption of the declarative paradigm also for procedural process models. The latter leads to a constraint-like interpretation, where each procedural model is considered to constrain the activities within that model, without imposing explicit execution requirements nor limitations on activities that may be present in other models. This is analogous to existing declarative languages, such as Declare, where each constraint has a direct effect only on the specific activities being constrained. Given this similarity, we propose mapping subsets of discovered declarative constraints into equivalent semi-concurrently executed procedural fragments, thus laying the foundation for a corresponding process (frame) discovery approach.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出ABPMS过程框架的混合性质，并探讨其对自动化过程发现的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: AI增强的业务流程管理系统（ABPMS）需要过程框架来提供过程感知和操作边界，但传统过程模型过于严格，限制了系统的自主行为。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和发现ABPMS中的混合过程框架，使其既能支持自主行为又能整合异构知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将过程框架概念化为由半并发执行的过程性和声明性模型组成的混合表示，并建议采用开放世界假设，将过程性模型解释为约束，类似于声明式语言Declare，从而将发现的声明性约束映射为等效的半并发执行的过程性片段。
contributions: 提出了ABPMS过程框架的混合性质概念，包括半并发执行的过程性和声明性模型。
论证了采用开放世界假设对过程性模型进行约束解释的合理性。
提出了将声明性约束映射为过程性片段的方法，为过程框架发现奠定基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法尚未经过实证验证。
映射的完整性和正确性需要进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出ABPMS过程框架的混合性质，并探讨其对自动化过程发现的影响。

papers.title: Superminds Test: Actively Evaluating Collective Intelligence of Agent Society via Probing Agents
papers.abstract: Collective intelligence refers to the ability of a group to achieve outcomes beyond what any individual member can accomplish alone. As large language model agents scale to populations of millions, a key question arises: Does collective intelligence emerge spontaneously from scale? We present the first empirical evaluation of this question in a large-scale autonomous agent society. Studying MoltBook, a platform hosting over two million agents, we introduce Superminds Test, a hierarchical framework that probes society-level intelligence using controlled Probing Agents across three tiers: joint reasoning, information synthesis, and basic interaction. Our experiments reveal a stark absence of collective intelligence. The society fails to outperform individual frontier models on complex reasoning tasks, rarely synthesizes distributed information, and often fails even trivial coordination tasks. Platform-wide analysis further shows that interactions remain shallow, with threads rarely extending beyond a single reply and most responses being generic or off-topic. These results suggest that collective intelligence does not emerge from scale alone. Instead, the dominant limitation of current agent societies is extremely sparse and shallow interaction, which prevents agents from exchanging information and building on each other's outputs.

analysis.tldr: 大规模LLM Agent社会并未自发涌现集体智能，交互稀疏浅层是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM Agent扩展至百万级规模，集体智能是否随规模自发涌现成为关键问题，但缺乏实证评估。
analysis.problem: 评估大规模自主Agent社会中集体智能是否自发涌现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agent社会在复杂推理、信息综合和基础协调任务上均表现不佳，交互深度极浅（线程多单轮回复，内容泛泛或离题）。
analysis.method: 提出Superminds Test分层框架，通过受控探测Agent在联合推理、信息综合和基础交互三个层级评估社会级智能。
contributions: 首次大规模实证评估LLM Agent社会的集体智能涌现问题。
提出Superminds Test框架，系统探测社会级智能。
揭示当前Agent社会交互稀疏浅层是集体智能缺失的主因。
analysis.experiments: 在MoltBook平台（超200万Agent）上使用Superminds Test进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅基于单一平台MoltBook，可能不具普适性。
探测Agent的设计可能影响社会行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 大规模LLM Agent社会并未自发涌现集体智能，交互稀疏浅层是主要瓶颈。

papers.title: From Skills to Talent: Organising Heterogeneous Agents as a Real-World Company
papers.abstract: Individual agent capabilities have advanced rapidly through modular skills and tool integrations, yet multi-agent systems remain constrained by fixed team structures, tightly coupled coordination logic, and session-bound learning. We argue that this reflects a deeper absence: a principled organisational layer that governs how a workforce of agents is assembled, governed, and improved over time, decoupled from what individual agents know. To fill this gap, we introduce \emph{OneManCompany (OMC)}, a framework that elevates multi-agent systems to the organisational level. OMC encapsulates skills, tools, and runtime configurations into portable agent identities called \emph{Talents}, orchestrated through typed organisational interfaces that abstract over heterogeneous backends. A community-driven \emph{Talent Market} enables on-demand recruitment, allowing the organisation to close capability gaps and reconfigure itself dynamically during execution. Organisational decision-making is operationalised through an \emph{Explore-Execute-Review} ($\text{E}^2$R) tree search, which unifies planning, execution, and evaluation in a single hierarchical loop: tasks are decomposed top-down into accountable units and execution outcomes are aggregated bottom-up to drive systematic review and refinement. This loop provides formal guarantees on termination and deadlock freedom while mirroring the feedback mechanisms of human enterprises. Together, these contributions transform multi-agent systems from static, pre-configured pipelines into self-organising and self-improving AI organisations capable of adapting to open-ended tasks across diverse domains. Empirical evaluation on PRDBench shows that OMC achieves an $84.67\%$ success rate, surpassing the state of the art by $15.48$ percentage points, with cross-domain case studies further demonstrating its generality.

analysis.tldr: 提出OneManCompany框架，将多智能体系统组织为可动态重组和自改进的AI公司，在PRDBench上超越SOTA 15.48个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MAS受限于固定团队结构、紧耦合协调逻辑和会话内学习，缺乏原则性的组织层来管理智能体劳动力的组装、治理和持续改进。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可解耦、可动态重组、能持续自我改进的多智能体组织框架，使其适应开放域任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OneManCompany (OMC)框架，包含：1) 将技能、工具和运行时配置封装为可移植的Talent；2) 通过类型化组织接口抽象异构后端；3) 社区驱动的Talent Market实现按需招募和动态重配置；4) Explore-Execute-Review (E²R)树搜索统一规划、执行和评估，提供终止和无死锁保证。
contributions: 提出OMC框架，将多智能体系统提升到组织层面，实现自组织和自改进。
引入Talent概念和Talent Market，支持动态招募和运行时重配置。
设计E²R树搜索，统一规划、执行和评估，提供形式化保证。
在PRDBench上达到84.67%成功率，超越SOTA 15.48个百分点，跨领域案例验证通用性。
analysis.experiments: 在PRDBench上评估，OMC达到84.67%成功率，超越SOTA 15.48个百分点；跨领域案例研究验证通用性。
limitations: 可能依赖Talent Market的社区贡献质量。
E²R树搜索在极大规模任务中可能面临计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OneManCompany框架，将多智能体系统组织为可动态重组和自改进的AI公司，在PRDBench上超越SOTA 15.48个百分点。

papers.title: NRGS: Neural Regularization for Robust 3D Semantic Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: We propose a neural regularization method that refines the noisy 3D semantic field produced by lifting multi-view inconsistent 2D features, in order to obtain an accurate and robust 3D semantic Gaussian Splatting. The 2D features extracted from vision foundation models suffer from multi-view inconsistency due to a lack of cross-view constraints. Lifting these inconsistent features directly into 3D Gaussians results in a noisy semantic field, which degrades the performance of downstream tasks. Previous methods either focus on obtaining consistent multi-view features in the preprocessing stage or aim to mitigate noise through improved optimization strategies, often at the cost of increased preprocessing time or expensive computational overhead. In contrast, we introduce a variance-aware conditional MLP that operates directly on the 3D Gaussians, leveraging their geometric and appearance attributes to correct semantic errors in 3D space. Experiments on different datasets show that our method enhances the accuracy of lifted semantics, providing an efficient and effective approach to robust 3D semantic Gaussian Splatting.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种神经正则化方法，通过方差感知条件MLP校正3D高斯中的语义噪声，实现鲁棒的3D语义高斯泼溅。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将多视图不一致的2D特征直接提升到3D高斯中会导致语义场噪声，影响下游任务性能，而预处理或优化策略往往带来额外计算开销。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地校正由多视图不一致2D特征提升引起的3D语义高斯泼溅中的语义噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，从视觉基础模型提取的2D特征因缺乏跨视图约束而存在多视图不一致性，直接提升到3D高斯中会产生噪声语义场。
analysis.method: 提出一种方差感知条件MLP，直接作用于3D高斯，利用其几何和外观属性来校正3D空间中的语义错误。
contributions: 提出一种神经正则化方法，通过方差感知条件MLP校正3D语义高斯泼溅中的噪声。
在多个数据集上验证了该方法能提升提升语义的准确性，且计算高效。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉基础模型的特征质量。
方差感知条件MLP的设计可能对特定场景或数据集敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种神经正则化方法，通过方差感知条件MLP校正3D高斯中的语义噪声，实现鲁棒的3D语义高斯泼溅。

papers.title: SSG: Logit-Balanced Vocabulary Partitioning for LLM Watermarking
papers.abstract: Watermarking has emerged as a promising technique for tracing the authorship of content generated by large language models (LLMs). Among existing approaches, the KGW scheme is particularly attractive due to its versatility, efficiency, and effectiveness in natural language generation. However, KGW's effectiveness degrades significantly under low-entropy settings such as code generation and mathematical reasoning. A crucial step in the KGW method is random vocabulary partitioning, which enables adjustments to token selection based on specific preferences. Our study revealed that the next-token probability distribution plays an critical role in determining how much, or even whether, we can modify token selection and, consequently, the effectiveness of watermarking. We refer to this characteristic, associated with the probability distribution of each token prediction, as \emph{watermark strength.} In cases of random vocabulary partitioning, the lower bound of watermark strength is dictated by the next-token probability distribution. However, we found that, by redesigning the vocabulary partitioning algorithm, we can potentially raise this lower bound. In this paper, we propose SSG (\textbf{S}ort-then-\textbf{S}plit by \textbf{G}roups), a method that partitions the vocabulary into two logit-balanced subsets. This design lifts the lower bound of watermark strength for each token prediction, thereby improving watermark detectability. Experiments on code generation and mathematical reasoning datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of SSG.

analysis.tldr: 通过logit平衡的词汇划分提升LLM水印在低熵场景下的可检测性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有KGW水印方案在低熵场景（如代码生成、数学推理）中效果显著下降，亟需改进其词汇划分策略以增强水印强度。
analysis.problem: KGW水印中随机词汇划分导致低熵设置下水印强度下界过低，影响可检测性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现下一个token的概率分布决定了水印强度的下界，随机划分下该下界受限于概率分布，通过重新设计划分算法可提升下界。
analysis.method: 提出SSG（Sort-then-Split by Groups），将词汇表划分为两个logit平衡的子集，提升每个token预测的水印强度下界。
contributions: 揭示了下一个token概率分布对水印强度的关键作用，并定义了水印强度概念。
提出SSG方法，通过logit平衡的词汇划分提升低熵场景下水印可检测性。
analysis.experiments: 在代码生成和数学推理数据集上验证了SSG的有效性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定低熵场景，高熵场景效果未验证。
未讨论对生成质量的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过logit平衡的词汇划分提升LLM水印在低熵场景下的可检测性。

papers.title: Generalizable CT-Free PET Attenuation and Scatter Correction for Pediatric Patients
papers.abstract: Computed tomography (CT)-based attenuation and scatter correction improves quantitative PET but adds radiation exposure that is particularly undesirable in pediatric imaging. Existing CT-free methods are commonly trained in homogeneous settings and often degrade under scanner or radiotracer shifts, which limits their clinical utility. We propose the Generalizable PET Correction Network (GPCN), a dual-domain network for domain-robust CT-free PET attenuation and scatter correction. GPCN combines a multi-band contextual refinement module, which models pediatric anatomical variability through wavelet-based multiscale decomposition and long-range spatial context modeling, with a frequency-aware spectral decoupling module, which performs coordinate-conditioned amplitude/phase refinement in the Fourier domain. By synergizing multi-band spatial contextual modeling with asymmetric frequency-spectrum decoupling, the network explicitly separates invariant topological structures from domain-specific noise, thereby achieving precise quantitative recovery of both anatomical organs and focal lesions. This design aims to separate anatomy-dominant structures from domain-sensitive spectral residuals and to improve robustness across heterogeneous imaging conditions. We train and evaluate the method on 1085 pediatric whole-body PET scans acquired with two scanners and five radiotracers. In both joint training and zero-shot cross-domain evaluation, GPCN outperforms representative baselines and maintains stable quantitative accuracy on unseen scanner-tracer combinations. The method is further supported by ablation, region-wise quantitative analysis, and downstream segmentation experiments. In our cohort, the CT component of the conventional protocol corresponded to an average effective dose of 10.8 mSv, indicating the potential clinical value of reliable CT-free correction for pediatric PET.

analysis.tldr: 提出GPCN网络，实现儿科PET中无CT的衰减与散射校正，并在多中心数据上验证泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于CT的衰减与散射校正会增加辐射暴露，尤其不利于儿科成像；现有无CT方法在扫描仪或放射性示踪剂变化时性能下降，限制了临床应用。
analysis.problem: 解决无CT的PET衰减与散射校正方法在跨扫描仪和放射性示踪剂场景下的泛化性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在均匀训练环境下表现良好，但在扫描仪或放射性示踪剂变化时性能显著下降，表明存在域偏移问题。
analysis.method: 提出通用PET校正网络（GPCN），包含多频带上下文精炼模块（小波多尺度分解+长程空间上下文建模）和频率感知频谱解耦模块（傅里叶域中坐标条件的幅值/相位精炼），通过协同空间和频域建模分离不变解剖结构与域特定噪声。
contributions: 提出GPCN网络，结合多频带空间上下文建模与非对称频率谱解耦，实现域鲁棒的无CT PET校正。
在包含1085例儿科全身PET扫描（2种扫描仪、5种放射性示踪剂）的数据集上验证，联合训练和零样本跨域评估均优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在1085例儿科全身PET扫描（2种扫描仪、5种放射性示踪剂）上进行联合训练和零样本跨域评估，包括消融实验、区域定量分析和下游分割实验。
limitations: 仅针对儿科患者，成人数据未验证。
方法依赖配对PET/CT数据训练，可能限制数据获取。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GPCN网络，实现儿科PET中无CT的衰减与散射校正，并在多中心数据上验证泛化性。

papers.title: AgentSearchBench: A Benchmark for AI Agent Search in the Wild
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of AI agent ecosystems is transforming how complex tasks are delegated and executed, creating a new challenge of identifying suitable agents for a given task. Unlike traditional tools, agent capabilities are often compositional and execution-dependent, making them difficult to assess from textual descriptions alone. However, existing research and benchmarks typically assume well-specified functionalities, controlled candidate pools, or only executable task queries, leaving realistic agent search scenarios insufficiently studied. We introduce AgentSearchBench, a large-scale benchmark for agent search in the wild, built from nearly 10,000 real-world agents across multiple providers. The benchmark formalizes agent search as retrieval and reranking problems under both executable task queries and high-level task descriptions, and evaluates relevance using execution-grounded performance signals. Experiments reveal a consistent gap between semantic similarity and actual agent performance, exposing the limitations of description-based retrieval and reranking methods. We further show that lightweight behavioral signals, including execution-aware probing, can substantially improve ranking quality, highlighting the importance of incorporating execution signals into agent discovery. Our code is available at https://github.com/Bingo-W/AgentSearchBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出AgentSearchBench基准，发现基于描述的检索与真实执行性能存在差距，引入执行信号可提升排序质量。
analysis.research_motivation: AI智能体生态快速扩张，但现有基准假设功能明确、候选池可控或仅处理可执行查询，未充分研究真实场景下的智能体搜索问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模、多提供商的真实智能体集合中，基于可执行任务查询或高层任务描述进行有效的智能体检索与重排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验揭示语义相似度与实际智能体性能之间存在持续差距，说明基于描述的检索和重排序方法存在局限性。
analysis.method: 构建包含近10,000个真实智能体的基准，将智能体搜索形式化为检索与重排序问题，并利用执行驱动的性能信号评估相关性；提出轻量级行为信号（如执行感知探测）来改进排序质量。
contributions: 提出AgentSearchBench，首个大规模真实世界智能体搜索基准，涵盖多提供商和近10,000个智能体。
形式化智能体搜索为检索与重排序问题，并引入执行驱动的评估信号。
实验证明语义相似度与实际性能的差距，并展示执行信号可显著提升排序质量。
analysis.experiments: 在近10,000个真实智能体上评估检索与重排序方法，对比语义相似度与实际性能，并验证执行感知探测的有效性。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有类型的智能体或任务领域。
执行信号获取成本可能较高，轻量级方法仍需进一步验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AgentSearchBench基准，发现基于描述的检索与真实执行性能存在差距，引入执行信号可提升排序质量。

papers.title: CognitiveTwin: Robust Multi-Modal Digital Twins for Predicting Cognitive Decline in Alzheimer's Disease
papers.abstract: Predicting individual cognitive decline in Alzheimer's disease (AD) is difficult due to the heterogeneity of disease progression. Reliable clinical tools require not only high accuracy but also fairness across demographics and robustness to missing data. We present CognitiveTwin, a digital twin framework that predicts patient-specific cognitive trajectories. The model integrates multi-modal longitudinal data (cognitive scores, magnetic resonance imaging, positron emission tomography, cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers, and genetics). We use a Transformer-based architecture to fuse these modalities and a Deep Markov Model to capture temporal dynamics. We trained and evaluated the framework using data from 1,666 patients in the TADPOLE (Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative) dataset. We assessed the model for prediction error, demographic fairness, and robustness to missing-not-at-random (MNAR) data patterns. ognitiveTwin provides accurate and personalized predictions of cognitive decline. Its demonstrated fairness across patient demographics and resilience to clinical dropout make it a reliable tool for clinical trial enrichment and personalized care planning.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态数字孪生框架CognitiveTwin，用于预测阿尔茨海默病认知衰退，兼顾准确性、公平性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展具有高度异质性，现有预测工具在准确性、人口统计公平性和缺失数据鲁棒性方面存在不足，亟需可靠的临床决策支持工具。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态纵向数据构建个体化认知衰退预测模型，同时保证预测准确性、跨人口统计公平性以及对非随机缺失数据的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Transformer架构融合多模态数据（认知评分、MRI、PET、脑脊液生物标志物、遗传数据），并采用深度马尔可夫模型捕捉时间动态，构建数字孪生框架。
contributions: 提出CognitiveTwin框架，整合多模态纵向数据实现个体化认知轨迹预测。
在TADPOLE数据集上验证了模型在预测误差、人口统计公平性和非随机缺失数据鲁棒性方面的表现。
analysis.experiments: 在包含1,666名患者的TADPOLE（ADNI）数据集上训练和评估，评估指标包括预测误差、人口统计公平性和对非随机缺失数据的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量多模态数据，实际临床中数据缺失模式更复杂。
数字孪生框架的可解释性可能不足，影响临床采纳。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态数字孪生框架CognitiveTwin，用于预测阿尔茨海默病认知衰退，兼顾准确性、公平性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: How Hard is it to Decide if a Fact is Relevant to a Query?
papers.abstract: We consider the following fundamental problem: given a database D, Boolean conjunctive query (CQ) q, and fact f in D, decide whether f is relevant to q wrt. D, i.e., does f belong to a minimal subset S of D such that S |= q. Despite being of central importance to query answer explanation, the combined complexity of deciding query relevance has not been studied in detail, leaving open what makes this problem hard, and which restrictions can yield lower complexity. Relevance has already been shown to be harder than query evaluation: namely, $Σ^p_2$-complete for CQs, even over a binary signature. We further observe that NP-hardness applies already to (acyclic) chain CQs. Our work identifies self-joins (multiple atoms with the same relation) as the culprit. Indeed, we prove that if we forbid or bound the occurrence of self-joins, then relevance has the same complexity as query evaluation, namely, NP (without structural restrictions) and LogCFL (for bounded hypertreewidth classes). In the ontology setting, we establish an analogous result for ontology-mediated queries consisting of a CQ and DL-Lite_R ontology, namely that relevance is no harder than query answering provided that we bound the interaction width (which generalizes both self-join width and a recently introduced 'interaction-free' condition). Our results thus pinpoint what makes relevance harder than query evaluation and identify natural classes of queries which admit efficient relevance computation.

analysis.tldr: 本文研究数据库事实对布尔合取查询的相关性判定问题，发现自连接是导致其复杂度高于查询评估的关键因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 查询相关性判定是查询答案解释的核心问题，但其组合复杂度尚未被详细研究，需要明确哪些因素导致问题困难以及哪些限制能降低复杂度。
analysis.problem: 给定数据库 D、布尔合取查询 q 和事实 f，判定 f 是否属于 D 中满足 q 的最小事实子集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，对于合取查询，相关性判定是 Σ^p_2-完全的，且无环链式查询已是 NP-难的；自连接是导致复杂度升高的关键因素。
analysis.method: 通过禁止或限制自连接的出现，证明相关性判定复杂度降至与查询评估相同（NP 或 LogCFL）；在本体查询中，通过限制交互宽度得到类似结果。
contributions: 证明了自连接是导致相关性判定比查询评估更困难的关键因素。
给出了在禁止或限制自连接时，相关性判定复杂度与查询评估一致的条件。
将结果推广到本体查询，引入交互宽度概念并证明其作用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果主要针对布尔合取查询，其他类型查询未涉及。
实际数据库中的复杂查询可能包含多种结构，限制自连接可能不总是可行。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文研究数据库事实对布尔合取查询的相关性判定问题，发现自连接是导致其复杂度高于查询评估的关键因素。

papers.title: Utility-Aware Data Pricing: Token-Level Quality and Empirical Training Gain for LLMs
papers.abstract: Traditional data valuation methods based on ``row-count $\times$ quality coefficient'' paradigms fail to capture the nuanced, nonlinear contributions that data makes to Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities. This paper presents a dynamic data valuation framework that transitions from static accounting to utility-based pricing. Our approach operates on three layers: (1) token-level information density metrics using Shannon entropy and Data Quality Scores; (2) empirical training gain measurement through influence functions, proxy model strategies, and Data Shapley values; and (3) cryptographic verifiability through hash-based commitments, Merkle trees, and a tamper-evident training ledger. We provide comprehensive experimental validation on three real domains (instruction following, mathematical reasoning, and code summarization), demonstrating that proxy-based empirical gain achieves near-perfect ranking alignment with realized utility, substantially outperforming row-count and token-count baselines. This framework enables a fair Data-as-a-Service economy where high-reasoning data is priced according to its actual contribution to model intelligence, while providing the transparency and auditability necessary for trustworthy data markets.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于token级信息密度和实证训练增益的动态数据定价框架，替代传统按行计费模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统数据估值方法（如行数×质量系数）无法捕捉数据对LLM能力的非线性贡献，导致定价不公，阻碍数据市场发展。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种能反映数据真实贡献（token级质量与训练增益）且可验证的数据定价机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三层框架：1) 基于Shannon熵和数据质量评分的token级信息密度；2) 通过影响函数、代理模型和Data Shapley值测量实证训练增益；3) 基于哈希承诺、Merkle树和防篡改训练账本的密码学可验证性。
contributions: 提出从静态计费到基于效用的动态数据定价框架。
在指令遵循、数学推理和代码摘要三个领域验证代理模型实证增益与真实效用排名近乎完美对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在指令遵循、数学推理和代码摘要三个真实领域进行实验，代理模型实证增益与真实效用排名对齐优于行数和token数基线。
limitations: 代理模型策略可能无法完全覆盖所有场景。
密码学验证可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于token级信息密度和实证训练增益的动态数据定价框架，替代传统按行计费模式。

papers.title: From Local to Cluster: A Unified Framework for Causal Discovery with Latent Variables
papers.abstract: Latent variables pose a fundamental challenge to causal discovery and inference. Conventional local methods focus on direct neighbors but fail to provide macro level insights. Cluster level methods enable macro causal reasoning but either assume clusters are known a priori or require causal sufficiency. Moreover, directly applying single variable causal discovery methods to cluster level problems violates causal sufficiency and leads to incorrect results. To overcome these limitations, this paper proposes L2C (Local to Cluster Causal Abstraction), a unified framework that bridges local structure learning and cluster level causal discovery. Unlike prior work that requires a complete manual assignment of micro variables to clusters, L2C discovers the partition automatically from local causal patterns. Our solution leverages a cluster reduction theorem to reduce any cluster to at most three nodes without loss of causal information, applies local causal discovery to identify direct causes, effects, and V structures in the presence of latent variables, and performs macro level causal inference via cluster level calculus on the learned cluster graph. L2C does not assume causal sufficiency, as latent variables are handled through local discovery. Theoretical analysis shows that L2C ensures soundness, atomic completeness, and computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real world data demonstrate that L2C accurately recovers ground truth clusters and achieves superior macro causal effect identification compared to existing baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出L2C框架，自动从局部因果模式发现变量聚类并推断宏观因果效应，无需因果充分性假设。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果发现方法要么局限于局部邻居无法提供宏观视角，要么需要预知聚类或假设因果充分性，难以处理潜变量场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不假设因果充分性且无需预定义聚类的情况下，自动从微观变量中学习聚类并实现宏观因果推断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接对聚类问题应用单变量因果发现会违反因果充分性导致错误结果。
analysis.method: 提出L2C框架，包含聚类约简定理（将任意聚类约简至最多三个节点）、局部因果发现（识别直接原因、效应和V结构，处理潜变量）以及聚类级演算（在聚类图上进行宏观因果推断）。
contributions: 提出L2C统一框架，自动从局部因果模式发现变量聚类并实现宏观因果推断。
证明聚类约简定理，保证因果信息无损。
理论分析确保框架的可靠性、原子完备性和计算效率。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据上，L2C准确恢复真实聚类，并在宏观因果效应识别上优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖局部因果发现的准确性。
聚类约简定理的适用性可能受限于特定图结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出L2C框架，自动从局部因果模式发现变量聚类并推断宏观因果效应，无需因果充分性假设。

papers.title: Distance-Misaligned Training in Graph Transformers and Adaptive Graph-Aware Control
papers.abstract: Graph Transformers can mix information globally, but this flexibility also creates failure modes: some tasks require long-range communication while others are better served by local interaction. We study this through a synthetic node-classification benchmark on contextual stochastic block model graphs, where labels are generated by a controllable mixture of local and far-shell signals. We define distance-misaligned training as a mismatch between where label-relevant information lies and where the model allocates communication over graph distance. On this benchmark, we find three points. First, the preferred graph-distance bias changes systematically with task locality. Second, an oracle adaptive controller, given offline access to the task-side distance target, nearly matches the best fixed bias across regimes and strongly improves over a neutral baseline on mixed and local tasks. Third, a task-agnostic zero-gap controller is weaker, indicating that adaptation alone is not enough and that the control target matters. These results suggest that distance-resolved diagnosis is useful for understanding Graph Transformer failures and for designing graph-aware control.

analysis.tldr: 图Transformer在混合局部与远距离信号任务中会出现距离错位训练问题，自适应图感知控制可缓解但需明确控制目标。
analysis.research_motivation: 图Transformer虽能全局混合信息，但不同任务对通信距离的需求不同（局部vs远距离），现有方法缺乏对距离偏差的系统诊断与自适应控制。
analysis.problem: 图Transformer在训练时存在距离错位问题，即模型分配的通信距离与标签相关信息所在距离不匹配，导致性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过可控混合局部与远距离信号的合成节点分类基准，发现任务局部性会系统性地改变模型偏好的图距离偏差；离线自适应控制器可接近最优固定偏差，但零差距控制器效果较弱，表明仅自适应不够，控制目标至关重要。
analysis.method: 提出距离错位训练概念，并设计两种自适应控制器：离线（已知任务距离目标）和零差距（任务无关），用于调整图Transformer的通信距离偏好。
contributions: 定义并形式化了图Transformer中的距离错位训练问题
通过合成基准实验揭示了任务局部性与模型距离偏差的系统关系
证明自适应图感知控制的有效性及其对控制目标的依赖性
analysis.experiments: 在合成上下文随机块模型图上进行节点分类实验，比较固定偏差、离线自适应控制器和零差距自适应控制器的性能。
limitations: 仅在合成数据上验证，未在真实图任务上测试
自适应控制器设计较为简单，可能无法应对更复杂的图结构
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 图Transformer在混合局部与远距离信号任务中会出现距离错位训练问题，自适应图感知控制可缓解但需明确控制目标。

papers.title: Introducing Background Temperature to Characterise Hidden Randomness in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Even when decoding with temperature $T=0$, large language models (LLMs) can produce divergent outputs for identical inputs. Recent work by Thinking Machines Lab highlights implementation-level sources of nondeterminism, including batch-size variation, kernel non-invariance, and floating-point non-associativity. In this short note we formalize this behavior by introducing the notion of \emph{background temperature} $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$, the effective temperature induced by an implementation-dependent perturbation process observed even when nominal $T=0$. We provide clean definitions, show how $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$ relates to a stochastic perturbation governed by the inference environment $I$, and propose an empirical protocol to estimate $T_{bg}$ via the equivalent temperature $T_n(I)$ of an ideal reference system. We conclude with a set of pilot experiments run on a representative pool from the major LLM providers that demonstrate the idea and outline implications for reproducibility, evaluation, and deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出背景温度概念量化LLM在T=0时的随机性，并给出估算协议。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在温度T=0时仍存在输出不一致性，影响可重复性和评估可靠性，现有工作仅列举实现层面的非确定性来源，缺乏统一量化框架。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化定义并量化LLM在标称零温度下的隐藏随机性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出即使解码温度T=0，LLM也会因批次大小变化、核非不变性、浮点数非结合性等实现因素产生发散输出。
analysis.method: 引入背景温度T_bg概念，将其建模为推理环境I控制的随机扰动，并设计通过理想参考系统的等效温度T_n(I)来估算T_bg的经验协议。
contributions: 形式化定义了背景温度T_bg，量化LLM在T=0时的隐藏随机性。
提出估算T_bg的经验协议，并在主要LLM提供商上进行初步实验验证。
analysis.experiments: 在主要LLM提供商的代表性模型上进行了初步实验，展示概念并概述对可重复性、评估和部署的影响。
limitations: 摘要未提供详细实验结果，仅提及初步实验。
估算协议可能依赖理想参考系统的选择，实际应用需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出背景温度概念量化LLM在T=0时的随机性，并给出估算协议。

papers.title: SpaMEM: Benchmarking Dynamic Spatial Reasoning via Perception-Memory Integration in Embodied Environments
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced static visual--spatial reasoning, yet they often fail to preserve long-horizon spatial coherence in embodied settings where beliefs must be continuously revised from egocentric observations under environmental change. We introduce SpaMEM (Spatial Memory from Action Sequences), a large-scale diagnostic benchmark that isolates the mechanics of spatial belief evolution via action-conditioned scene transformations (spawn, place, remove) over long interaction horizons. SpaMEM is built on a physically grounded dataset with 10,601,392 high-fidelity images across four modalities (RGB, depth, instance, semantic segmentation), collected from 25,000+ interaction sequences in 1,000 procedurally generated houses. We formalize embodied spatial reasoning as a three-level hierarchy with 15 diagnostic tasks: Level 1 measures atomic spatial perception from single observations; Level 2 probes temporal reasoning with oracle textual state histories to factor out perceptual noise; and Level 3 requires end-to-end belief maintenance from raw visual streams under the same task dimensions. We further evaluate both short-term (step-wise) updates and long-term (episodic) reconstruction. Benchmarking representative open-source VLM families reveals a consistent stacked bottleneck: coordinate-consistent grounding remains a hard ceiling, and the sharp collapse from Level 2 to Level 3 exposes a pronounced symbolic scaffolding dependency, where models succeed with text-based bookkeeping but struggle to sustain robust visual memory. SpaMEM provides a granular diagnostic standard and motivates explicit mechanisms for state representation, belief revision, and long-horizon episodic integration.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpaMEM基准，系统评估多模态大模型在具身环境中动态空间推理时的感知-记忆瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在静态视觉空间推理上表现良好，但在具身环境中需要持续更新空间信念时，模型往往无法保持长期空间一致性，缺乏诊断性基准来隔离和评估这一能力。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估多模态大模型在具身环境中基于动作序列进行动态空间信念演化的能力，并揭示其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出代表性开源VLM存在一致的堆叠瓶颈：坐标一致的地面实况是硬上限，从Level 2到Level 3的急剧下降暴露了明显的符号脚手架依赖，即模型在基于文本的簿记中成功，但难以维持鲁棒的视觉记忆。
analysis.method: 构建SpaMEM基准，包含基于物理引擎的10,601,392张高保真图像（RGB、深度、实例、语义分割），来自25,000+交互序列和1,000个程序生成房屋；形式化具身空间推理为三级层次（原子感知、时序推理、端到端信念维护），包含15个诊断任务，并评估短期（逐步）更新和长期（情节）重建。
contributions: 提出SpaMEM，一个大规模诊断基准，用于评估具身环境中动态空间推理的感知-记忆集成能力。
形式化具身空间推理为三级层次，包含15个诊断任务，覆盖原子感知、时序推理和端到端信念维护。
通过基准测试揭示VLM在坐标一致性和视觉记忆维持方面的系统性瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在SpaMEM上对代表性开源VLM家族进行基准测试，发现坐标一致性的硬上限和从Level 2到Level 3的显著性能下降。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准基于模拟环境，可能无法完全反映真实世界的复杂性。
仅评估开源VLM，未涵盖商业模型或最新闭源模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpaMEM基准，系统评估多模态大模型在具身环境中动态空间推理时的感知-记忆瓶颈。

papers.title: Hidden Failure Modes of Gradient Modification under Adam in Continual Learning, and Adaptive Decoupled Moment Routing as a Repair
papers.abstract: Many continual-learning methods modify gradients upstream (e.g., projection, penalty rescaling, replay mixing) while treating Adam as a neutral backend. We show this composition has a hidden failure mode. In a high-overlap, non-adaptive 8-domain continual LM, all shared-routing projection baselines collapse close to vanilla forgetting (12.5--12.8 vs. 13.2). A 0.5% replay buffer is the strongest shared alternative but still reaches 11.6, while fixed-strength decoupling falls below vanilla at 14.1. Only adaptive decoupled routing remains stable at 9.4, improving over vanilla by 3.8 units. On a 16-domain stream, its gain over the strongest shared-routing projection baseline grows to 4.5--4.8 units. The failure is largely invisible on clean benchmarks. We explain this effect through Adam's second-moment pathway: in the tested regime, projection induces a 1/(1-alpha) inflation of the old-direction effective learning rate, matching measurements within 8% across eight alpha values. The same conflict appears with penalty methods, replay mixing, and at 7B scale under LoRA. Our fix routes the modified gradient only to the first moment while preserving magnitude-faithful second-moment statistics, with overlap-aware adaptive strength. This simple change is the only tested configuration that consistently avoids collapse across methods, optimizers, and scale.

analysis.tldr: 发现Adam与梯度修改方法组合在持续学习中存在隐藏失效模式，提出自适应解耦矩路由修复。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习方法常将梯度修改（如投影、惩罚缩放、回放混合）与Adam优化器组合使用，但Adam被视为中性后端，这种组合的潜在失效模式未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 揭示并修复Adam优化器与梯度修改方法组合在持续学习中的隐藏失效模式，该模式导致模型性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在8域持续语言模型中，所有共享路由投影基线均接近普通遗忘（12.5-12.8 vs 13.2），0.5%回放缓冲区最强但仍有11.6，固定强度解耦降至14.1，仅自适应解耦路由稳定在9.4。失效在干净基准上不可见，但在高重叠非自适应场景下显著。
analysis.method: 提出自适应解耦矩路由（Adaptive Decoupled Moment Routing），将修改后的梯度仅路由到一阶矩，同时保持二阶矩统计量的幅度忠实性，并采用重叠感知的自适应强度。
contributions: 识别并解释了Adam与梯度修改方法组合在持续学习中的隐藏失效模式，归因于Adam二阶矩路径导致的旧方向有效学习率膨胀。
提出自适应解耦矩路由修复方法，在多种方法、优化器和规模下一致避免性能崩溃。
analysis.experiments: 在8域和16域持续语言模型流上评估，与多种共享路由投影基线、回放缓冲区、固定强度解耦等方法对比，并在7B规模下使用LoRA验证。
limitations: 主要在高重叠、非自适应场景下验证，低重叠或自适应场景效果未知。
修复方法可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现Adam与梯度修改方法组合在持续学习中存在隐藏失效模式，提出自适应解耦矩路由修复。

papers.title: Quantifying and Mitigating Self-Preference Bias of LLM Judges
papers.abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has become a dominant approach in automated evaluation systems, playing critical roles in model alignment, leaderboard construction, quality control, and so on. However, the scalability and trustworthiness of this approach can be substantially distorted by Self-Preference Bias (SPB), which is a directional evaluative deviation in which LLMs systematically favor or disfavor their own generated outputs during evaluation. Existing measurements rely on costly human annotations and conflate generative capability with evaluative stance, and thus are impractical for large-scale deployment in real-world systems. To address this issue, we introduce a fully automated framework to quantifying and mitigating SPB, which constructs equal-quality pairs of responses with negligible quality differences, enabling statistical disentanglement of discriminability from bias propensity without human gold standards. Empirical analysis across 20 mainstream LLMs reveals that advanced capabilities are often uncorrelated, or even negatively correlated, with low SPB. To mitigate this bias, we propose a structured multi-dimensional evaluation strategy grounded in cognitive load decomposition, which reduces SPB by 31.5\% on average.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动化框架量化并缓解LLM裁判的自我偏好偏差，通过等质量响应对解耦判别力与偏差倾向，并基于认知负荷分解的多维评估策略平均降低31.5%偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为裁判在自动评估中广泛应用，但自我偏好偏差（SPB）会系统性扭曲评估结果，现有测量依赖昂贵人工标注且混淆生成能力与评估立场，难以大规模部署。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地量化并缓解LLM裁判的自我偏好偏差，无需人工标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对20个主流LLM的实证分析显示，高级能力与低SPB往往不相关甚至负相关。
analysis.method: 提出全自动框架，通过构造质量差异可忽略的等质量响应对，统计上解耦判别力与偏差倾向；并提出基于认知负荷分解的结构化多维评估策略。
contributions: 提出首个无需人工标注的自动化框架，用于量化LLM裁判的自我偏好偏差。
通过等质量响应对实现判别力与偏差倾向的统计解耦。
提出基于认知负荷分解的多维评估策略，平均降低SPB 31.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在20个主流LLM上进行实证分析，验证了高级能力与低SPB的不相关性，并展示了缓解策略的有效性。
limitations: 等质量响应对的构造可能依赖特定任务或领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
缓解策略的认知负荷分解可能不适用于所有评估场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自动化框架量化并缓解LLM裁判的自我偏好偏差，通过等质量响应对解耦判别力与偏差倾向，并基于认知负荷分解的多维评估策略平均降低31.5%偏差。

papers.title: Region Matters: Efficient and Reliable Region-Aware Visual Place Recognition
papers.abstract: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) determines a query image's geographic location by matching it against geotagged databases. However, existing methods struggle with perceptual aliasing caused by irrelevant regions and inefficient re-ranking due to rigid candidate scheduling. To address these issues, we introduce FoL++, a method combining robust discriminative region modeling with adaptive re-ranking. Specifically, we propose a Reliability Estimation Branch to generate spatial reliability maps that explicitly model occlusion resistance. This representation is further optimized by two spatial alignment losses (SAL and SCEL) to effectively align features and highlight salient regions. For weakly supervised learning without manual annotations, a pseudo-correspondence strategy generates dense local feature supervision directly from aggregation clusters. Our Adaptive Candidate Scheduler dynamically resizes candidate pools based on global similarity. By weighting local matches by reliability and adaptively fusing global and local evidence, FoL++ surpasses traditional independent matching systems. Extensive experiments across seven benchmarks demonstrate that FoL++ achieves state-of-the-art performance with a lightweight memory footprint, improving inference speed by 40% over FoL. Code and models will be released (and merged with FoL) at https://github.com/chenshunpeng/FoL.

analysis.tldr: 提出FoL++方法，通过可靠性估计分支和自适应候选调度器提升视觉地点识别的准确性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉地点识别方法受无关区域导致的感知混淆和刚性候选调度导致的低效重排序困扰，需要更鲁棒的区域建模和自适应策略。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉地点识别中无关区域干扰和候选调度僵化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在感知混淆和重排序效率上存在瓶颈，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FoL++包含可靠性估计分支生成空间可靠性图，结合两种空间对齐损失（SAL和SCEL）优化特征对齐；采用伪对应策略进行弱监督学习；自适应候选调度器根据全局相似度动态调整候选池大小，并加权融合局部与全局证据。
contributions: 提出可靠性估计分支和空间对齐损失，显式建模遮挡鲁棒性并突出显著区域。
设计自适应候选调度器，动态调整候选池大小，提升重排序效率。
在七个基准上达到SOTA性能，推理速度提升40%，内存占用轻量。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准数据集上进行实验，FoL++达到SOTA性能，推理速度比FoL提升40%，内存占用轻量。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集或场景的可靠性估计泛化性。
自适应调度策略在极端相似场景下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FoL++方法，通过可靠性估计分支和自适应候选调度器提升视觉地点识别的准确性与效率。

papers.title: HFS-TriNet: A Three-Branch Collaborative Feature Learning Network for Prostate Cancer Classification from TRUS Videos
papers.abstract: Transrectal ultrasound (TRUS) imaging is a cost-effective and non-invasive modality widely used in the diagnosis of prostate cancer. The computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) relying on TRUS images has been extensively investigated recently. Compared to static images, TRUS video provides richer spatial-temporal information, which make it a promising alternative for improving the accuracy and robustness of CAD systems. However, TRUS video analysis also introduces new challenges. These include information redundancy, which increases computational costs; high intra- and inter-class similarity, which complicates feature extraction; and a low signal-to-noise ratio, which hinders the identification of clinically relevant information. To address these problems, we propose a heuristic frame selection (HFS) and a three-branch collaborative feature learning network (HFS-TriNet) for prostate cancer classification from TRUS videos. Specifically, selecting a clip of video frames at intervals for training can mitigate redundancy. The HFS strategy dynamically initializes the starting point of each training clip, which ensures that the sampled clips span the entire video sequence. For better feature extraction, besides a regular ResNet50 branch, we also utilize 1) a large model branch based a pre-trained medical segment anything model (SAM) to extract deep features of each frame and a normalization-based attention module to explore the temporal consistency; and 2) a wavelet transform convolutional residual (WTCR) branch that extracts lesion edge information in the high-frequency domain and performs denoising in the low-frequency domain.

analysis.tldr: 提出HFS-TriNet，通过启发式帧选择和三分支协作网络从TRUS视频中分类前列腺癌。
analysis.research_motivation: TRUS视频比静态图像提供更丰富的时空信息，但存在信息冗余、类间相似性高、信噪比低等问题，现有CAD系统难以有效利用。
analysis.problem: 如何从TRUS视频中高效提取判别性特征并进行前列腺癌分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TRUS视频分析面临信息冗余、高类间相似性和低信噪比，导致特征提取困难。
analysis.method: 提出HFS-TriNet，包含启发式帧选择策略和三分支网络：ResNet50分支、基于SAM的大模型分支（含归一化注意力模块）和WTCR分支（提取高频边缘信息并去噪）。
contributions: 提出HFS策略动态初始化训练片段起点，减少冗余并覆盖全视频。
设计三分支协作网络，融合深度特征、边缘信息和去噪能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频长度和帧率。
SAM分支计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HFS-TriNet，通过启发式帧选择和三分支协作网络从TRUS视频中分类前列腺癌。

papers.title: Efficient Diffusion Distillation via Embedding Loss
papers.abstract: Recent advances in distilling expensive diffusion models into efficient few-step generators show significant promise. However, these methods typically demand substantial computational resources and extended training periods, limiting accessibility for resource-constrained researchers, and existing supplementary loss functions have notable limitations. Regression loss requires pre-generating large datasets before training and limits the student model to the teacher's performance, while GAN-based losses suffer from training instability and require careful tuning. In this paper, we propose Embedding Loss (EL), a novel supplementary loss function that complements existing diffusion distillation methods to enhance generation quality and accelerate training with smaller batch sizes. Leveraging feature embeddings from a diverse set of randomly initialized networks, EL effectively aligns the feature distributions between the distilled few-step generator and the original data. By computing Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) in the embedded feature space, EL ensures robust distribution matching, thereby preserving sample fidelity and diversity during distillation. Within distribution matching distillation frameworks, EL demonstrates strong empirical performance for one-step generators. On the CIFAR-10 dataset, our approach achieves state-of-the-art FID values of 1.475 for unconditional generation and 1.380 for conditional generation. Beyond CIFAR-10, we further validate EL across multiple benchmarks and distillation methods, including ImageNet, AFHQ-v2, and FFHQ datasets, using DMD, DI, and CM distillation frameworks, demonstrating consistent improvements over existing one-step distillation methods. Our method also reduces training iterations by up to 80%, offering a more practical and scalable solution for deploying diffusion-based generative models in resource-constrained environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出嵌入损失(EL)作为扩散蒸馏的辅助损失函数，通过随机初始化网络的特征嵌入对齐分布，提升生成质量并加速训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散蒸馏方法计算资源需求高、训练周期长，且辅助损失函数（如回归损失需预生成数据集、GAN损失训练不稳定）存在明显局限，限制了资源受限研究者的使用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高效、稳定且资源友好的辅助损失函数，以提升扩散蒸馏的生成质量和训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 回归损失需要预生成大量数据集且限制学生模型性能上限，GAN损失训练不稳定且需精细调参。
analysis.method: 嵌入损失(EL)：利用一组随机初始化网络的特征嵌入，通过计算嵌入空间中的最大均值差异(MMD)来对齐蒸馏后的少步生成器与原始数据的特征分布。
