contributions: 提出嵌入损失(EL)作为扩散蒸馏的通用辅助损失函数，兼容多种蒸馏框架。
在CIFAR-10上实现无条件生成FID=1.475、条件生成FID=1.380的SOTA结果，并在ImageNet、AFHQ-v2、FFHQ等数据集上验证有效性。
减少高达80%的训练迭代次数，降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、ImageNet、AFHQ-v2、FFHQ数据集上，使用DMD、DI、CM蒸馏框架进行实验，报告了FID指标和训练效率提升。
limitations: 摘要未讨论EL在不同蒸馏框架下的超参数敏感性。
可能对随机网络的选择和数量有一定依赖，未提供消融实验细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出嵌入损失(EL)作为扩散蒸馏的辅助损失函数，通过随机初始化网络的特征嵌入对齐分布，提升生成质量并加速训练。

papers.title: RouteGuard: Internal-Signal Detection of Skill Poisoning in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Agent skills introduce a new and more severe form of indirect injection for LLM agents: unlike traditional indirect prompt injection, attackers can hide malicious instructions inside a dense, action-oriented skill that already functions as a legitimate instruction source. We study pre-execution skill-poison detection and show that successful skill poisoning induces a structured internal effect, attention hijacking, in which response-time attention shifts from trusted context to malicious skill spans and drives harmful behavior. Motivated by this mechanism, we propose RouteGuard, a frozen-backbone detector that combines response-conditioned attention and hidden-state alignment through reliability-gated late fusion. Across both real and synthetic open-source skill benchmarks, RouteGuard is consistently the strongest or most robust detector; on the critical Skill-Inject channel slice, it reaches 0.8834 F1 and recovers 90.51% of description attacks missed by lexical screening, showing that defending against skill poisoning requires internal-signal detection rather than text-only filtering

analysis.tldr: 提出基于注意力劫持机制的内部信号检测方法RouteGuard，有效防御LLM Agent技能投毒攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent技能引入了一种更严重的间接注入攻击形式，传统文本过滤方法无法检测隐藏在合法指令中的恶意指令，亟需新的检测机制。
analysis.problem: 如何检测LLM Agent技能中的投毒攻击（skill poisoning），特别是预执行阶段的检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 成功技能投毒会引发注意力劫持（attention hijacking）现象：响应时注意力从可信上下文转移到恶意技能片段，驱动有害行为。
analysis.method: 提出RouteGuard，一种冻结骨干网络的检测器，结合响应条件注意力（response-conditioned attention）和隐藏状态对齐（hidden-state alignment），通过可靠性门控晚期融合（reliability-gated late fusion）进行检测。
contributions: 揭示了技能投毒攻击的注意力劫持机制
提出了基于内部信号的检测方法RouteGuard，在技能投毒检测中达到最优性能
analysis.experiments: 在真实和合成的开源技能基准测试上，RouteGuard一致最强或最鲁棒；在关键Skill-Inject通道上，F1达0.8834，恢复90.51%的词汇筛查遗漏的描述攻击。
limitations: 可能仅适用于预执行阶段检测，对运行时攻击效果未知
依赖响应条件注意力，可能受模型架构变化影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于注意力劫持机制的内部信号检测方法RouteGuard，有效防御LLM Agent技能投毒攻击。

papers.title: CNSL-bench: Benchmarking the Sign Language Understanding Capabilities of MLLMs on Chinese National Sign Language
papers.abstract: Sign language research has achieved significant progress due to the advances in large language models (LLMs). However, the intrinsic ability of LLMs to understand sign language, especially in multimodal contexts, remains underexplored. To address this limitation, we introduce CNSL-bench, the first comprehensive Chinese em{National Sign Language benchmark designed for evaluating multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in sign language understanding. The proposed CNSL-bench is characterized by: 1) Authoritative grounding, as it is anchored to the officially standardized \textit{National Common Sign Language Dictionary, mitigating ambiguity from regional or non-canonical variants and ensuring consistent semantic definitions; 2) Multimodal coverage, providing aligned textual descriptions, illustrative images, and sign language videos; and 3) Articulatory diversity, supporting fine-grained analysis across key manual articulatory forms, including air-writing, finger-spelling, and the Chinese manual-alphabet. Using CNSL-bench, we extensively evaluate 21 open-source and proprietary up-to-date MLLMs. Our results reveal that, despite recent advances in multimodal modeling, current MLLMs remain substantially inferior to human performance, exhibiting systematic disparities across input modalities and manual articulatory forms. Additional diagnostic analyses suggest that several performance limitations persist beyond improvements in reasoning and that instruction-following robustness varies substantially across models.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向中国国家手语理解的多模态大模型评测基准，揭示当前MLLMs显著落后于人类表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 手语研究因大语言模型进展取得显著进步，但LLMs在手语理解方面的内在能力，尤其是在多模态场景下，仍未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估多模态大模型（MLLMs）在手语理解任务上能力的综合性基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前MLLMs在手语理解上显著低于人类表现，在不同输入模态和手语构音形式间存在系统性差异；推理能力提升无法解决所有性能瓶颈，指令跟随鲁棒性在不同模型间差异显著。
analysis.method: 构建CNSL-bench基准，包含官方标准词典、多模态对齐数据（文本、图像、视频）以及多种手语构音形式（空中书写、指拼、中国手语字母表），并评估21个开源和闭源MLLMs。
contributions: 提出首个面向中国国家手语理解的多模态大模型评测基准CNSL-bench。
系统评估21个MLLMs，揭示其与人类表现的差距及跨模态、跨构音形式的系统性差异。
analysis.experiments: 在CNSL-bench上评估了21个开源和闭源MLLMs，并与人类表现对比。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖中国国家手语，可能不适用于其他手语变体。
未提供具体实验数值结果，仅定性描述。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向中国国家手语理解的多模态大模型评测基准，揭示当前MLLMs显著落后于人类表现。

papers.title: Breaking Degradation Coupling: A Structural Entropy Guided Decoupled Framework and Benchmark for Infrared Enhancement
papers.abstract: Thermal infrared image enhancement aims to restore high-quality images from complex compound degradations. Existing all-in-one approaches typically employ a single shared backbone to handle diverse degradations, which causes gradient interference and parameter competition. To address this, we propose a Structural Entropy-Guided Decoupled (SEGD) Framework. Unlike unified modeling paradigms, SEGD decomposes compound degradations into independent sub-processes and models them in a divide-and-conquer manner through Degradation-Specific Residual Modules (DRMs). Each DRM focuses on residual estimation for a specific degradation, enabling task decoupling while remaining jointly trainable, which mitigates parameter contention. A Degradation-Aware Evidential Network further estimates degradation type and intensity, providing priors that adaptively regulate DRM restoration strength. To handle compound cases, DRMs are composed in varying orders to form multiple restoration paths, from which the most informative features are aggregated under a structural-entropy criterion, yielding decoder-ready representations with structural fidelity and degradation awareness. Integrating divide-and-conquer restoration, evidential perception, and entropy-guided adaptation, SEGD achieves fine-grained and interpretable enhancement. We also construct a nighttime TIR benchmark for evaluation under real low-light conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that SEGD surpasses state-of-the-art methods while achieving higher efficiency with fewer parameters.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构熵引导的解耦框架SEGD，将红外图像复合退化分解为独立子过程，实现高效增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全合一方法使用单一共享骨干处理多种退化，导致梯度干扰和参数竞争，限制了红外图像增强性能。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦红外图像中的复合退化，避免参数竞争并实现细粒度、可解释的增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单一共享骨干在处理复合退化时存在梯度干扰和参数竞争，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出结构熵引导的解耦框架SEGD，包含退化特定残差模块（DRM）进行分治恢复、退化感知证据网络估计退化类型和强度、以及基于结构熵的特征聚合。
contributions: 提出SEGD框架，将复合退化解耦为独立子过程，缓解参数竞争。
构建夜间TIR基准数据集，用于真实低光条件评估。
analysis.experiments: 在夜间TIR基准上实验，SEGD超越现有方法，且参数更少、效率更高。
limitations: 可能依赖退化类型的先验知识。
复合退化顺序组合的搜索空间可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构熵引导的解耦框架SEGD，将红外图像复合退化分解为独立子过程，实现高效增强。

papers.title: LeHome: A Simulation Environment for Deformable Object Manipulation in Household Scenarios
papers.abstract: Household environments present one of the most common, impactful yet challenging application domains for robotics. Within household scenarios, manipulating deformable objects is particularly difficult, both in simulation and real-world execution, due to varied categories and shapes, complex dynamics, and diverse material properties, as well as the lack of reliable deformable-object support in existing simulations. We introduce LeHome, a comprehensive simulation environment designed for deformable object manipulation in household scenarios. LeHome covers a wide spectrum of deformable objects, such as garments and food items, offering high-fidelity dynamics and realistic interactions that existing simulators struggle to simulate accurately. Moreover, LeHome supports multiple robotic embodiments and emphasizes low-cost robots as a core focus, enabling end-to-end evaluation of household tasks on resource-constrained hardware. By bridging the gap between realistic deformable object simulation and practical robotic platforms, LeHome provides a scalable testbed for advancing household robotics. Webpage: https://lehome-web.github.io/ .

analysis.tldr: LeHome是一个面向家庭场景的可变形物体操作仿真环境，支持多种低成本机器人，提供高保真动力学和交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 家庭环境是机器人最具挑战性的应用领域之一，可变形物体因种类形状多样、动力学复杂、材料属性各异，现有仿真器缺乏可靠支持，亟需一个综合仿真环境来推动研究。
analysis.problem: 现有仿真环境难以准确模拟家庭场景中可变形物体的高保真动力学和交互，且缺乏对低成本机器人的支持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LeHome是一个综合仿真环境，覆盖衣物、食品等多种可变形物体，提供高保真动力学和真实交互，支持多种机器人形态，并重点集成低成本机器人，实现端到端评估。
contributions: 提出LeHome仿真环境，覆盖广泛的可变形物体类别，提供高保真动力学和交互。
支持多种机器人，特别是低成本机器人，为资源受限硬件上的家庭任务评估提供可扩展测试平台。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有家庭可变形物体类型。
仿真与真实世界的差距仍需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LeHome是一个面向家庭场景的可变形物体操作仿真环境，支持多种低成本机器人，提供高保真动力学和交互。

papers.title: Fast and Effective Redistricting Optimization via Composite-Move Tabu Search
papers.abstract: Spatial redistricting is a practical combinatorial optimization problem that demands high-quality solutions, rapid turnaround, and flexibility to accommodate multi-criteria objectives and interactive refinement. A central challenge is the contiguity constraint: enforcing contiguity in integer-programming or heuristic search can severely shrink the feasible neighborhood, weaken exploration, and trap the search in poor local optima. We introduce a composite-move Tabu search (CM-Tabu) that systematically expands the feasible neighborhood space in Tabu search while preserving contiguity. When a boundary unit cannot be reassigned individually without disconnecting its district, our method identifies a minimal set of units that can move together, or a pair of units (or sets of units) that can be switched, as a contiguity-preserving composite move. Candidate single-unit and composite moves are generated in linear time by analyzing each district's contiguity graph using articulation points and biconnected components. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach substantially improves solution quality, run-to-run robustness, and computational efficiency relative to traditional Tabu search and other baselines. For example, in the Philadelphia case, the approach can consistently attain the theoretical global optimum in population-equality and support multi-criteria trade-offs. CM-Tabu delivers optimization performance suitable for real-world practices and decision-support workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出复合移动禁忌搜索算法，通过分析连通性图生成保持连通性的复合移动，显著提升选区重划的优化质量与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 选区重划是实际组合优化问题，需要高质量解、快速周转和灵活性，但连通性约束严重缩小可行邻域，导致搜索陷入局部最优。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持连通性的前提下系统性地扩展禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间，避免搜索陷入局部最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统禁忌搜索中，连通性约束使得单个边界单元的重新分配往往导致区域不连通，从而严重限制可行移动的生成，削弱探索能力。
analysis.method: 提出复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu），通过分析每个选区的连通性图，利用关节点和双连通分量在线性时间内生成保持连通性的复合移动（包括最小移动集、单元对或单元集交换）。
contributions: 提出一种系统性的复合移动生成方法，在保持连通性的同时扩展禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间。
在多个实际案例上验证了该方法在解质量、鲁棒性和计算效率上的显著提升，并在费城案例中一致达到理论全局最优。
analysis.experiments: 在多个实际选区重划案例上进行实验，与传统的禁忌搜索和其他基线方法比较，展示了在解质量、运行间鲁棒性和计算效率上的改进。费城案例中一致达到人口平等的理论全局最优。
limitations: 方法依赖于连通性图的正确构建，可能不适用于非平面或特殊拓扑结构。
复合移动的生成复杂度可能随选区数量增加而增长，但摘要声称线性时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出复合移动禁忌搜索算法，通过分析连通性图生成保持连通性的复合移动，显著提升选区重划的优化质量与效率。

papers.title: One Shot Learning for Edge Detection on Point Clouds
papers.abstract: Each scanner possesses its unique characteristics and exhibits its distinct sampling error distribution. Training a network on a dataset that includes data collected from different scanners is less effective than training it on data specific to a single scanner. Therefore, we present a novel one-shot learning method allowing for edge extraction on point clouds, by learning the specific data distribution of the target point cloud, and thus achieve superior results compared to networks that were trained on general data distributions. More specifically, we present how to train a lightweight network named OSFENet (One-Shot edge Feature Extraction Network), by designing a filtered-KNN-based surface patch representation that supports a one-shot learning framework. Additionally, we introduce an RBF_DoS module, which integrates Radial Basis Function-based Descriptor of the Surface patch, highly beneficial for the edge extraction on point clouds. The advantage of the proposed OSFENet is demonstrated through comparative analyses against 7 baselines on the ABC dataset, and its practical utility is validated by results across diverse real-scanned datasets, including indoor scenes like S3DIS dataset, and outdoor scenes such as the Semantic3D dataset and UrbanBIS dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种单样本学习方法OSFENet，通过学习目标点云的数据分布实现边缘提取，在多个数据集上优于通用网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 不同扫描仪具有独特的采样误差分布，使用多源数据训练的网络不如针对单扫描仪数据训练的网络有效，因此需要一种能快速适应特定点云数据分布的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过单样本学习从点云中提取边缘特征，以克服通用网络在特定扫描仪数据上性能不佳的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OSFENet，包含基于过滤KNN的曲面块表示以支持单样本学习，以及RBF_DoS模块（径向基函数曲面块描述符）用于边缘特征提取。
contributions: 提出一种单样本学习框架OSFENet，用于点云边缘提取。
设计过滤KNN曲面块表示和RBF_DoS模块，提升边缘提取性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ABC数据集上与7个基线对比，并在S3DIS、Semantic3D、UrbanBIS等真实扫描数据集上验证实用性。
limitations: 可能依赖曲面块表示的质量。
单样本学习可能对噪声敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种单样本学习方法OSFENet，通过学习目标点云的数据分布实现边缘提取，在多个数据集上优于通用网络。

papers.title: PoseFM: Relative Camera Pose Estimation Through Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Monocular visual odometry (VO) is a fundamental computer vision problem with applications in autonomous navigation, augmented reality and more. While deep learning-based methods have recently shown superior accuracy compared to traditional geometric pipelines, particularly in environments where handcrafted features struggle due to poor structure or lighting conditions, most rely on deterministic regression, which lacks the uncertainty awareness required for robust applications. We propose PoseFM, the first framework to reformulate monocular frame-to-frame VO as a generative task using Flow Matching (FM). By leveraging FM, we model camera motion as a distribution rather than a point estimate, learning to transform noise into realistic pose predictions via continuous-time ODEs. This approach provides a principled mechanism for uncertainty estimation and enables robust motion inference under challenging visual conditions. In our evaluations, PoseFM achieves strong performance on TartanAir, KITTI and TUM-RGBD benchmarks, achieving the lowest absolute trajectory error (ATE) on some of the trajectories and overall being competitive with the best frame-to-frame monocular VO methods. Code and model checkpoints will be made available at https://github.com/helsinki-sda-group/posefm.

analysis.tldr: 将单目视觉里程计重构为生成式流匹配任务，实现不确定性感知的相机位姿估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于深度学习的单目视觉里程计方法多采用确定性回归，缺乏不确定性感知，在光照差、结构弱等挑战性环境下鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将单目帧间视觉里程计建模为生成式任务，以同时获得准确的位姿估计和不确定性估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PoseFM框架，利用流匹配（Flow Matching）将相机运动建模为分布而非点估计，通过连续时间ODE将噪声变换为位姿预测。
contributions: 首个将流匹配应用于单目帧间视觉里程计的生成式框架
提供原理性的不确定性估计机制，提升挑战性视觉条件下的鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在TartanAir、KITTI和TUM-RGBD基准上评估，部分轨迹取得最低绝对轨迹误差（ATE），与最佳帧间单目VO方法竞争力相当。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量训练数据，泛化到未见场景的能力待验证
生成式推理的计算开销可能高于确定性方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将单目视觉里程计重构为生成式流匹配任务，实现不确定性感知的相机位姿估计。

papers.title: Thermal background reduction for mid-infrared imaging by low-rank background and sparse point-source modelling
papers.abstract: Mid-infrared astronomy from the ground faces critical challenges in accurately detecting and quantifying sources due to the dominant spatially and time-variable background noise. Moreover, chopping and nodding, the traditional methods for dealing with these background issues, will not be technically feasible on the next generation of extremely large telescopes. This limitation requires the development of novel computational methods for a robust background reduction. We present and evaluate a novel method named LOw-RAnk Background ELimination (LORABEL) to improve the sensitivity of mid-infrared astronomical observations, without the need for classical telescope nodding, source masking, or other overheads in observing time. We applied a low-rank background-reduction strategy to (1) data taken on the ground with the VISIR with synthetically injected sources, and (2) airborne data from SOFIA. We compared the performance of our new method to classical chopping and nodding techniques, and analysed the effect on source photometry and detection precision for different observational scenarios. In regimes with a low signal-to-noise ratio (S/N $<5$) in the ground-based VISIR data, LORABEL reduces variation in the photometric error with respect to chopping differences alone and even the classical chop-nod sequence, at the cost of introducing a bias. Secondly, we demonstrate that LORABEL increases detection precision in comparison to traditional background-reduction methods. For the SOFIA dataset, we achieve a $20-100$ fold decrease in mean background flux with respect to the traditional chop-nod method while preserving most of the source flux. Our findings suggest that LORABEL is applicable to a wider range of instrumental observation, that is, both ground-based and airborne, and it is a suitable tool in the context of faint-source detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出低秩背景与稀疏点源建模方法LORABEL，无需经典斩波/ nodding即可有效降低中红外成像热背景噪声。
analysis.research_motivation: 中红外地面天文观测受强时空变化背景噪声严重制约，传统斩波/ nodding方法在下一代极大望远镜上不可行，亟需新型计算背景消除方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖望远镜 nodding、源掩模或额外观测时间开销的前提下，稳健降低中红外成像中的时空变化背景噪声，提升点源检测灵敏度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低信噪比（S/N<5）时，LORABEL虽引入偏差，但能降低光度误差的变异性；在SOFIA数据上平均背景通量降低20-100倍，同时保留大部分源通量。
analysis.method: 基于低秩背景与稀疏点源建模的LORABEL方法，将背景视为低秩成分、点源视为稀疏成分进行分解与消除。
contributions: 提出无需经典 nodding 的低秩背景消除方法LORABEL，适用于地面和机载中红外数据。
在VISIR和SOFIA数据上验证，相比传统 chop-nod 方法，LORABEL在低信噪比下降低光度误差变异性，并大幅降低背景通量。
analysis.experiments: 在VISIR地面数据（合成注入源）和SOFIA机载数据上评估，与经典斩波/ nodding对比，分析光度测量精度和检测精度。
limitations: 低信噪比下引入偏差，可能影响绝对流量测量。
方法在极端背景变化或密集源场中的表现未在摘要中明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出低秩背景与稀疏点源建模方法LORABEL，无需经典斩波/ nodding即可有效降低中红外成像热背景噪声。

papers.title: Federated Cross-Modal Retrieval with Missing Modalities via Semantic Routing and Adapter Personalization
papers.abstract: Federated cross-modal retrieval faces severe challenges from heterogeneous client data, particularly non-IID semantic distributions and missing modalities. Under such heterogeneity, a single global model is often insufficient to capture both shared cross-modal knowledge and client-specific characteristics. We propose RCSR, a personalization-friendly federated framework that integrates prototype anchoring, retrieval-centric semantic routing, and optional client-specific adapters. Built on a frozen CLIP backbone, RCSR leverages lightweight shared adapters for global knowledge transfer while supporting efficient local personalization. Prototype anchoring helps unimodal clients align with global cross-modal semantics, and a server-side semantic router adaptively assigns aggregation weights based on retrieval consistency to mitigate alignment drift during heterogeneous updates. Extensive experiments on MS-COCO, Flickr30K, and other benchmarks show that RCSR consistently improves global retrieval accuracy and training stability, while further enhancing client-level retrieval performance, especially for clients with incomplete modalities. Code is available at https://github.com/RezinChow/RCSR-Retrieval-Centric-Semantic-Routing.

analysis.tldr: 提出RCSR框架，通过原型锚定和语义路由解决联邦跨模态检索中缺失模态和非独立同分布问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦跨模态检索面临客户端数据异构（非独立同分布语义分布和缺失模态）的严重挑战，单一全局模型难以同时捕获共享跨模态知识和客户端特定特征。
analysis.problem: 如何在联邦学习中处理客户端数据异构（非独立同分布和缺失模态），提升跨模态检索的全局和个性化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出异构客户端数据导致全局模型对齐漂移，单一模型无法兼顾共享知识和个性化特征。
analysis.method: 提出RCSR框架，基于冻结CLIP骨干，集成原型锚定、检索中心语义路由和可选客户端特定适配器。轻量共享适配器用于全局知识迁移，原型锚定帮助单模态客户端对齐全局跨模态语义，服务器端语义路由器根据检索一致性自适应分配聚合权重。
contributions: 提出RCSR，一个个性化联邦框架，通过原型锚定和语义路由处理缺失模态和非独立同分布问题。
在多个基准上验证了RCSR在全局和客户端级检索性能上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在MS-COCO、Flickr30K等基准上进行了实验，结果显示RCSR持续提升全局检索准确率和训练稳定性，并增强客户端级检索性能，尤其对缺失模态客户端。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP骨干的预训练质量。
语义路由器的设计可能增加服务器端计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RCSR框架，通过原型锚定和语义路由解决联邦跨模态检索中缺失模态和非独立同分布问题。

papers.title: Can Multimodal Large Language Models Truly Understand Small Objects?
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising potential in diverse understanding tasks, e.g., image and video analysis, math and physics olympiads. However, they remain blank and unexplored for Small Object Understanding (SOU) tasks. To fill this gap, we introduce SOUBench, the first and comprehensive benchmark for exploring the small objects understanding capability of existing MLLMs. Specifically, we first design an effective and automatic visual question-answer generation strategy, constructing a new SOU-VQA evaluation dataset, with 18,204 VQA pairs, six relevant sub-tasks, and three dominant scenarios (i.e., Driving, Aerial, and Underwater). Then, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation on 15 state-of-the-art MLLMs and reveal their weak capabilities in small object understanding. Furthermore, we develop SOU-Train, a multimodal training dataset with 11,226 VQA pairs, to improve the SOU capabilities of MLLMs. Through supervising fine-tuning of the latest MLLM, we demonstrate that SOU-Train can effectively enhance the latest MLLM's ability to understand small objects. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that, the proposed SOUBench, along with the SOU-VQA and SOU-Train datasets, provides a crucial empirical foundation to the community for further developing models with enhanced small object understanding capabilities. Datasets and Code: https://github.com/Hanfj-X/SOU.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对多模态大模型小物体理解能力的基准SOUBench，揭示现有模型能力不足，并提供训练数据集SOU-Train提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在多种理解任务中表现优异，但小物体理解（SOU）能力尚未被系统探索和评估，缺乏专门的基准和训练数据。
analysis.problem: 现有MLLMs在小物体理解任务上的能力未知，且缺乏标准化的评估基准和针对性训练数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对15个SOTA MLLMs的评估显示，它们在小物体理解方面能力薄弱。
analysis.method: 提出SOUBench基准，包含自动VQA生成策略构建的SOU-VQA评估数据集（18,204对，6个子任务，3个场景）和SOU-Train训练数据集（11,226对），并通过监督微调提升MLLM的SOU能力。
contributions: 首个针对MLLM小物体理解能力的综合基准SOUBench。
自动VQA生成策略构建的SOU-VQA评估数据集和SOU-Train训练数据集。
对15个SOTA MLLMs的全面评估，揭示其小物体理解能力不足。
通过微调验证SOU-Train能有效提升MLLM的小物体理解能力。
analysis.experiments: 在15个SOTA MLLMs上评估SOU-VQA，并微调最新MLLM验证SOU-Train的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖驾驶、航拍和水下三个场景，可能不全面。
自动生成VQA的质量可能影响评估准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对多模态大模型小物体理解能力的基准SOUBench，揭示现有模型能力不足，并提供训练数据集SOU-Train提升性能。

papers.title: Flow4DGS-SLAM: Optical Flow-Guided 4D Gaussian Splatting SLAM
papers.abstract: Handling the dynamic environments is a significant research challenge in Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). Recent research combines 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with SLAM to achieve both robust camera pose estimation and photorealistic renderings. However, using SLAM to efficiently reconstruct both static and dynamic regions remains challenging. In this work, we propose an efficient framework for dynamic 3DGS SLAM guided by optical flow. Using the input depth and prior optical flow, we first propose a category-agnostic motion mask generation strategy by fitting a camera ego-motion model to decompose the optical flow. This module separates dynamic and static Gaussians and simultaneously provides flow-guided camera pose initialization. We boost the training speed of dynamic 3DGS by explicitly modeling their temporal centers at keyframes. These centers are propagated using 3D scene flow priors and are dynamically initialized with an adaptive insertion strategy. Alongside this, we model the temporal opacity and rotation using a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to adaptively learn the complex dynamics. The empirical results demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance in tracking, dynamic reconstruction, and training efficiency.

analysis.tldr: Flow4DGS-SLAM利用光流引导实现动态场景下的高效4D高斯溅射SLAM，在跟踪、动态重建和训练效率上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态环境是视觉SLAM的重要挑战，现有3DGS-SLAM方法难以高效重建静态和动态区域。
analysis.problem: 如何利用光流引导实现动态场景下高效、鲁棒的3DGS-SLAM，同时提升跟踪、动态重建和训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出光流引导的动态3DGS-SLAM框架：通过相机自运动模型分解光流生成类别无关的运动掩码，分离动态/静态高斯；显式建模动态高斯的时间中心，利用3D场景流先验传播并自适应插入；使用高斯混合模型建模时间不透明度和旋转。
contributions: 提出基于光流引导的运动掩码生成策略，实现动态与静态高斯分离并初始化相机位姿。
提出显式时间中心建模与自适应插入策略，提升动态3DGS训练速度。
使用高斯混合模型建模动态高斯的时间不透明度和旋转，适应复杂动态。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在跟踪、动态重建和训练效率上达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖光流先验质量，在光流估计不准确时性能下降。
动态高斯的时间建模可能对快速运动或遮挡场景处理有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Flow4DGS-SLAM利用光流引导实现动态场景下的高效4D高斯溅射SLAM，在跟踪、动态重建和训练效率上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Selective Depthwise Separable Convolution for Lightweight Joint Source-Channel Coding in Wireless Image Transmission
papers.abstract: Depthwise separable convolutional (DSConv) layers have been successfully applied to deep learning (DL)-based joint source-channel coding (JSCC) schemes to reduce computational complexity. However, a systematic investigation of the layerwise and ratio-wise replacement of standard convolutional (Conv) layers with DSConv layers in JSCC systems for wireless image transmission remains largely unexplored. In this letter, we propose a configurable lightweight JSCC framework that incorporates a selective replacement strategy, enabling flexible substitution of standard Conv layers with DSConv layers at various layer positions and replacement ratios. By adjusting the proportion of layers replaced, we achieve different model compression levels and analyze their impact on reconstruction performance. Furthermore, we investigate how replacements at different encoder and decoder depths influence reconstruction quality under a fixed replacement ratio. Our results show that Conv-to-DSConv replacement at intermediate layers achieves a favorable complexity-performance trade-off, revealing layer-wise redundancy in DL-based JSCC systems. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves substantial parameter reduction with only slight performance degradation, enabling flexible complexity-performance trade-offs for resource-constrained edge devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出选择性深度可分离卷积替换策略，在无线图像传输的联合源信道编码中实现灵活复杂度-性能权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度可分离卷积已用于降低JSCC复杂度，但系统性的逐层和按比例替换标准卷积的研究尚缺，需要探索不同替换策略对性能的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何在无线图像传输的JSCC系统中，通过选择性替换标准卷积为深度可分离卷积，实现模型压缩与重建性能之间的灵活权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中间层的替换能获得更好的复杂度-性能权衡，揭示了DL-based JSCC系统中的层间冗余。
analysis.method: 提出可配置的轻量级JSCC框架，包含选择性替换策略，允许在不同层位置和替换比例下灵活替换标准卷积为深度可分离卷积。
contributions: 首次系统研究JSCC中逐层和按比例替换标准卷积为深度可分离卷积的影响。
提出可配置框架，实现灵活复杂度-性能权衡，适用于资源受限边缘设备。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对无线图像传输场景，未验证其他模态。
替换策略可能依赖特定网络架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出选择性深度可分离卷积替换策略，在无线图像传输的联合源信道编码中实现灵活复杂度-性能权衡。

papers.title: FILTR: Extracting Topological Features from Pretrained 3D Models
papers.abstract: Recent advances in pretraining 3D point cloud encoders (e.g., Point-BERT, Point-MAE) have produced powerful models, whose abilities are typically evaluated on geometric or semantic tasks. At the same time, topological descriptors have been shown to provide informative summaries of a shape's multiscale structure. In this paper we pose the question whether topological information can be derived from features produced by 3D encoders. To address this question, we first introduce DONUT, a synthetic benchmark with controlled topological complexity, and propose FILTR (Filtration Transformer), a learnable framework to predict persistence diagrams directly from frozen encoders. FILTR adapts a transformer decoder to treat diagram generation as a set prediction task. Our analysis on DONUT reveals that existing encoders retain only limited global topological signals, yet FILTR successfully leverages information produced by these encoders to approximate persistence diagrams. Our approach enables, for the first time, data-driven extraction of persistence diagrams from raw point clouds through an efficient learnable feed-forward mechanism.

analysis.tldr: 提出FILTR框架，从预训练3D点云编码器中提取拓扑特征（持久性图），并引入合成基准DONUT。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练3D点云编码器在几何/语义任务上表现优异，但能否从中提取拓扑信息尚不清楚；传统拓扑描述符计算成本高，且与学习特征脱节。
analysis.problem: 如何从预训练3D编码器的特征中高效、可学习地提取拓扑特征（持久性图）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过DONUT基准发现，现有编码器仅保留有限的全局拓扑信号。
analysis.method: FILTR（Filtration Transformer），一种可学习框架，使用Transformer解码器将持久性图生成视为集合预测任务，直接从冻结的编码器特征中预测持久性图。
contributions: 提出DONUT合成基准，用于控制拓扑复杂度评估编码器拓扑信息保留能力。
提出FILTR框架，首次实现从原始点云通过可学习前馈机制数据驱动地提取持久性图。
analysis.experiments: 在DONUT基准上分析现有编码器的拓扑信号保留情况，并验证FILTR能有效近似持久性图。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅验证了合成基准，未在真实世界点云数据上评估。
依赖冻结编码器，可能无法适应编码器微调场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FILTR框架，从预训练3D点云编码器中提取拓扑特征（持久性图），并引入合成基准DONUT。

papers.title: ChangeQuery: Advancing Remote Sensing Change Analysis for Natural and Human-Induced Disasters from Visual Detection to Semantic Understanding
papers.abstract: Rapid situational awareness is critical in post-disaster response. While remote sensing damage assessment is evolving from pixel-level change detection to high-level semantic analysis, existing vision-language methodologies still struggle to provide actionable intelligence for complex strategic queries. They remain severely constrained by unimodal optical dependence, a prevailing bias towards natural disasters, and a fundamental lack of grounded interactivity. To address these limitations, we present ChangeQuery, a unified multimodal framework designed for comprehensive, all-weather disaster situation awareness. To overcome modality constraints and scenario biases, we construct the Disaster-Induced Change Query (DICQ) dataset, a large-scale benchmark coupling pre-event optical semantics with post-event SAR structural features across a balanced distribution of natural catastrophes and armed conflicts. Furthermore, to provide the high-quality supervision required for interactive reasoning, we propose a novel Automated Semantic Annotation Pipeline. Adhering to a ``statistics-first, generation-later'' paradigm, this engine automatically transforms raw segmentation masks into grounded, hierarchical instruction sets, effectively equipping the model with fine-grained spatial and quantitative awareness. Trained on this structured data, the ChangeQuery architecture operates as an interactive disaster analyst. It supports multi-task reasoning driven by diverse user queries, delivering precise damage quantification, region-specific descriptions, and holistic post-disaster summaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ChangeQuery establishes a new state-of-the-art, providing a robust and interpretable solution for complex disaster monitoring. The code is available at \href{https://sundongwei.github.io/changequery/}{https://sundongwei.github.io/changequery/}.

analysis.tldr: ChangeQuery 提出统一多模态框架，结合光学与 SAR 数据，实现自然灾害与武装冲突的全天候灾害态势感知与语义理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感灾害评估方法受限于单模态光学数据、对自然灾害的偏向以及缺乏可交互的语义理解，难以应对复杂战略查询。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的多模态框架，实现全天候、跨灾害类型的灾害变化分析与语义理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 DICQ 数据集（平衡自然与冲突灾害，含光学与 SAR 数据），提出自动化语义标注流水线（统计优先、生成在后），训练 ChangeQuery 架构支持多任务推理。
contributions: 提出 ChangeQuery 统一多模态框架，结合光学与 SAR 实现全天候灾害分析。
构建 DICQ 数据集，平衡自然与人为灾害，提供大规模基准。
提出自动化语义标注流水线，生成细粒度、层次化的指令集。
analysis.experiments: 在 DICQ 数据集上实验，达到新 SOTA，提供可解释的灾害监测方案。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量 SAR 数据，数据获取成本高。
自动化标注流水线可能存在错误传播。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ChangeQuery 提出统一多模态框架，结合光学与 SAR 数据，实现自然灾害与武装冲突的全天候灾害态势感知与语义理解。

papers.title: Depth-Aware Rover: A Study of Edge AI and Monocular Vision for Real-World Implementation
papers.abstract: This study analyses simulated and real-world implementations of depth-aware rover navigation, highlighting the transition from stereo vision to monocular depth estimation using edge AI. A Unity-based lunar terrain simulator with stereo cameras and OpenCV's StereoSGBM was used to generate disparity maps. A physical rover built on Raspberry Pi 4 employed UniDepthV2 for monocular metric depth estimation and YOLO12n for real-time object detection. While stereo vision yielded higher accuracy in simulation, the monocular approach proved more robust and cost-effective in real-world deployment, achieving 0.1 FPS for depth and 10 FPS for detection.

analysis.tldr: 研究从立体视觉转向单目深度估计的边缘AI月球车导航，模拟中立体视觉精度更高，但实际部署中单目方法更鲁棒且成本更低。
analysis.research_motivation: 月球车导航需要深度感知，传统立体视觉在真实环境中成本高、鲁棒性差，边缘AI和单目深度估计提供更实用的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 在资源受限的月球车平台上实现实时、鲁棒的深度感知和目标检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模拟环境中立体视觉精度更高，但真实部署中单目方法更鲁棒且成本效益更优；单目深度估计帧率低（0.1 FPS），检测帧率较高（10 FPS）。
analysis.method: 使用Unity模拟器生成立体视差图，在Raspberry Pi 4上部署UniDepthV2进行单目深度估计，YOLO12n进行目标检测。
contributions: 对比了立体视觉与单目深度估计在模拟和真实环境中的性能差异
展示了边缘AI在低成本月球车上的实际部署可行性
analysis.experiments: 在Unity模拟器和真实Raspberry Pi 4月球车上进行了实验，报告了帧率和鲁棒性比较。
limitations: 单目深度估计帧率较低（0.1 FPS），可能影响实时性
仅在特定硬件和场景下测试，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究从立体视觉转向单目深度估计的边缘AI月球车导航，模拟中立体视觉精度更高，但实际部署中单目方法更鲁棒且成本更低。

papers.title: FETS Benchmark: Foundation Models Outperform Dataset-specific Machine Learning in Energy Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Driven by the transition towards a climate-neutral energy system, accurate energy time series forecasting is critical for planning and operation. Yet, it remains largely a dataset-specific task, requiring comprehensive training data, limiting scalability, and resulting in high model development and maintenance effort. Recently, foundation models that aim to learn generalizable patterns via extensive pretraining have shown superior performance in multiple prediction tasks. Despite their success and strong potential to address challenges in energy forecasting, their application in this domain remains largely unexplored. We address this gap by presenting the Foundation Models in Energy Time Series Forecasting (FETS) benchmark. We (1) provide a structured overview of energy forecasting use cases along three main dimensions: stakeholders, attributes, and data categories; (2) collect and analyze 54 datasets across 9 data categories, guided by typical stakeholder interests; (3) benchmark foundation models against classical machine learning approaches across different forecasting settings. Foundation models consistently outperform dataset-specific optimized machine learning approaches across all settings and data categories, despite the latter having seen the full historic target data during training. In particular, covariate-informed foundation models achieve the strongest performance. Further analysis reveals a strong correlation between predictive performance and spectral entropy, performance saturation beyond a certain context length, and improved performance at higher aggregation levels such as national load, district heating, and power grid data. Overall, our findings highlight the strong potential of foundation models as scalable and generalizable forecasting solutions for the energy domain, particularly in data-constrained and privacy-sensitive settings.

analysis.tldr: FETS基准测试表明，基础模型在能源时间序列预测中全面超越传统数据集特定方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 能源时间序列预测对气候中和转型至关重要，但传统方法依赖特定数据集，可扩展性差且开发维护成本高。
analysis.problem: 基础模型在能源时间序列预测中的应用尚未被系统评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基础模型在所有设置和数据类别中一致优于数据集特定优化的机器学习方法；协变量信息增强的基础模型性能最强；预测性能与谱熵强相关；超过一定上下文长度后性能饱和；在更高聚合级别（如国家负荷、区域供热、电网数据）上表现更好。
analysis.method: 构建FETS基准，包含54个数据集（9个数据类别），系统比较基础模型与经典机器学习方法。
contributions: 提供能源预测用例的结构化概述（利益相关者、属性、数据类别三维度）
收集并分析54个数据集，覆盖9个数据类别
通过基准测试证明基础模型在能源时间序列预测中优于数据集特定方法
analysis.experiments: 在54个数据集上比较基础模型与经典机器学习方法，涵盖多种预测设置。
limitations: 未涉及所有可能的能源预测场景
基础模型的计算资源需求可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FETS基准测试表明，基础模型在能源时间序列预测中全面超越传统数据集特定方法。

papers.title: Revisiting Geometric Obfuscation with Dual Convergent Lines for Privacy-Preserving Image Queries in Visual Localization
papers.abstract: Privacy-Preserving Image Queries (PPIQ) are an emerging mechanism for cloud-based visual localization, enabling pose estimation from obfuscated features instead of private images or raw keypoints. However, the main approaches for PPIQ, primarily geometry-based and segmentation-based obfuscation, both suffer from vulnerabilities to recent privacy attacks. In particular, a fundamental limitation of geometry-based obfuscation is that the spatial distribution of obfuscated neighboring lines still effectively surrounds the original keypoint location, providing exploitable cues for recovering the original points. We revisit this geometric paradigm and introduce Dual Convergent Lines (DCL), a novel keypoint obfuscation method demonstrating strong resilience against such attack. DCL places two fixed anchors on a central partition line and lifts each keypoint to a line originating from one of them, with the active anchor determined by the keypoint's location. This arrangement invalidates the geometry-recovery attack by making its optimization ill-posed: Neighboring lines either misleadingly converge to one anchor, yielding a trivial solution, or become near-parallel at the partition boundary, yielding an unstable high-variance solution. Both outcomes thwart point recovery. DCL is also compatible with an existing line-based solver, enabling deployment in traditional localization pipelines. Experiments on both indoor and large-scale outdoor datasets demonstrate DCL's robustness against privacy attacks, efficiency, and scalability, while achieving practical localization performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出双收敛线（DCL）方法，通过使邻近线误导性收敛或近平行来防御几何恢复攻击，实现隐私保护的视觉定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 云视觉定位中，隐私保护图像查询（PPIQ）机制通过混淆特征而非原始图像实现定位，但现有几何和分割混淆方法易受隐私攻击，尤其是几何混淆中混淆线的空间分布仍包围原始关键点，提供可被利用的恢复线索。
analysis.problem: 现有几何混淆方法无法有效防御针对关键点位置的隐私攻击，需要一种更鲁棒的混淆策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 几何混淆中，混淆的邻近线空间分布仍有效包围原始关键点位置，为攻击者提供可恢复的线索。
analysis.method: 双收敛线（DCL）：在中心分割线上放置两个固定锚点，每个关键点被提升为从其中一个锚点出发的线，锚点选择由关键点位置决定。该设计使几何恢复攻击的优化病态：邻近线要么误导性收敛到一个锚点（平凡解），要么在分割边界附近近平行（高方差不稳定解），从而阻止点恢复。
contributions: 揭示了现有几何混淆方法的根本局限性：混淆线空间分布仍包围原始关键点。
提出DCL方法，通过双锚点和分区机制使攻击优化病态，有效防御几何恢复攻击。
在室内和室外大规模数据集上验证了DCL的鲁棒性、效率和可扩展性，同时保持实际定位性能。
analysis.experiments: 在室内和室外大规模数据集上进行了实验，展示了DCL对隐私攻击的鲁棒性、效率和可扩展性，并实现了实际定位性能。
limitations: 可能对锚点位置和分区策略敏感，需要进一步调优。
仅针对几何恢复攻击，对其他类型隐私攻击的防御效果未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双收敛线（DCL）方法，通过使邻近线误导性收敛或近平行来防御几何恢复攻击，实现隐私保护的视觉定位。

papers.title: BLAST: Benchmarking LLMs with ASP-based Structured Testing
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across a broad spectrum of tasks, including natural language understanding, dialogue systems, and code generation. Despite evident progress, less attention has been paid to their effectiveness in handling declarative paradigms such as Answer Set Programming (ASP), to date. In this paper we introduce BLAST: The first dedicated benchmarking methodology and associated dataset for evaluating the accuracy of LLMs in generating ASP code. BLAST provides a structured evaluation framework featuring two novel semantic metrics tailored to ASP code generation. The paper presents the results of an empirical evaluation involving ten well-established graph-related problems from the ASP literature and a diverse set of eight state-of-the-art LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对LLM生成ASP代码的结构化基准测试BLAST，提出语义度量并评估了8个模型。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在声明式编程（如ASP）上的能力尚未得到系统评估，缺乏专用基准和度量。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM生成ASP代码的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含ASP图问题的数据集，设计两种语义度量，对8个LLM进行结构化评估。
contributions: 首个LLM生成ASP代码的基准测试BLAST
两种针对ASP代码的语义度量
analysis.experiments: 在10个ASP图问题上评估了8个LLM，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖图相关问题，泛化性未知
未提供模型间性能差异的详细分析
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对LLM生成ASP代码的结构化基准测试BLAST，提出语义度量并评估了8个模型。

papers.title: Knowledge Visualization: A Benchmark and Method for Knowledge-Intensive Text-to-Image Generation
papers.abstract: Recent text-to-image (T2I) models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in photorealistic synthesis and instruction following. However, their reliability in knowledge-intensive settings remains largely unexplored. Unlike natural image generation, knowledge visualization requires not only semantic alignment but also strict adherence to domain knowledge, structural constraints, and symbolic conventions, exposing a critical gap between visual plausibility and scientific correctness. To systematically study this problem, we introduce KVBench, a curriculum-grounded benchmark for evaluating knowledge-intensive T2I generation. KVBench covers six senior high-school subjects: Biology, Chemistry, Geography, History, Mathematics, and Physics. The benchmark consists of 1,800 expert-curated prompts derived from over 30 authoritative textbooks. Using this benchmark, we evaluate 14 state-of-the-art open- and closed-source models, revealing substantial deficiencies in logical reasoning, symbolic precision, and multilingual robustness, with open-source models consistently underperforming proprietary systems. To address these limitations, we further propose KE-Check, a two-stage framework that improves scientific fidelity via (1) Knowledge Elaboration for structured prompt enrichment, and (2) Checklist-Guided Refinement for explicit constraint enforcement through violation identification and constraint-guided editing. KE-Check effectively mitigates scientific hallucinations, narrowing the performance gap between open-source and leading closed-source models. Data and codes are publicly available at https://github.com/zhaoran66/KVBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识密集型文本到图像生成的基准KVBench和两阶段框架KE-Check，以提升科学正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I模型在知识密集型场景中缺乏可靠性，无法严格遵循领域知识、结构约束和符号约定，存在视觉合理性与科学正确性之间的鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 知识可视化任务中，T2I模型在逻辑推理、符号精度和多语言鲁棒性方面存在严重缺陷，开源模型表现尤其不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估14个模型发现，开源模型在知识密集型生成中系统性落后于闭源模型，存在科学幻觉。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架KE-Check：1) 知识细化阶段结构化丰富提示；2) 清单引导精炼阶段通过违规识别和约束引导编辑显式执行约束。
contributions: 提出KVBench，包含1800个专家策划提示的课程基准，覆盖6个高中学科。
提出KE-Check框架，有效缓解科学幻觉，缩小开源与闭源模型差距。
analysis.experiments: 在KVBench上评估14个开源和闭源模型，显示KE-Check提升了科学保真度。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖高中科目，可能不适用于更专业领域。
KE-Check依赖外部知识库和约束清单，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识密集型文本到图像生成的基准KVBench和两阶段框架KE-Check，以提升科学正确性。

papers.title: Evaluation of image simulation open source solutions for simulation of synthetic images in lunar environment
papers.abstract: Synthetic image generation is one of the crucial input for planetary missions. It enables researchers and engineers to visualize planned planetary missions, test imaging systems and plan exploration activities in a virtual environment before actual deployment. Image simulation is essential for assessing landing sites, detecting hazards, and validating navigation systems in a missions. This study offers a detailed evaluation of various image simulation approaches for the lunar environment, with particular emphasis on the effects of different camera models and light illumination conditions on the quality of synthetic lunar images. These images are produced using real Digital Elevation Models (DEM) and terrain data derived from instruments such as Chandrayaan-2 Orbiter High Resolution Camera (OHRC) and NASA's Wide Angle Camera (WAC), and Narrow Angle Camera (NAC) instruments. This research aims to improve the reliability of synthetic imagery in supporting autonomous navigation and decision-making systems in lunar exploration. This work contributes to the development of more effective tools for generating important information for future lunar missions and enhances the understanding of the moon's surface environment.

analysis.tldr: 评估月球环境下合成图像生成的开源图像仿真方案，重点关注相机模型和光照条件对图像质量的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成图像生成对于行星任务至关重要，但月球环境下的图像仿真方案缺乏系统评估，现有方法在相机模型和光照条件的影响方面研究不足。
analysis.problem: 如何评估不同图像仿真方法在月球环境下生成合成图像的质量，特别是相机模型和光照条件的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用真实数字高程模型（DEM）和地形数据（来自Chandrayaan-2 OHRC、NASA WAC和NAC），评估多种图像仿真方法，重点分析相机模型和光照条件对合成图像质量的影响。
contributions: 系统评估了月球环境下多种图像仿真开源方案。
揭示了相机模型和光照条件对合成图像质量的关键影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对月球环境，泛化到其他行星环境需验证。
未提及具体评估指标和定量结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估月球环境下合成图像生成的开源图像仿真方案，重点关注相机模型和光照条件对图像质量的影响。

papers.title: Contexts are Never Long Enough: Structured Reasoning for Scalable Question Answering over Long Document Sets
papers.abstract: Real-world document question answering is challenging. Analysts must synthesize evidence across multiple documents and different parts of each document. However, any fixed LLM context window can be exceeded as document collections grow. A common workaround is to decompose documents into chunks and assemble answers from chunk-level outputs, but this introduces an aggregation bottleneck: as the number of chunks grows, systems must still combine and reason over an increasingly large body of extracted evidence. We present SLIDERS, a framework for question answering over long document collections through structured reasoning. SLIDERS extracts salient information into a relational database, enabling scalable reasoning over persistent structured state via SQL rather than concatenated text. To make this locally extracted representation globally coherent, SLIDERS introduces a data reconciliation stage that leverages provenance, extraction rationales, and metadata to detect and repair duplicated, inconsistent, and incomplete records. SLIDERS outperforms all baselines on three existing long-context benchmarks, despite all of them fitting within the context window of strong base LLMs, exceeding GPT-4.1 by 6.6 points on average. It also improves over the next best baseline by ~19 and ~32 points on two new benchmarks at 3.9M and 36M tokens, respectively.

analysis.tldr: SLIDERS 通过将文档信息提取到关系数据库并用 SQL 推理，解决了长文档集问答中的上下文窗口限制和聚合瓶颈问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实中的文档问答需要跨多文档和文档内不同部分综合证据，但 LLM 的固定上下文窗口无法处理不断增长的文档集合，现有分块方法存在聚合瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖长上下文窗口的情况下，对大规模文档集合进行可扩展且准确的问答推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着文档块数量增加，系统需要组合和推理大量提取的证据，导致聚合瓶颈；此外，局部提取的信息可能存在重复、不一致或不完整的问题。
analysis.method: SLIDERS 框架：将文档中的关键信息提取到关系数据库，通过 SQL 进行结构化推理；引入数据协调阶段，利用来源、提取理由和元数据检测并修复重复、不一致和不完整的记录。
contributions: 提出 SLIDERS 框架，通过结构化推理（SQL）替代文本拼接，实现长文档集问答的可扩展性。
引入数据协调阶段，确保局部提取的表示在全局上一致。
在多个长上下文基准上超越 GPT-4.1 等基线，并在 3.9M 和 36M token 的新基准上分别提升约 19 和 32 个点。
analysis.experiments: 在三个现有长上下文基准上，SLIDERS 平均超过 GPT-4.1 6.6 个点；在两个新基准（3.9M 和 36M token）上，分别比次优基线提升约 19 和 32 个点。
limitations: 依赖 SQL 推理可能不适用于需要复杂语义理解的问答。
数据协调阶段可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SLIDERS 通过将文档信息提取到关系数据库并用 SQL 推理，解决了长文档集问答中的上下文窗口限制和聚合瓶颈问题。

papers.title: ReLeVAnT: Relevance Lexical Vectors for Accurate Legal Text Classification
papers.abstract: The classification of legal documents from an unstructured data corpus has several crucial applications in downstream tasks. Documents relevant to court filings are key in use cases such as drafting motions, memos, and outlines, as well as in tasks like docket summarisation, retrieval systems, and training data curation. Current methods classify based on provided metadata, LLM-extracted metadata, or multimodal methods. These methods depend on structured data, metadata, and extensive computational power. This task is approached from a perspective of leveraging discriminative features in the documents between classes. The authors propose ReLeVAnT, a framework for legal document binary classification. ReLeVAnT utilises n-gram processing, contrastive score matching, and a shallow neural network as the primary drivers for discriminative classification. It leverages one-time keyword extraction per corpus, followed by a shallow classifier to swiftly and reliably classify documents with 99.3% accuracy and 98.7% F1 score on the LexGLUE dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出ReLeVAnT框架，利用n-gram、对比得分匹配和浅层神经网络实现高精度法律文本二分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律文档分类在起草动议、摘要生成、检索系统等下游任务中至关重要，但现有方法依赖结构化元数据或大模型，计算成本高且对非结构化数据适应性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖元数据或大模型的情况下，仅利用文档本身的判别性特征实现高效、准确的法律文本二分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ReLeVAnT框架：先对语料库进行一次关键词提取（n-gram处理），然后通过对比得分匹配和浅层神经网络进行二分类。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级法律文本分类框架，无需元数据或大模型。
在LexGLUE数据集上达到99.3%准确率和98.7% F1分数。
analysis.experiments: 在LexGLUE数据集上评估，准确率99.3%，F1分数98.7%。
limitations: 仅针对二分类任务，未扩展到多分类。
方法可能依赖特定语料库的关键词提取，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ReLeVAnT框架，利用n-gram、对比得分匹配和浅层神经网络实现高精度法律文本二分类。

papers.title: NeuroAPS-Net: Neuro-Anatomically Aware Point Cloud Representation for Efficient Alzheimer's Disease Classification
papers.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder and a major cause of dementia. Structural MRI is widely used to analyze AD-related brain atrophy; however, most deep learning methods rely on computationally expensive 3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs), limiting deployment in resource-constrained settings. This work introduces two main contributions. First, we propose a pipeline that converts T1-weighted MRI into anatomically informed 2D point clouds using Anatomical Priority Sampling (APS), producing ADNI-2DPC, the first neuroanatomically labeled MRI-derived point cloud dataset. Second, we present NeuroAPS-Net, a lightweight geometric deep learning model that incorporates anatomical priors via region-aware feature encoding and ROI token aggregation. Experiments on ADNI-2DPC demonstrate that NeuroAPS-Net achieves competitive classification accuracy while significantly reducing inference latency and GPU memory compared to state-of-the-art point cloud methods. These results highlight the potential of anatomically guided point cloud learning as an efficient and interpretable alternative to voxel-based CNNs for AD classification.

analysis.tldr: 将MRI转换为解剖感知2D点云，用轻量几何深度学习高效分类阿尔茨海默病。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病诊断依赖结构MRI，但现有深度学习方法多使用计算昂贵的3D CNN，难以在资源受限场景部署。
analysis.problem: 如何将3D MRI高效转换为轻量表示，同时保持解剖信息以实现准确且高效的AD分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Anatomical Priority Sampling (APS)将T1加权MRI转换为解剖感知2D点云，构建ADNI-2DPC数据集；设计NeuroAPS-Net，通过区域感知特征编码和ROI token聚合融入解剖先验。
contributions: 提出APS管道，将MRI转换为解剖感知2D点云，并发布首个神经解剖标记的MRI点云数据集ADNI-2DPC。
提出NeuroAPS-Net，一种轻量几何深度学习模型，在AD分类中达到竞争性准确率，同时显著降低推理延迟和GPU内存。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI-2DPC数据集上，NeuroAPS-Net与最先进点云方法相比，实现了竞争性分类准确率，并显著降低推理延迟和GPU内存。
limitations: 可能仅在ADNI数据集上验证，泛化性需更多数据测试。
点云转换可能丢失部分3D空间信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将MRI转换为解剖感知2D点云，用轻量几何深度学习高效分类阿尔茨海默病。

papers.title: DocPrune:Efficient Document Question Answering via Background, Question, and Comprehension-aware Token Pruning
papers.abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models have demonstrated remarkable performance across diverse multi-modal tasks, including document question answering that leverages structured visual cues from text, tables, and figures. However, unlike natural images, document images contain large backgrounds and only sparse supporting evidence, leading to the inefficient consumption of substantial computational resources, especially for long documents. We observe that existing token-reduction methods for natural images and videos fall short in utilizing the structural sparsity unique to documents. To address this, we propose DocPrune, a training-free and progressive document token pruning framework designed for efficient long-document understanding. The proposed method preserves only the essential tokens for the task while removing unnecessary ones, such as background or question-irrelevant tokens. Moreover, it automatically selects the appropriate layers to initiate token pruning based on the model's level of comprehension. Our experiments on the M3DocRAG show that DocPrune improves throughput by 3.0x and 3.3x in the encoder and decoder, respectively, while boosting the F1 score by +1.0, achieving both higher accuracy and efficiency without any additional training.

analysis.tldr: DocPrune通过背景、问题和理解感知的令牌剪枝，实现无需训练的高效文档问答，吞吐量提升3倍以上且F1提升1.0。
analysis.research_motivation: 文档图像包含大量背景和稀疏支持证据，现有令牌缩减方法未利用文档的结构稀疏性，导致长文档理解计算资源浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲准确性的前提下，高效剪枝文档图像中的冗余令牌以加速视觉-语言模型推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有令牌缩减方法对自然图像有效，但未能利用文档的结构稀疏性（如背景多、支持证据稀疏）。
analysis.method: 提出DocPrune，一种无需训练、渐进式的文档令牌剪枝框架，根据背景、问题相关性和模型理解程度自动选择剪枝层，保留任务关键令牌。
contributions: 提出首个针对文档结构稀疏性的训练无关令牌剪枝方法。
实现3.0倍编码器和3.3倍解码器吞吐量提升，同时F1分数提高1.0。
analysis.experiments: 在M3DocRAG数据集上评估，显示吞吐量和F1分数的提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于文档问答场景，泛化性未验证。
剪枝策略依赖模型理解程度，可能对某些模型不鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DocPrune通过背景、问题和理解感知的令牌剪枝，实现无需训练的高效文档问答，吞吐量提升3倍以上且F1提升1.0。

papers.title: Beyond Chain-of-Thought: Rewrite as a Universal Interface for Generative Multimodal Embeddings
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have emerged as a promising foundation for universal multimodal embeddings. Recent studies have shown that reasoning-driven generative multimodal embeddings can outperform discriminative embeddings on several embedding tasks. However, Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning tends to generate redundant thinking steps and introduce semantic ambiguity in the summarized answers in broader retrieval scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose Rewrite-driven Multimodal Embedding (RIME), a unified framework that jointly optimizes generation and embedding through a retrieval-friendly rewrite. Meanwhile, we present the Cross-Mode Alignment (CMA) to bridge the generative and discriminative embedding spaces, enabling flexible mutual retrieval to trade off efficiency and accuracy. Based on this, we also introduce Refine Reinforcement Learning (Refine-RL) that treats discriminative embeddings as stable semantic anchors to guide the rewrite optimization. Extensive experiments on MMEB-V2, MRMR and UVRB demonstrate that RIME substantially outperforms prior generative embedding models while significantly reducing the length of thinking.

analysis.tldr: 提出RIME框架，用重写替代思维链作为多模态生成式嵌入的统一接口，提升检索性能并减少推理长度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于思维链的生成式多模态嵌入存在冗余推理和语义歧义问题，限制了在广泛检索场景中的效果。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种检索友好的生成式多模态嵌入方法，避免思维链的冗余和歧义，同时保持生成与判别空间的兼容性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 思维链在生成式嵌入中会产生冗余思考步骤，导致总结答案语义模糊，影响检索准确性。
analysis.method: 提出RIME框架，包含重写驱动的多模态嵌入、跨模态对齐（CMA）和精炼强化学习（Refine-RL），联合优化生成与嵌入。
contributions: 提出重写作为生成式多模态嵌入的通用接口，替代思维链以减少冗余和歧义。
引入跨模态对齐桥接生成与判别嵌入空间，支持灵活互检索。
提出精炼强化学习，利用判别嵌入作为语义锚点指导重写优化。
analysis.experiments: 在MMEB-V2、MRMR和UVRB三个基准上，RIME显著优于先前的生成式嵌入模型，并大幅缩短推理长度。
limitations: 重写策略可能对特定领域或长尾查询适应性有限。
跨模态对齐的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RIME框架，用重写替代思维链作为多模态生成式嵌入的统一接口，提升检索性能并减少推理长度。

papers.title: CAGE-SGG: Counterfactual Active Graph Evidence for Open-Vocabulary Scene Graph Generation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary scene graph generation (SGG) aims to describe visual scenes with flexible and fine-grained relation phrases beyond a fixed predicate vocabulary. While recent vision-language models greatly expand the semantic coverage of SGG, they also introduce a critical reliability issue: predicted relations may be driven by language priors or object co-occurrence rather than grounded visual evidence. In this paper, we propose an evidence-rounded open-vocabulary SGG framework based on counterfactual relation verification. Instead of directly accepting plausible relation proposals, our method verifies whether each candidate relation is supported by relation-pecific visual, geometric, and contextual evidence. Specifically, we first generate open-vocabulary relation candidates with a vision-language proposer, then decompose predicate phrases into soft evidence bases such as support, contact, containment, depth, motion, and state. A relation-conditioned evidence encoder extracts predicate-relevant cues, while a counterfactual verifier tests whether the relation score decreases when necessary vidence is removed and remains stable under irrelevant perturbations. We further introduce contradiction-aware predicate learning and graph-level preference optimization to improve fine-grained discrimination and global graph consistency. Experiments on conventional, open-vocabulary, and panoptic SGG benchmarks show that our method consistently improves standard recall-based metrics, unseen predicate generalization, and counterfactual grounding quality. These results demonstrate that moving from relation generation to relation verification leads to more reliable, interpretable, and evidence-grounded scene graphs.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于反事实验证的开放词汇场景图生成框架，通过证据分解与反事实检验提升关系预测的可靠性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇场景图生成中，视觉语言模型预测的关系可能受语言先验或物体共现驱动，而非基于视觉证据，导致可靠性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何确保开放词汇场景图生成中的关系预测真正基于视觉证据，而非语言先验或共现偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法预测的关系可能被语言先验或物体共现误导，缺乏对视觉证据的依赖。
analysis.method: 提出CAGE-SGG框架，包括：1) 视觉语言提议器生成开放词汇关系候选；2) 将谓词短语分解为支撑、接触、包含、深度、运动、状态等软证据基；3) 关系条件证据编码器提取谓词相关线索；4) 反事实验证器通过移除必要证据和无关扰动测试关系分数变化；5) 矛盾感知谓词学习和图级偏好优化提升细粒度判别和全局图一致性。
contributions: 提出基于反事实验证的开放词汇SGG框架，从关系生成转向关系验证。
引入证据分解和反事实验证机制，提升关系预测的可靠性和可解释性。
在多个基准上取得一致改进，包括标准召回、未见谓词泛化和反事实接地质量。
analysis.experiments: 在常规、开放词汇和全景SGG基准上实验，方法一致提升了标准召回指标、未见谓词泛化能力和反事实接地质量。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义证据基的完备性，复杂场景中证据分解可能不充分。
反事实验证的计算开销可能较大，实时性有待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于反事实验证的开放词汇场景图生成框架，通过证据分解与反事实检验提升关系预测的可靠性和可解释性。

papers.title: Self-Correction as Feedback Control: Error Dynamics, Stability Thresholds, and Prompt Interventions in LLMs
papers.abstract: Iterative self-correction is increasingly deployed in agentic LLM systems, yet whether repeated refinement improves or degrades performance remains inconsistent across models. We recast self-correction as a closed-loop feedback-control problem in which the same model is both controller and plant, and analyze its error dynamics via a two-state Markov model over {Correct, Incorrect}, parameterized by the Error Introduction Rate (EIR) and Error Correction Rate (ECR). The model yields a directly measurable stability threshold -- iterate only when ECR/EIR > Acc/(1-Acc) -- in which EIR acts as a stability margin and prompting becomes lightweight controller design. Empirically, across 7 models and 3 datasets (GSM8K, MATH, StrategyQA), a sharp near-zero EIR boundary (< 0.5%) cleanly separates beneficial from harmful self-correction: only o3-mini (+3.4 pp), Claude Opus 4.6 (+0.6 pp), and o4-mini (+/-0 pp) stay non-degrading, while GPT-5 and four others lose accuracy. A verify-first prompt intervention then provides causal evidence: it drives GPT-4o-mini's EIR from 2% to 0% and converts a -6.2 pp degradation into +0.2 pp (paired McNemar, p<10^{-4}), with negligible change on already-sub-threshold models -- exactly as the diagnostic predicts. A complementary analysis of adaptive self-consistency (ASC) shows it halts harmful refinement at a 3.8 pp confidence-elicitation cost, exposing a two-tier capability structure: prompt-level EIR suppression prevents degradation, whereas ECR enhancement -- plausibly training-level -- is required for genuine gains. Self-correction should thus be treated not as a default behavior but as a control decision governed by measurable error dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM自纠正建模为反馈控制，推导稳定性阈值，并通过验证优先提示干预实现从有害到有益的转变。
analysis.research_motivation: 迭代自纠正被广泛用于LLM智能体系统，但反复修正是否提升性能在不同模型间不一致，缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 如何从控制理论角度理解LLM自纠正的误差动态，并设计可测量的稳定性条件与轻量级干预策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过两状态马尔可夫模型发现，自纠正效果由错误引入率（EIR）与错误纠正率（ECR）之比决定，存在清晰阈值（ECR/EIR > Acc/(1-Acc)）；实验显示多数模型EIR接近零边界（<0.5%）时才能避免性能下降。
analysis.method: 将自纠正建模为闭环反馈控制，用两状态马尔可夫链参数化EIR和ECR，推导稳定性阈值；提出验证优先提示干预（verify-first prompt）作为轻量级控制器设计。
contributions: 将LLM自纠正形式化为反馈控制问题，建立误差动态的马尔可夫模型并推导可测量的稳定性阈值。
通过跨7模型3数据集的实验验证阈值有效性，并设计验证优先提示干预实现从有害到有益的转变。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K、MATH、StrategyQA上测试7个模型（o3-mini、Claude Opus 4.6、o4-mini、GPT-5等），验证稳定性阈值；验证优先提示干预在GPT-4o-mini上使EIR从2%降至0%，准确率从-6.2 pp提升至+0.2 pp。
limitations: 模型仅基于二值正确/错误状态，未考虑部分正确或连续置信度。
干预策略仅在提示层面，未探索训练层面的ECR增强。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM自纠正建模为反馈控制，推导稳定性阈值，并通过验证优先提示干预实现从有害到有益的转变。

papers.title: Semantic Error Correction and Decoding for Short Block Codes
papers.abstract: This paper presents a semantic-enhanced receiver framework for transmitting natural language sentences over noisy wireless channels using multiple short block codes. After ASCII encoding, the sentence is divided into segments, each independently encoded with a short block code and transmitted over an AWGN channel. At the receiver, segments are decoded in parallel, followed by a semantic error correction (SEC) model, which reconstructs corrupted segments using language model context. We further propose the semantic list decoding (SLD), which generates multiple candidate reconstructions and selects the best one via weighted Hamming distance, and a semantic confidence-guided HARQ (SHARQ) mechanism that replaces CRC-based error detection with a confidence score, enabling selective segment retransmission without CRC overhead. All modules are designed and trained using bidirectional and auto-regressive transformers (BART). Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed scheme significantly outperforms conventional capacity-approaching short codes and long codes at the same rate. Specifically, SEC provides approximately 0.4 dB BLER gain over plain short-code transmission, while SLD extends this to 0.8 dB. Compared to transmitting the entire sentence as a single long 5G LDPC codeword, our approach significantly improves semantic fidelity and reduces decoding latency by up to 90\%. SHARQ further provides an additional 1.5 dB gain over conventional HARQ.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义增强接收框架，利用BART模型对短块码进行语义纠错和列表解码，显著提升无线信道中自然语言传输的语义保真度和解码延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统短块码在无线信道中传输自然语言时，仅依赖比特级纠错，未利用语义信息，导致语义保真度低；长码虽性能好但解码延迟高。
analysis.problem: 如何在短块码传输中利用语义信息提升纠错能力和解码效率，同时降低延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出语义增强接收框架，包含语义纠错（SEC）模型、语义列表解码（SLD）和语义置信度引导的HARQ（SHARQ），均基于BART模型实现。
contributions: 提出语义纠错（SEC）模型，利用语言模型上下文重建受损段，获得约0.4 dB BLER增益。
提出语义列表解码（SLD），通过加权汉明距离选择最佳候选，将增益提升至0.8 dB。
提出语义置信度引导的HARQ（SHARQ），替代CRC检测，额外获得1.5 dB增益，并降低90%解码延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在AWGN信道上进行仿真，对比传统短码和长码（5G LDPC），报告了BLER增益和延迟降低百分比。
limitations: 仅针对自然语言句子，可能不适用于其他类型数据。
依赖BART模型，计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义增强接收框架，利用BART模型对短块码进行语义纠错和列表解码，显著提升无线信道中自然语言传输的语义保真度和解码延迟。

papers.title: Towards Safe Mobility: A Unified Transportation Foundation Model enabled by Open-Ended Vision-Language Dataset
papers.abstract: Urban transportation systems face growing safety challenges that require scalable intelligence for emerging smart mobility infrastructures. While recent advances in foundation models and large-scale multimodal datasets have strengthened perception and reasoning in intelligent transportation systems (ITS), existing research remains largely centered on microscopic autonomous driving (AD), with limited attention to city-scale traffic analysis. In particular, open-ended safety-oriented visual question answering (VQA) and corresponding foundation models for reasoning over heterogeneous roadside camera observations remain underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce the Land Transportation Dataset (LTD), a large-scale open-source vision-language dataset for open-ended reasoning in urban traffic environments. LTD contains 11.6K high-quality VQA pairs collected from heterogeneous roadside cameras, spanning diverse road geometries, traffic participants, illumination conditions, and adverse weather. The dataset integrates three complementary tasks: fine-grained multi-object grounding, multi-image camera selection, and multi-image risk analysis, requiring joint reasoning over minimally correlated views to infer hazardous objects, contributing factors, and risky road directions. To ensure annotation fidelity, we combine multi-model vision-language generation with cross-validation and human-in-the-loop refinement. Building upon LTD, we further propose UniVLT, a transportation foundation model trained via curriculum-based knowledge transfer to unify microscopic AD reasoning and macroscopic traffic analysis within a single architecture. Extensive experiments on LTD and multiple AD benchmarks demonstrate that UniVLT achieves SOTA performance on open-ended reasoning tasks across diverse domains, while exposing limitations of existing foundation models in complex multi-view traffic scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向城市交通安全的开放视觉语言数据集LTD和统一基础模型UniVLT，实现微观驾驶与宏观交通分析的统一推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市交通系统面临安全挑战，现有基础模型多聚焦微观自动驾驶，缺乏面向城市尺度交通分析的安全导向开放视觉问答数据集和基础模型。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、开放式的安全导向视觉问答数据集及统一基础模型，以支持异构路边摄像头观测下的多视图联合推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基础模型在复杂多视图交通场景中表现有限，难以处理异构摄像头下的联合推理任务。
analysis.method: 构建LTD数据集（11.6K VQA对，含多目标定位、多图像选择、多图像风险分析三任务），并提出UniVLT基础模型，通过课程知识迁移统一微观AD推理与宏观交通分析。
contributions: 提出LTD，首个大规模开源开放安全导向视觉语言数据集，覆盖多样道路场景与任务。
提出UniVLT，统一微观与宏观交通推理的基础模型，在LTD和多个AD基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在LTD和多个自动驾驶基准上实验，UniVLT在开放推理任务上达到SOTA，并暴露了现有基础模型在复杂多视图场景中的局限。
limitations: 数据集规模相对较小（11.6K VQA对），可能限制模型泛化。
仅基于路边摄像头，未融合其他传感器（如雷达、激光雷达）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向城市交通安全的开放视觉语言数据集LTD和统一基础模型UniVLT，实现微观驾驶与宏观交通分析的统一推理。

papers.title: Protect the Brain When Treating the Heart: A Convolutional Neural Network for Detecting Emboli
papers.abstract: Gaseous microemboli (GME) represent a common complication of cardiac structural interventions across both surgical and transcatheter approaches. Transthoracic cardiac ultrasound imaging represents a convenient methodology to visualize the presence of circulating GME. However, their detection and quantification are far from trivial due to operator-dependent view, high velocity, and objects with similar structure in the background. Here, we propose an approach based on a 2.5D U-Net architecture to segment GME in space-time connected data. Such an approach yields robust detection against the background and high segmentation accuracy while retaining real-time execution speed. These properties facilitated the integration of the proposed pipeline into patient-monitoring surgical protocols, providing the quantification of GME area over time.

analysis.tldr: 提出2.5D U-Net用于心脏手术中气态微栓子的实时检测与分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 心脏结构介入手术中气态微栓子（GME）是常见并发症，但超声图像中GME检测受操作者依赖、高速度和背景干扰影响，现有方法难以准确量化。
analysis.problem: 在经胸心脏超声图像中自动、实时、准确地检测和分割气态微栓子。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于2.5D U-Net架构，在时空连续数据上分割GME，实现鲁棒检测和高分割精度，同时保持实时执行速度。
contributions: 提出一种2.5D U-Net方法用于GME的时空分割，克服了背景干扰和速度问题。
将方法集成到患者监测手术协议中，实现GME面积随时间变化的量化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定超声设备或视图，泛化性需验证。

papers.title: A Probabilistic Framework for Hierarchical Goal Recognition
papers.abstract: Goal recognition aims to infer an agent's goal from observations of its behaviour. In realistic settings, recognition can benefit from exploiting hierarchical task structure and reasoning under uncertainty. Planning-based goal recognition has made substantial progress over the past decade, but to the best of our knowledge no existing approach jointly integrates hierarchical task structure with probabilistic inference. In this paper, we introduce the first planning-based probabilistic framework for hierarchical goal recognition over Hierarchical Task Networks (HTNs). We instantiate the framework by exploiting an HTN planner with a three-stage generative model for likelihood estimation, yielding posterior distributions over goal hypotheses. Empirical results show improved recognition performance over the existing HTN-based recognizer on HTN benchmarks. Overall, the framework lays a foundation for probabilistic goal recognition grounded in hierarchical planning structure, moving goal recognition toward more practical settings.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于HTN的规划式概率目标识别框架，通过三层生成模型估计似然，提升识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中目标识别需利用层次任务结构并处理不确定性，但现有方法未能联合集成层次结构与概率推理。
analysis.problem: 如何将层次任务网络（HTN）与概率推理结合，实现规划式概率目标识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出首个基于HTN的规划式概率框架，利用HTN规划器构建三层生成模型估计似然，得到目标假设的后验分布。
contributions: 首次提出联合层次任务结构与概率推理的规划式目标识别框架
在HTN基准上实验验证了优于现有HTN识别器的性能
analysis.experiments: 在HTN基准上进行了实验，结果显示识别性能优于现有HTN识别器。
limitations: 可能依赖HTN规划器的质量

papers.title: OccDirector: Language-Guided Behavior and Interaction Generation in 4D Occupancy Space
papers.abstract: Generative world models increasingly rely on 4D occupancy for realistic autonomous driving simulation. However, existing generation frameworks depend on rigid geometric conditions (e.g., explicit trajectories) or simplistic attribute-level text, failing to orchestrate complex, sequential multi-agent interactions. To address this semantic-spatiotemporal gap, we propose OccDirector, a pioneering framework that generates 4D occupancy dynamics conditioned solely on natural language. Operating as a ``scenario director'', OccDirector maps natural language scripts into physically plausible voxel dynamics without requiring geometric priors. Technically, it employs a VLM-driven Spatio-Temporal MMDiT equipped with a history-prefix anchoring strategy to ensure long-horizon interaction consistency. Furthermore, we introduce OccInteract-85k, a novel dataset uniquely annotated with multi-level language instructions: ranging from static layouts to intricate multi-agent behaviors, alongside a novel VLM-based evaluation benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OccDirector achieves state-of-the-art generation quality and unprecedented instruction-following capabilities, successfully shifting the paradigm from appearance synthesis to language-driven behavior orchestration.

analysis.tldr: OccDirector通过自然语言指令在4D占据空间中生成多智能体交互行为，无需几何先验。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式世界模型依赖刚性几何条件或简单文本，无法处理复杂的多智能体序列交互，限制了自动驾驶仿真的灵活性和语义控制。
analysis.problem: 如何仅凭自然语言脚本生成物理合理的4D占据空间动态，并实现长期交互一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OccDirector框架，包含VLM驱动的时空MMDiT模块和历史前缀锚定策略，将自然语言脚本映射为体素动态。
contributions: 提出首个仅依赖自然语言生成4D占据动态的框架OccDirector，无需几何先验。
构建OccInteract-85k数据集，包含多级语言指令标注，并设计基于VLM的评估基准。
analysis.experiments: 在OccInteract-85k数据集上实验，达到SOTA生成质量和指令跟随能力。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的泛化能力，复杂场景下语言理解可能受限。
4D占据空间的计算开销较大，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OccDirector通过自然语言指令在4D占据空间中生成多智能体交互行为，无需几何先验。

papers.title: Navigating Large-Scale Document Collections: MuDABench for Multi-Document Analytical QA
papers.abstract: This paper introduces the task of analytical question answering over large, semi-structured document collections. We present MuDABench, a benchmark for multi-document analytical QA, where questions require extracting and synthesizing information across numerous documents to perform quantitative analysis. Unlike existing multi-document QA benchmarks that typically require information from only a few documents with limited cross-document reasoning, MuDABench demands extensive inter-document analysis and aggregation. Constructed via distant supervision by leveraging document-level metadata and annotated financial databases, MuDABench comprises over 80,000 pages and 332 analytical QA instances. We also propose an evaluation protocol that measures final answer accuracy and uses intermediate-fact coverage as an auxiliary diagnostic signal for the reasoning process. Experiments reveal that standard RAG systems, which treat all documents as a flat retrieval pool, perform poorly. To address these limitations, we propose a multi-agent workflow that orchestrates planning, extraction, and code generation modules. While this approach substantially improves both process and outcome metrics, a significant gap remains compared to human expert performance. Our analysis identifies two primary bottlenecks: single-document information extraction accuracy and insufficient domain-specific knowledge in current systems. MuDABench is available at https://github.com/Zhanli-Li/MuDABench.

analysis.tldr: 提出多文档分析问答基准MuDABench，揭示标准RAG系统在大型文档集合上的不足，并提出多Agent工作流改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多文档问答基准通常只涉及少量文档且跨文档推理有限，无法评估模型在大型半结构化文档集合上进行定量分析的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个需要跨文档提取和综合信息进行定量分析的多文档问答基准，并解决当前系统在此任务上的性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准RAG系统将所有文档视为扁平检索池，性能较差；多Agent工作流显著提升但仍有差距；主要瓶颈在于单文档信息抽取准确性和领域知识不足。
analysis.method: 通过远程监督利用文档级元数据和标注的金融数据库构建基准；提出包含规划、提取和代码生成模块的多Agent工作流。
contributions: 定义了多文档分析问答任务并构建了包含80,000+页和332个实例的基准MuDABench
提出评估协议，结合最终答案准确性和中间事实覆盖度
揭示标准RAG系统的不足，提出多Agent工作流并分析主要瓶颈
analysis.experiments: 实验表明标准RAG系统性能差，多Agent工作流在过程和结果指标上均有显著提升，但与人类专家仍有差距。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖金融领域，泛化性未知
多Agent工作流复杂度高，可能难以扩展到更大规模
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多文档分析问答基准MuDABench，揭示标准RAG系统在大型文档集合上的不足，并提出多Agent工作流改进。

papers.title: Tell Me Why: Designing an Explainable LLM-based Dialogue System for Student Problem Behavior Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Diagnosing student problem behaviors requires teachers to synthesize multifaceted information, identify behavioral categories, and plan intervention strategies. Although fine-tuned large language models (LLMs) can support this process through multi-turn dialogue, they rarely explain why a strategy is recommended, limiting transparency and teachers' trust. To address this issue, we present an explainable dialogue system built on a fine-tuned LLM. The system uses a hierarchical attribution method based on explainable AI (xAI) to identify dialogue evidence for each recommendation and generate a natural-language explanation based on that evidence. In technical evaluation, the method outperformed baseline approaches in identifying supporting evidence. In a preliminary user study with 22 pre-service teachers, participants who received explanations reported higher trust in the system. These findings suggest a promising direction for improving LLM explainability in educational dialogue systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于可解释AI的分层归因方法，为LLM教育对话系统生成自然语言解释，提升教师信任。
analysis.research_motivation: 学生问题行为诊断需要教师综合信息并制定干预策略，微调LLM虽能支持多轮对话，但缺乏可解释性，限制了透明度和教师信任。
analysis.problem: 如何为基于LLM的学生问题行为诊断对话系统提供可解释的推荐理由。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于可解释AI的分层归因方法，识别对话证据并生成自然语言解释。
contributions: 提出一种分层归因方法用于识别对话中的支持证据。
构建可解释的LLM对话系统，并在技术评估和用户研究中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 技术评估中方法优于基线；22名职前教师用户研究表明，收到解释的参与者对系统信任度更高。
limitations: 用户研究规模较小（22人），可能缺乏泛化性。
未提及在不同教育场景或语言下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于可解释AI的分层归因方法，为LLM教育对话系统生成自然语言解释，提升教师信任。

papers.title: Learning-augmented robotic automation for real-world manufacturing
papers.abstract: Industrial robots are widely used in manufacturing, yet most manipulation still depends on fixed waypoint scripts that are brittle to environmental changes. Learning-based control offers a more adaptive alternative, but it remains unclear whether such methods, still mostly confined to laboratory demonstrations, can sustain hours of reliable operation, deliver consistent quality, and behave safely around people on a live production line. Here we present Learning-Augmented Robotic Automation, a hybrid system that integrates learned task controllers and a neural 3D safety monitor into conventional industrial workflows. We deployed the system on an electric-motor production line to automate deformable cable insertion and soldering under real manufacturing constraints, a step previously performed manually by human workers. With less than 20 min of real-world data per task, the system operated continuously for 5 h 10 min, producing 108 motors without physical fencing and achieving a 99.4% pass rate on product-level quality-control tests. It maintained near-human takt time while reducing variability in solder-joint quality and cycle time. These results establish a practical pathway for extending industrial automation with learning-based methods.

analysis.tldr: 将学习型控制器与3D安全监控集成到工业产线，实现5小时连续运行和99.4%良率。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业机器人依赖固定脚本，对环境变化脆弱；学习型方法虽灵活但缺乏在真实产线上长时间可靠运行的验证。
analysis.problem: 如何将学习型控制方法安全、稳定地部署到真实制造产线，实现长时间连续作业并保证产品质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Learning-Augmented Robotic Automation混合系统，集成学习型任务控制器和神经3D安全监控器，融入传统工业流程。
contributions: 首次在真实电动马达产线上验证学习型方法可长时间（5小时10分）连续运行并达到99.4%良率。
提出混合系统架构，将学习控制器与3D安全监控结合，无需物理围栏即可安全运行。
analysis.experiments: 在电动马达产线上进行电缆插入和焊接任务，系统连续运行5小时10分，生产108个马达，产品级质检通过率99.4%，节拍接近人工水平，焊点质量和周期时间变异性降低。
limitations: 仅针对特定任务（电缆插入和焊接）验证，泛化性未知。
摘要未提及失败案例或安全监控的误报率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
